Name: Mettler-Toledo International, Inc
Description:
At METTLER TOLEDO, our mission is to empower industries worldwide with precision instruments and services that drive progress toward a better and more #sustainable future. Our teams operate at the forefront of #innovation, delivering cutting-edge instruments to a diverse range of industries, from #LifeSciences and #pharmaceuticals to #manufacturing and #logistics. 

With a rich legacy spanning several decades, METTLER TOLEDO (NYSE: MTD) has a global presence in 40 countries, serves more than 140 countries, and employs 17,300 ambitious minds. Our valued global team contributes to our success in pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in the fields of biomedical sciences, food & beverage, retail, chemical analysis, industrial sectors, transport & logistics, and academia.  

Through our comprehensive portfolio of solutions and services, we enable businesses to achieve new levels of accuracy, efficiency, and quality. METTLER TOLEDO products cater to the unique needs of various applications, including laboratory weighing, liquid handling, industrial weighing, chemical analysis, and product inspection, while upholding our GreenMT commitment to sustainable practices.  

Be at the forefront of precision and excellence and follow us for more information about live events, hiring opportunities, industry latest trends, best practices, and more.  

Become a member of our global team at METTLER TOLEDO https://jobs.mt.com

Benefit from informational videos on our YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/@mettlertoledo

Name: Hexagon Manufacturing Intelligence
Description:
At Hexagon, we don’t just measure the world – we define its future.

As the global leader in measurement technologies, we provide the confidence that vital industries rely on to build, navigate, and innovate.

From microns to Mars, our solutions drive productivity, quality, safety, and sustainability.

Manufacturing Intelligence equips innovators with the technology to shape a better reality. 

By creating a digital thread for quality that connects the value chain, manufacturers can improve the entire process, achieve all of their desired outcomes and transform people’s experiences with products that redefine their category.

Fusing digital and real worlds, we create immersive digital twins of products, assets and facilities – manufacturers can test, explore, iterate entirely in the virtual world. Our system of engagement offers full enterprise alignment embedding advanced automation to drive optimisation and innovation to new levels.

We bring continuous improvement with generative, autonomous AI recommendations allowing manufacturers to create a higher quality world for all.

Measurement is the foundation of progress. When it has to be right, it has to be Hexagon.

For more information, visit hexagon.com/mi. Learn more about Hexagon (Nasdaq Stockholm: HEXA B) at hexagon.com.

Name: WIKA Group
Description: The WIKA Group is a global market leader in pressure and temperature measurement. The company also sets the standard in the measurement of level, force and flow, and in calibration technology. The broad portfolio of high-precision instruments, IIoT solutions and comprehensive services makes WIKA a strong and reliable partner for all the requirements of industrial measurement technology. The family-run business, founded in 1946, has a global presence with 11,200 employees. This includes our own subsidiaries, production sites and development departments, such as the Innovation Center in Klingenberg. There alone, over 100 engineers work on innovative sensing solutions that provide answers to global challenges. WIKA's unique experience and know-how make sensing technology smarter, add more value and prepare it for a sustainable future: “Smart in sensing”.

Name: ZEISS Industrial Quality Solutions
Description:
ZEISS Industrial Quality Solutions is a leading manufacturer of multidimensional metrology solutions. These include coordinate measuring machines, optical and multisensor systems and metrology software for the automotive, aircraft, mechanical engineering, plastics and medical technology industries. Innovative technologies such as 3D X-ray metrology for quality inspection round off the product portfolio.

Name: Anton Paar
Description:
Anton Paar GmbH, founded in 1922 as a one-man locksmith‘s workshop, today is a globally active high-tech company headquartered in Graz, Austria with 40 sales and service subsidiaries worldwide. The company currently counts 4,200 employees. Anton Paar develops and produces high-precision laboratory instruments as well as process measurement technology and provides custom-tailored automation and robotics solutions.

A love of research and high quality standards have made Anton Paar a world market leader in the fields of density measurement, the determination of dissolved CO2, rheometry, material characterization and the production of complex high-precision parts, e.g. for medicinal prostheses. Innovation is essential: About 14.5 % of the company’s annual turnover is invested in Research & Development.

Anton Paar provides solutions to industries in over 110 countries. Customers include, among others, the world’s largest soft drink producers, all major breweries, Formula 1, the chemical and pharmaceutical industry and food producers, including chocolate manufacturers.

Anton Paar GmbH is owned by the Santner Foundation, which is exclusively and directly aimed at charitable causes.

Legal notice: https://www.anton-paar.com/corp-en/legal-notice/

Name: BUCHI Laboratory Equipment
Description: For 85+ years, BUCHI has led in Lab Technology Solution, advancing R&D, quality control, and production globally. Our innovative solutions optimize processes and improve efficiency while prioritizing safety and sustainability. Let’s collaborate to shape the future of science. #QualityInYourHands

Name: Kistler Group
Description: Kistler is the global market leader for dynamic pressure, force, torque and acceleration measurement technology. Cutting-edge technologies provide the basis for Kistler's modular solutions. Customers in industry and scientific research benefit from Kistler's experience as a development partner and its unique sensor technology, enabling them to optimize their products and processes so as to secure sustainable competitive edge. Some 2,000 employees at more than 60 facilities across the globe offer individual application-specific support at the local level. In 2024, the Kistler Group posted sales of mCHF 448, and about 9 percent of this figure is reinvested in research and technology.

Name: HORIBA
Description: The HORIBA Group of worldwide companies provides an extensive array of instruments and systems for applications ranging from automotive R&D, process and environmental monitoring, in-vitro medical diagnostics, semiconductor manufacturing and metrology, to a broad range of scientific R&D and QC measurements. Proven quality and trustworthy performance have established widespread confidence in the HORIBA Brand.

Name: Si-Ware Systems
Description: Si-Ware Systems is a global deep-tech innovation company that delivers ready-to-deploy products and custom-developed solutions that bridge the physical and digital worlds through an integrated stack of technologies that sense, process, and respond to the world around us. With core expertise spanning material sensing, inertial sensing, sensor fusion, and sensing control software, we combine our multidisciplinary strengths across MEMS, optics, embedded systems, AI, and software to deliver fully integrated, scalable solutions. We collaborate with customers across industries to bring impactful innovations to life, contributing to a future shaped by deeper understanding, better-connected systems, and continuous innovation.

Name: Bürkert Fluid Control Systems
Description:
We make ideas flow.

At Bürkert, everything revolves around fluids. Whether it’s measuring, controlling or regulating – our fascination with everything that flows has driven us forward for eight decades. This passion is reflected in our continuous development of innovative products and tailored system solutions that are used in fluid technology applications the world over. We focus primarily on the Food & Beverage and Pharma & Biotech industries, as well as on Lab & Analytical applications, and Hydrogen for the Energy sector. For these industries, we develop individual portfolios of components, system solutions and digital services that are precisely tailored to each of the various applications and requirements. 
Headquartered in Ingelfingen in southern Germany, Bürkert operates in over 30 countries worldwide with over 3,700 employees. Our global research, development and production sites in China, the USA, India and Europe enable us to respond flexibly and quickly to specific regional needs. Together, we design complete systems that unite resource conservation, energy efficiency, and process reliability – for future-ready industry.

Imprint: https://www.burkert.com/en/Site-Info/Site-Info
Data privacy: https://www.burkert.com/en/Data-Privacy/Data-Privacy

Name: Druck
Description:
We are a global technology company that designs, develops and manufactures the highest quality, most accurate and reliable customized pressure sensing devices and instruments, software and services. 

We leverage innovation, continuous improvement and unprecedented quality, to enable our Customers to successfully operate, produce systems, monitor and/or control mission-critical assets in tough environments across the world’s most challenging applications.

Name: Testo
Description:
“Be sure.” This motto is in equal measure a slogan and the key to the success of Testo, whose headquarters are in Titisee in the Black Forest. This globally active high-tech company is an expert in highly precise measurement technology and innovative measurement solutions.

Testo’s customers range from the local contracting company around the corner to the global pharmaceutical firm. They all have to make important decisions in their daily work. And that’s when they depend on the measuring instrumentation, solutions and services from Testo. Because these ensure that foods are safe, heating systems work correctly or that compliance is fulfilled in the production of drugs. This allows our customers to increase the quality of products and services while saving time and resources.

From its beginnings as a small manufacturer of temperature measuring instruments, today Testo is a global concern. Testo SE & Co. KGaA has a presence on all continents, with 37 subsidiaries and more than 80 trade partners. An average annual growth of over 10% since the foundation of the company in 1957 and a current turnover of 466,5 million euros clearly demonstrate that the Black Forest and high-tech systems are a perfect match. Testo has a strategy of sustainable and profitable growth, and not least the extraordinary commitment of the staff to thank for this success. Roughly 3,900 Testorians worldwide research, develop, produce and market for the company with passion and expertise. 

The above-average investments in the future of the company are part of the recipe for success. Testo invests about a tenth of its annual global turnover in Research & Development. Whether in agile project management or the attention to megatrends such as the internet of things – dynamics and orientation to the future characterize Testo. This is one of the reasons the company is regularly awarded the title of one of the most innovative medium-sized firms in Germany.

Name: Toshniwal Industries Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Your Partner in Process Optimization with Measurement Instrumentation Solutions Since 1959.

Toshniwal Industries Pvt. Ltd. (TIPL), a 60-year-old company founded in 1959 by the visionary scientist, Late Dr. G.R. Toshniwal, is a pioneer in the Indian industrial sector, bringing innovative temperature sensing and predictive maintenance technologies. With a team of over 200 professionals across India, we believe in the power of community and employee investment.

At TIPL, we provide advanced process optimization solutions, focusing on industries’ most critical operations. We help streamline processes, enhance productivity, and reduce inefficiencies with our reliable instrumentation and technologies.

Your Trusted Partner for Solutions in:
Temperature (Contact & Non-Contact)
Pressure (Absolute, Gauge & Differential)
Flow (Liquid & Solid)
Level (Ultrasonic, Radar, Guided Wave)
CCTV Surveillance, Fire Detection & Alarm Systems
High-Temperature Process Monitoring Systems
Condition Monitoring (Thermography, Ultrasound, Vibration)
Laboratory Packages (C&I/Electrical/Analytical - Chemical/Mechanical)
Gas Analysers, Zirconia Oxygen Sensors, Dust Monitors & CEMS
Test & Measurement Equipment
Calibration Standards
High Voltage & Transformer Testing
Conveyor Belt Safety Solutions

Why Choose TIPL?
We don’t just provide products; we offer solutions that lead to real-world savings and optimization. Our expertise has helped over 31,252 clients across 27 countries save substantial operational costs, ensuring their systems run efficiently and safely.

Name: Bertin Technologies
Description:
Bertin Technologies is a French industrialist in high-end instrumentation that designs and manufactures, in France and in Europe, measurement, observation & detection systems and instruments for critical or scientific applications. Every day, Bertin Technologies pursues technological advances in the fields of Nuclear, Defence, Space, Big Science, Life Sciences and Health.

Its employees share a desire for excellence, in the service of remarkable and innovative technological solutions. Based in Paris Region and Southern France, the company is organized around 4 divisions, which manage the 7 business units of the Bertin Technologies group – Bertin VF Nuclear, Bertin Instruments, Bertin Winlight, Bertin Alpao, Bertin Environics, Bertin Exensor & Bertin Health & Life Sciences – and has operational subsidiaries in Europe (Germany, Italy, the United Kingdom, Sweden, Finland, Czech Republic) and the United States.

Name: Dewesoft
Description: World's best Data acquisition systems (DAQ). Versatile and easy-to-use data acquisition systems - the ultimate tools for test and measurement applications. Our vision is to design test equipment that simplifies the advancement of humanity. #DAQ #Dewesoft #Testing #WeAreDewesoft

Name: Anton Paar India
Description:
Anton Paar develops and produces high-quality measuring and analysis instruments for industrial and research applications. Founded in 1922, Anton Paar is the world leader in density, concentration and CO2 measurement and in the field of rheometry. The state-of-the-art product range also comprises X-ray diffraction, small-angle X-ray scattering systems, instruments for surface characterization, viscometers, refractometers, polarimeters, microwave synthesizers, microwave digesters, petroleum testing instrumentation and a range of process instruments.

Anton Paar India Pvt. Ltd. is headquartered at Gurgaon - NCR Delhi. The sales and service centers are located in Mumbai, Kolkata, Chennai, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chandigarh, Ahmedabad and Guwahati and there are five application support centers in Gurgaon, Mumbai, Bangalore, Hyderabad and Kolkata.

Our team of more than 150 people all over India keeps us very close to our customers and ensures quick response times. Our customers benefit from the knowledge and experience of our factory-trained specialists.

Name: AM
Description:
Established in 1990, we support the manufacturing process in the global pharmaceutical and life science industry with GMP consistent products and services. 

ISO 9001:2015 certified, our Quality Management System is constantly evolving to ensure that all activities are carried out according to high standards and in compliance with regulatory requirements. 

Innovation drives our constant growth, and our R&D department keeps on evaluating state-of-the-art products and technologies for improving process steps within controlled environments.

Our GMP operational grade C cleanroom production and our advanced engineering hub deliver solutions to challenges in the life science segment through valid products and services for contamination control, innovative technologies and systems for bio decontamination and disinfection, equipment and instrumentation for monitoring and analyzing.

Name: InfraSensing
Description: InfraSensing Distribution BV markets an open & modular sensor platform to detect thermal, environmental, power or mechanical anomalies in mission critical.  Undetected and unaddressed anomalies will result in (catastrophic) failures.

Name: Metroval
Description:
A Metroval é uma empresa genuinamente brasileira especialista em medição de vazão atuando em diversas áreas: 

Fabricação de instrumentos: 
Fabricação no Brasil de medidores de vazão tipo deslocamento positivo, turbinas, mássicos, densímetros, válvulas de controle, blocos injetores, amostradores, placas de orifício e cone meters. 

Engenharia e fabricação de sistemas de medição: 
Projeto e construção de sistemas de medição de vazão, de pequenas soluções para dosagem até skids de medição fiscal e transferência de custódia para o setor de óleo e gás, sucroalcooleira e de combustíveis líquidos. 

Calibração: 
Os Laboratórios Metroval estão capacitados para calibrar medidores de vazão de várias tecnologias de medição, além de medidores de temperatura, pressão, densidade, provadores e medição dimensional em peças diversas. É acreditado pela Cgcre, de acordo com a norma ABNT NBR ISO/IEC 17025 sob números CAL 0247 e CAL 0582, sendo integrante da Rede Brasileira de Calibração (RBC) desde 2003.

Gestão de medição: 
A Metroval, através de seu sistema de gestão cerificado conforme a norma ISO 10012 executa gerenciamento de sistemas de medição de vazão em plataformas (off-shore) e instalações terrestres (on-shore). Nosso gerenciamento vai além da simples calibração de instrumentos, através de ferramentas de gestão e um software dedicado, possibilitamos a tomada de decisões de maneira rápida e consistente auxiliando no controle do processo, identificação de falhas e prevenção de não conformidades.

Metrologia legal: 
Com base na sua ampla estrutura metrológica, a Metroval oferece aos seus clientes e parceiros seu know how nos processos de aprovação de modelo e verificação metrológica de medidores e sistemas de medição de vazão, dois mais simples até os de grande envergadura e complexidade como sistemas de medição em plataformas de petróleo.

Name: Radix
Description:
Founded in 1980, Radix Electrosystems Pvt. Ltd. is one of India’s foremost manufacturing companies in the field of Industrial Instrumentation and Automation Solutions. For over four decades, Radix has been a trusted partner of industries, supplying high-quality, innovative products and solutions that deliver precision, performance and reliability.

With a dedicated in-house R&D team, Design & Product Development is one of Radix’ key strengths. Radix designs and manufactures instrumentation products for temperature, level, pressure, flow, humidity and gas measurement, along with solutions for building and process automation. Radix is one of the few Indian companies to offer such a diverse, end-to-end instrumentation product range.

Radix operates one of India’s larger instrumentation manufacturing facilities spanning about 140,000 sq. ft. Our manufacturing infrastructure is designed for quality production. 

As an ISO-certified company, we offer products compliant with CE requirements, with PESO and IBR approvals where applicable. Our NABL-accredited laboratories enable laboratory certification for select products, ensuring consistent accuracy and reliable performance.

Radix has sales offices across India and offers pan-India customer support through its large sales and service team. The Exports team serves customers in various countries abroad. Hundreds of OEMs have chosen Radix, with relationships spanning decades. Year after year, Radix is the preferred choice for instrumentation and automation solutions for thousands of customers in different industries.

Name: Anton Paar USA
Description:
Anton Paar develops, produces, distributes and provides support for analytical instruments used in research, development and quality control worldwide. 

Ever since Mr. Anton Paar founded his one-man workshop in 1922, the Austrian based company has continuously found new ways to merge high-precision engineering with scientific curiosity. The company currently has more than 4,500 employees and is active in over 110 countries worldwide.

Anton Paar is the world market leader in the field of density measurement, the determination of dissolved CO2 and the analysis of materials’ deformation and flow behavior. Customers of Anton Paar include the largest international soft drink producers and breweries, petroleum and food companies, the chemical and pharmaceutical industries, Formula 1 racing teams and many more. 

Our innovation builds on research and development, but goes beyond technology and involves all of Anton Paar’s employees. Innovation is the art of finding answers before the question is asked. Customers deserve reliable application solutions which are precise, economic and easy to use. Anton Paar customers can always expect more. 

Contact us directly at:
https://www.anton-paar.com/contact

Anton Paar USA is an Equal Employment Opportunity/Affirmative Action Plan Employer.

Name: Lince'
Description:
Fundada em 1985 a Lince é uma empresa de origem 100% brasileira, porém, de ambição global. 

Sempre pautando nossas soluções de engenharia em pesquisas de alto rigor técnico, engenharia intensa e uma necessidade quase que obsessiva por inovar e melhorar, possuímos uma visão muito diferente da qual o mercado está acostumado.

Na Lince acreditamos em construir negócios ao lado de nossos clientes e parceiros, ao invés de simplesmente fazer negócios. Nossa missão como empresa é ser a referência de número 1 no mercado Brasileiro quando o assunto for engenharia de automação e controle industrial.

Há mais de 30 anos no ramo, combinamos a força de nossa experiência, com nosso conhecimento de produtos e processos, para entregar soluções de engenharia sob medida para os segmentos de Mineração, Siderurgia, Cimento, Papel e Celulose, Óleo e Gás, Energia, Química, Petroquímica, Sucroalcooleira, Alimentícia, Materiais e Agregados, Agrícola, dentre outros.

Name: Dickson
Description:
Since 1923, the Dickson Company has helped numerous organizations monitor their most sensitive environments. As a technology leader, the company has long established itself as a preferred partner for monitoring physical parameters in life science, agribusiness, and transport/logistics markets. 

Today, Dickson provides products and services that are recognized and approved by over 80% of the Fortune 100 companies in some of the world’s most highly regulated sectors. 
Trusted by over 80,000 customers globally, Dickson helps protect sensitive assets representing several billion dollars, confirming the leadership position held by the company throughout its 100 years supporting market stakeholders. 

Dickson offers a complete range of products and services, including several monitoring platforms based on a “Software as a Service” model, meeting the strictest standards requirements while offering a high level of flexibility through user-friendly and intuitive interfaces.

Name: Labindia Instruments Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Labindia Instruments Pvt. Ltd. was founded and promoted in 1982 by Mr. S. G. Bhalerao, Mr. Upadhye, Mr. V. M. Bibikar and Mr. S. S. Bapat, a group of visionary technocrats, engineers and professionals who foresaw the need for high-quality analytical instrumentation in India. The founders have since grown the company into a highly successful manufacturing, sales, marketing, service and support organization that is recognized all over India as a key supplier of these products for a variety of verticals including biotechnology and life sciences, petroleum testing, material science, scientific imaging etc.

Labindia Instruments Pvt. Ltd has 29 years of experience of Sales, Service and Application support in the field of Biotechnology, Analytical instrumentation, Life sciences etc. The team is composed of experienced professionals who hold masters degrees in the sciences and international business. Our people understand your needs and are dedicated to meeting your project deadlines and achieving customer satisfaction. It is through our dedication and professionalism that we are able to develop long-term relationships with our customers.

Name: Rittmeyer Group
Description:
𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐑𝐢𝐭𝐭𝐦𝐞𝐲𝐞𝐫 𝐆𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐩
rethink. automate. innovate. 

The Rittmeyer Group is a Swiss-based smart utility infrastructure and services company. We deliver innovative metering, automation and data solutions to maximize digital benefits for our customers in water and energy management. 

We are an experienced and leading provider of solutions and services for both water networks – safe water supply, irrigation, urban drainage, wastewater treatment – and energy networks – hydro-electric power, gas and district heating. We serve commercial & industrial, and public-sector customers worldwide. 

Drawing on our extensive technology and application expertise, we are passionate about helping our customers managing their valuable water and energy resources better in the wake of climate change.

Rittmeyer is a Division of the BRUGG Group and part of the Group’s program focusing on energy transition, sustainability and security.

𝐖𝐡𝐨 𝐰𝐞 𝐚𝐫𝐞
As part of the BRUGG Group, we are a utility infrastructure and services specialist, offering innovative metering and automation solutions and data provider services. 

𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐰𝐞 𝐝𝐨
We provide solutions and services for water networks as well as for energy networks and serve commercial & industrial, and public-sector customers worldwide.

𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐬𝐨𝐥𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬
Our solutions and services help our customers to reliably and efficiently assume their responsibility in providing water and energy in the wake of climate change and energy transition.

Name: Waters | Wyatt Technology
Description:
Waters Corporation is a global leader in analytical instruments, separations technologies, and software, serving the life, materials, food, and environmental sciences for over 65 years. 

Our products ensure the safety of the medicines we take, the purity of the food we eat and the water we drink, and the quality and durability of products we use every day. Together with our customers, in labs around the world, we deliver scientific insights to improve human health and well-being, helping to leave the world better than we found it.
  
About Wyatt Technology 
Acquired by Waters Corporation in May 2023, Wyatt Technology produces industry leading light scattering instruments for measuring properties like molar mass and particle concentration.
 
Wyatt invented the first commercial laser-based light scattering instruments over 40 years ago and remains at the forefront of the industry through its commitment to close customer relationships and continuous innovation.

Name: Heraeus Electro-Nite
Description:
How do steel makers save energy and become more sustainable? How do foundries become more efficient and optimize their processes? Heraeus Electro-Nite (HEN) provides solutions for the molten metal industry. We lead the market with our innovations since the 1950s. As a global company with 25 locations and approximately 4000 employees worldwide, we are committed to the sustainable growth of our teams and sites.  

Heraeus Electro-Nite is headquartered in Houthalen (Belgium), and is part of the Heraeus Group. The Technology Group delivers world-class quality in the areas of Metals & Recycling, Healthcare, Semiconductor & Electronics and Industrials. As one of the top 10 family-owned companies in Germany, Heraeus employs around 16,400 employees in 40 countries.

Name: HORIBA Europe
Description:
HORIBA's global network is founded on over 75 years of measurement expertise and a strong spirit of innovation.

Our team of experts, spanning 29 countries, is dedicated to advancing measurement and test technologies that support sustainable and resilient societies.

As part of an international network of more than 8,000 employees, HORIBA Europe GmbH provides world-leading solutions that drive progress in mobility, new energy, high-performance materials and semiconductor manufacturing. We also offer a comprehensive range of molecular and elemental analytical instrumentation for research, quality control and laboratory analysis.

Our measurement and analysis technologies are renowned for their precision and can be customized to meet the diverse requirements of our customers, ranging from straightforward testing capabilities to intricate, specialized orders. 

Find out what makes HORIBA a trusted partner across major industries and applications.

𝗛𝗢𝗥𝗜𝗕𝗔 𝗖𝗮𝗿𝗲𝗲𝗿𝘀
Contribute to test and measurement solutions that are driving a sustainable future by joining our team.
https://www.horiba.com/int/company/career/

Name: Anton Paar Southern Africa
Description:
The Anton Paar Group develops, produces, distributes and provides support for analytical instruments used in research, development and quality control worldwide. Located in South Africa, Anton Paar Southern Africa (Pty) provides sales, application support and service to users across Southern Africa.  

Anton Paar produces high-end measuring and laboratory instruments for industry and research. It is the world leader in the measurement of density, concentration and CO2 and in the field of rheometry. Other areas of specialty are: Petroleum testing, microwave synthesis, viscometry, polarimetry, refractometry, X-ray scattering, sample preparation and surface characterization. 

The core competence of Anton Paar – high-precision production – and close contact to the scientific community form the basis for the quality of Anton Paar’s instruments. Continuous training and investments in R&D ensure that Anton Paar products live up to their excellent reputation.

Name: Zygo
Description:
Zygo is the global leader in the design and manufacture of advanced optical metrology systems and ultra-precise optical components and assemblies.

Our Metrology business segment is comprised of three major groups: optical surface profilers, laser interferometers, and stage position metrology. The products and systems produced by these groups use various optical techniques for measuring displacement, surface shape, and texture. Applications for our metrology products are diverse, and include precision machining, optical manufacturing, and semiconductor manufacturing, as well as many others.

Our Optics business segment is comprised of two major groups: Electro-Optics and Optical Components. These groups leverage Zygo's expertise in optical design and assembly, and high-volume manufacturing of precision optical components and systems, for aerospace, defense, medical, and industrial applications.

Founded in 1970, and headquartered in Middlefield, Connecticut, USA, Zygo's global operations are supported by over 500 dedicated and highly-skilled individuals around the world. ZYGO is driven by a passion for innovation, as evidenced by over 875 patents awarded since the Company's founding.

In 2014, Zygo became part of the Ultra Precision Technologies Division of AMETEK, Inc., a leading global manufacturer of electronic instruments and electro-mechanical devices. With annual sales over $7 billion, AMETEK has more than 15,000 colleagues at nearly 150 operating locations across the United States and in 30 other countries. Zygo enjoys mutually-beneficial relationships with its AMETEK sister companies, collaborating on technologies and sharing resources in order to provide the best possible experience for our customers.

While we are a part of the AMETEK family, we are still the same Zygo that you have known and trusted for over 50 years, committed to serving your precision metrology and optics needs now and in the future.

Name: Teledyne Gas and Flame Detection
Description:
For companies that demand the most reliable gas detection and flame detection solutions, Teledyne offers more than 100 years of proven experience in industries as diverse as oil & gas, food & beverage, marine and public utilities.
Always sensing safety, everywhere you look, Teledyne’s global portfolio of
products and safety solutions are unquestionably first in class.

Name: Alpha Controls & Instrumentation Inc.
Description:
For over 45 years, Alpha Controls & Instrumentation has been supplying a comprehensive range of instrumentation from the world's leading manufacturers. Alpha has provided technical solutions and support to industries that include pharmaceutical, automotive, food and beverage, waste and water treatment, aerospace, chemical, petrochemical, power, and HVAC.

Support goes beyond technical answers and the right instruments. Expert Alpha technicians also provide instrument calibration, full service and repair. Alpha Controls & Instrumentation is an ISO 9001 registered company and its in-house and on-site calibration lab services are accredited by A2LA to ISO/IEC 17025.

Name: AKRIBIS
Description:
Soluciones en Instrumentación y Metrología para la Industria Latinoamericana
Desde 2001, en AKRIBIS brindamos tecnologías avanzadas en medición, registro, control y aseguramiento de la calidad, orientadas a industrias biofarmacéuticas, alimenticias, energéticas, ambientales y manufactureras.

 Representamos marcas líderes a nivel mundial y acompañamos a nuestros clientes con un equipo técnico especializado, servicios de ingeniería, soporte postventa y un laboratorio de metrología acreditado ISO 17025:
AKRIMET, parte de la Red INTI-SAC, supervisado por INTI, ofrece servicios de calibraciones, calificaciones y validaciones con los más altos estándares.

 Oficinas propias en Argentina, Uruguay y EE.UU. brindan cobertura regional con logística eficiente, asesoramiento local y compromiso en todo el ciclo de vida del producto.

Name: SCANTECH
Description:
The international high-tech company, SCANTECH, was created in 1992 and has been led by two physics researchers from CERN (European Organization for Nuclear Research) since 2003. Today, the company continues to grow and employs close to 250 people around the world. SCANTECH is headquartered in France, and has fully-owned subsidiaries in Germany, Italy, the United States, China, Taiwan, South Korea, India, and Malaysia. They are also present in Thailand and Brazil. The France-based R&D team has doubled in size in the last two years and boasts a healthy mix of engineers and physicists.

At the intersection of physics, algorithmics, high-tech automation, backend and frontend software development, and high-precision mechanics, SCANTECH designs, builds, sells, installs, and maintains innovative measurement equipment used to monitor the quality of flat materials during production (e.g., metal, polymers, textiles, and laminated and coated composite materials). SCANTECH is the global leader in the extrusion industry, particularly in the measurement of battery separator films. SCANTECH was first to introduce low-energy X-ray transmission technology to industrial measurement systems and installs over 1,000 scanners annually around the world.
Each subsidiary provides comprehensive customer support as well as installation and maintenance services locally ensuring product quality and customer satisfaction. With multiple assembly centers around the world, SCANTECH can supply the same high- quality products and a complete stock of spare parts equally to all domestic customers. Each center is in full accordance with the quality standards of SCANTECH’s production plant in France and strive to provide services.
SCANTECH is now targeting new energy markets, such as the battery and fuel cell sectors. To achieve this challenging goal, SCANTECH developed a global solution for gigafactories in under a year that includes the measurement of electrode coating, press, and slitter lines.

Name: Hummex Analytics X-ECD
Description:
We are a four-person team from Leibniz University Hannover, supported by the EXIST Research Transfer program, dedicated to transforming analytical technology. Our innovative development, the X-ECD, redefines standards in detection.

Unlike traditional ECDs, our detector is entirely non-radioactive, eliminating the need for radiation protection officers and bypassing extensive bureaucratic regulations. This breakthrough design not only reduces administrative hurdles but also opens up new possibilities for businesses to operate more efficiently and sustainably.

The X-ECD delivers exceptional performance, boasting a remarkable linearity of over five orders of magnitude. This makes it a highly versatile and reliable solution for the precise measurement of environmental toxins, pesticides, CFCs, PFAs, and other halogenated, nitrated, or sulfur-containing compounds.

What sets the X-ECD apart is its seamless integration capability. Designed with Plug and Play functionality, it can replace traditional radioactive ECDs 1-to-1 without requiring additional infrastructure or adjustments. This ensures a smooth transition for laboratories and industries looking to modernize their equipment.

Stay tuned as we continue to innovate and bring this groundbreaking product to the market in 2025.

Name: Lumero by Dyneval
Description:
Lumero, a Dyneval brand, delivers cutting-edge measurement technology empowering the pharmaceutical sector to make data-driven decisions — improving profitability while reducing environmental impact.

Our first product, the Lumero S1, is a stand-alone particle size analyser that provides objective particle size distributions at almost any concentration. This breakthrough helps identify hidden issues early; accelerating R&D, de-risking clinical trials, and troubleshooting instabilities.

Delivering precise and comprehensive data across all particle sizes — from nanometres to microns — Lumero enables scientists to gain deeper insights, reduce development risks, and prevent costly failures.

Missed issues in R&D, such as unexpected large particles or aggregates, can be extremely costly at the trial or production stage leading to financial losses and reputational damage. Lumero’s unique ability to capture data from coexisting populations uncovers new insights that revitalise product development and accelerate innovation.

Ideal for use in both laboratories and production plants — get in touch to learn more and raise production efficiency through Lumero’s precise measurement.

Applications include:
Advanced Therapeutics – Measure PSD at every stage during formulation and process development to identify and solve issues before they become a problem.

Formulations – Measure PSD in complex suspensions without dilution.  Accelerate stability testing to identify failure within hours rather than weeks. Ensure ingredients are equivalent from batch to batch.

Process Analytic Technology – On-side analysis without dilution enable fast decisions enabling you to avoid product failure.

Die ETO GRUPPE ist seit 1948 eine wachstumsstarke, mittelständische Unternehmensgruppe mit Hauptsitz in Stockach am Bodensee und zählt zu den führenden Herstellern elektromagnetischer Antriebskomponenten, Sensoren und Elektroniken. Außerdem entwickelt die Gruppe Software für die Regelung und Steuerung hochdynamischer Abläufe in den Bereichen Mobilität, Fahrzeugtechnik, Industrieanlagen, Medizintechnik und Lebensmittelproduktion.

2.500 qualifizierte und engagierte Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter arbeiten weltweit für den Erfolg ihrer Kunden.

Name: InspectT B.V.
Description:
Characterizing the chemical structure and determining the size of molecules or particles in solution is essential in many industrial and academic applications. Optical spectroscopy is widely employed for chemical characterization, because it is easy to use and cost-effective. However, optical spectroscopy completely lacks size sensitivity, limiting its applicability and use when size matters. 

We have invented, validated and patented a new technology, Optical-DOSY, which adds size sensitivity to optical spectroscopy, in an affordable and accessible way. InspectT, an UvA's spin-off, developes and produces low-cost flow cells that fit in any existing spectrometer so that it can be used to perform Optical-DOSY, enabling not only to measure chemical structure but also to determine molecular or particle size.

In mid-2022, EIT 2.0 expanded its focus on UV measurement, avionics, and applied technology. Within these three pillars, there is strong emphasis on the product development part of our business – to develop technology that is useful for the benefit of society. For example, we work with healthcare facilities on a systematic methods to ensure the disinfection of patient rooms with the goal of reducing the rate of hospital acquired infections. Our ultraviolet measurement tools play a key role in lowering infection rates, lowering healthcare costs, and keeping people healthy. But this is just one area that we are working in; aviation electronics have become increasingly important because of the advent of increased air traffic and the use of electric powered aircraft. EIT 2.0’s talented engineers combine their knowledge to improve safety and innovate in many industries.

EIT 2.0 originated as a part of Electronic Instrumentation and Technology (EIT) which was founded in 1977. In July 2022, the EIT electronic manufacturing services (EMS) division was sold to the German company Zollner Elektronik AG, a top 15 EMS provider in the world, while continuing to provide EIT 2.0’s technical expertise to Zollner.

“EIT 2.0” reflects the vision of EIT’s founder, Mr. Joe May: a focus on strategic core competencies to drive innovative technologies and enable for greater flexibility as well as agility. The evolution to EIT 2.0 provides the operational focus to pursue specific market opportunities and better meet customer needs.

Description:
Anton Paar Group with headquarters in Graz, employs more than 4,600 people.

•	24 Asset Management GmbH buys, develops and lets real estate.
•	Anton Paar Sudhaus GmbH is an employee restaurant and a two-toque evening restaurant with a show brewery on the premises of Anton Paar in Graz.

Since 2003, the Anton Paar Group AG has been owned by the non-profit Santner Private Foundation with an exclusively charitable purpose.

The history of the company began in 1922 in Graz (Austria) as a one-man repair workshop with master locksmith Anton Paar. In the mid-1960s, Anton Paar began developing and producing scientific measuring instruments. At the turn of the millennium, the company was already the world market leader in the fields of density and concentration measurement of liquids, measurement of dissolved carbon dioxide in beverages and in rheology. 
Strong organic growth and strategic acquisitions created a globally active group of companies with a consolidated turnover of 653 million euros in 2024.

Name: Hummex Analytics X-ECD
Description:
Wir sind ein junges Unternehmen im Bereich der chemischen Analytik und die Erfinder des nicht-radioaktiven Elektroneneinfangdetektors X-ECD. Unsere Mission ist es, die Analysetechnologie sicherer, nachhaltiger und leistungsfähiger zu machen. Aktuell suchen wir Pilotpartner für die nächste Testphase und freuen uns über Austausch. Kontaktieren Sie uns gern für Kooperationen oder technische Einblicke.

Der Ursprung des X-ECD liegt dabei am Institut für Grundlagen der Elektrotechnik und Messtechnik der Leibniz Universität Hannover, wo wir an Spurengasdetektoren geforscht haben. Aus dieser Forschung als wissenschaftliche Mitarbeiter heraus haben wir den klassischen Elektroneneinfangdetektor neu gedacht und in eine moderne und nicht-radioaktive Variante überführt. Gefördert durch den EXIST Forschungstransfer konnten wir unsere Idee konsequent weiterentwickeln und befinden uns derzeit in der Pilotphase.

Was uns antreibt: Radioaktivität aus der Analytik zu entfernen – ohne Abstriche bei Präzision, Performance oder Integrationsfähigkeit.

Der X-ECD kommt vollständig ohne radioaktive Strahler aus, wodurch die Notwendigkeit von Strahlenschutzbeauftragten, Genehmigungen und umfangreichen Auflagen entfällt. Das reduziert nicht nur den administrativen Aufwand, sondern ermöglicht Unternehmen auch effizientere, flexiblere und nachhaltigere Arbeitsprozesse. Mit höchster Präzision detektiert der X-ECD Umweltgifte, Pestizide, FCKWs, PFAS sowie weitere halogenierte, nitrierte und schwefelhaltige Verbindungen. Dank echter Plug and Play Kompatibilität ersetzt er so herkömmliche radioaktive ECDs, ohne zusätzliche Infrastruktur oder Anpassungen. So gelingt der Umstieg auf moderne, sichere Detektionstechnologie reibungslos.

Dazu vereinen wir unsere Expertise in Elektrotechnik, Messtechnik und analytischer Chemie, um mit innovativen Lösungen neue Maßstäbe in der Detektortechnik zu setzen.

Name: UDAR
Description:
At UDAR, we’re tackling one of the world’s most overlooked and universal problems: invisible infrastructure. Hidden electrical systems, embedded utilities, unknown pipe networks, buried assets, and concealed structural elements cause billions in delays, hazards, compliance failures, strikes, and cost overruns across construction, utilities, energy, telecom, industrial operations, maintenance, and beyond. Every sector faces the same challenge: critical systems are hidden and current tools are slow, bulky, limited, and largely 2D, forcing teams to operate with uncertainty.

UDAR changes that.
Our next-generation handheld scanner delivers instant, on-device 3D insight through walls, floors, structures, and ground with sub-millimetre clarity and zero post-processing. Through advanced multi-sensor fusion, custom AI/ML algorithms, and real-time predictive analysis, UDar provides non-intrusive visibility into electrical systems, utilities, and critical infrastructure anywhere and anytime.

And this is just the beginning. We’re building the first real-time global intelligence layer for the world's hidden systems a living, dynamic 3D map that helps industries work safer, build faster, and eliminate costly guesswork.

The result: fewer incidents, fewer delays, smarter decisions, and a new global standard for seeing and understanding what has always been invisible.

Name: Innovative Measurement Technology Ltd
Description:
Since 1994, Innovative Measurement Technology has been a trusted provider of precision-engineered measurement instruments, supporting businesses of all sizes with reliable solutions worldwide.

As the UK home of Magnescale Co., Ltd. products and DIATEST precision bore measurement systems, we supply a comprehensive range of high-accuracy tools including gauging probes, DRO systems, linear scales, measurement computers and Rolling Mill instruments. We also provide custom in-process measurement solutions, digital columns, metrology software and encoders. Our portfolio includes an extensive selection of machine shop tools such as thread gauges, chamfer gauges and bore gauges, ensuring precision at every step.

We are proud to operate a Quality Management System assessed and certified to ISO 9001:2015, demonstrating our commitment to quality and excellence.

#metrology #measurement #quality #Magnescale #DIATEST #RollingMillInstruments

Name: Enterfix
Description:
A Enterfix é referência em tecnologia de medição e controle de qualidade dimensional. Desenvolvemos e integramos soluções avançadas de metrologia, automação e digitalização industrial, garantindo que cada produto fabricado alcance o mais alto padrão de precisão.

Nossa atuação abrange desde máquinas de medição óptica (VMM e scanners 3D) até sistemas de medição em processo, apalpadores CNC, softwares de análise metrológica e plataformas digitais que conectam dados de produção e qualidade em tempo real.

Com uma equipe técnica altamente qualificada e parcerias internacionais estratégicas, a Enterfix oferece soluções completas para laboratórios, linhas de produção e fabricantes de alta precisão, promovendo eficiência, rastreabilidade e competitividade.

Nosso compromisso é impulsionar a transformação da indústria, unindo inovação, engenharia e metrologia inteligente para garantir resultados consistentes, produtividade e qualidade em cada medição.
Location: São Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo

Name: Anton Paar Czech Republic & Slovakia

Jsme firma Anton Paar. Vyvíjíme, vyrábíme a distribuujeme vysoce přesné laboratorní přístroje a procesní měřicí systémy.

Name: UNIMETRO METROLOGY
Description:
Welcome to UNIMETRO Metrology: Precision Measuring Solutions Since 2008

UNIMETRO China, established in 2008, is your destination for precision. We are dedicated to delivering swift and accurate measuring solutions. As a trusted manufacturer, UNIMETRO specializes in cutting-edge 3D CMMs, optical image measuring instruments, tool inspection devices, microscopes, and inspection accessories.

Our core philosophy is "Based on China, Serving the World." With a global presence in over 20 countries, we've served 2,000+ satisfied customers across 150 diverse industries. Our partnerships with industry leaders like Renishaw, External Array, IDS, THK, Panasonic, and more, solidify our position as a pioneer in precision metrology.

At UNIMETRO, we embody precision and innovation. Our mission is to continually elevate manufacturing precision, shaping the future of the precision metrology industry. Choose UNIMETRO for limitless precision.

Name: Master Tools | Teste e Medição
Description:

Name: Combutec
Description:
Combustión Tecnológica del Gas S.L. se fundó poco a poco y con mucho esfuerzo en el año 2010. 

Somos una empresa de suministros con cuatro líneas principales de negocio: accesorios de gas, calefacción y climatización; equipos portátiles de medida; control y regulación HVAC; e instrumentación industrial.

A día de hoy hemos conseguido ser distribuidores de las mejores marcas del mercado como Instrumentos Testo, CS Instruments, Siemens, Johnson Controls, Airzone, Wilo, etc. Pero si hay algo que nos hace estar orgullosos es nuestro Kit de Toma de Muestras para calderas estancas y de condensación. Name: Scanmatic
Description: We supply our customers with reliable technology products and -solutions for demanding environments. We have developed quality solutions since 1971, and serve customers within the Renewables, Environment, Intelligent Traffic Systems, Offshore and Defence segments.

Name: BD|SENSORS GmbH
Description:
BD|SENSORS is an internationally successful company that manufactures electronic measurement technology for monitoring pressure and fill levels. Founded in 1995 as a start-up company with three people, we focussed on one area right from the start and we know it better than anyone else: 
ELECTRONIC PRESSURE MEASUREMENT TECHNOLOGY 
With a consistent strategy focussing on products and quality, the BD|SENSORS Group has succeeded in becoming one of the most innovative providers of electronic pressure measurement technology and fill level measurement technology for industrial applications just under 25 years after its foundation. The company has also established itself as THE problem solver in the industry, providing both standard products and variants that are designed together with and for customers. 
Today, the Group employs around 300 employees in its four locations in Germany, the Czech Republic, Russia and China.

Name: MOBILTEX Abriox
Description:
MOBILTEX is headquartered in Calgary, Alberta, Canada, and is proud to serve hundreds of industrial, municipal, and commercial customers around the globe — delivering innovative field and cloud-connected AI and ML technologies that ensure significant operational, safety, and sustainability benefits to Energy, Water Utilities, and Critical Infrastructure operations. 

Abriox [a MOBILTEX brand] is a global leader in measurement and monitoring solutions for gas and energy utilities, offering cutting-edge technologies designed to meet the evolving needs of the industry. With a focus on customer satisfaction, we deliver robust, reliable solutions emphasizing quality, accuracy, safety, and performance. Our innovative platforms transform data management for natural gas utilities, streamlining operations and supporting operational excellence, system integrity and reducing fugitive emissions.

With decades of expertise, Abriox specializes in battery-powered data logging, meter reading, and pressure control products for utilities worldwide. Our success stems from continuous collaboration with users, pioneering new technologies, and maintaining unparalleled product and service standards.

We’ve also worked very hard to earn our reputation as the best service team in the industry. Our dedicated group of technical support specialists is here to assist at every step as our customers connect, collect, analyze, manage and take action on field data measurements from critical infrastructure assets. Our international field support team is comprised of multi-disciplined, industry-certified engineers who deliver on our commitments with efficient and cost-effective support.

Name: NUsense
Description:
Our mission is to democratize the use of radar for different sectors such as security, traffic management, navigation for drones, robotics or medical.
With our team of experts, let's mmWave together.

Name: Tra-Cal
Description:
Tra-Cal is a leading ISO-17025 accredited calibration lab serving 200+ customers including NASA, the DoD, Research Institutions, Satellite and Telecommunications providers, Life Sciences Companies, and the Transportation and Electronics industries. 

Tra-Cal calibrates, repairs, sells, and leases test & measurement equipment. The company has one of the largest and most diverse scopes of accreditation in the industry with a particular emphasis on high frequency RF/Microwave equipment (up to 50 GHz). Tra-Cal is an authorized small business partner with Keysight Technologies and services equipment from all major Test & Measurement OEM's.

Tra-Cal offers on-site, pickup and delivery, and expedited calibration service. The company is proudly veteran-owned and operated.

Name: Siko Italia | Sensori E Sistemi Di Misura Per Automazione Industriale
Description:
Benvenuti nel mondo Siko, un'azienda con oltre 60 anni di esperienza nella fornitura di sensori e sistemi di misura per l'automazione.

 Siamo specializzati in soluzioni per il cambio formato per ottimizzare i processi produttivi nelle macchine di produzione tramite indicatori di posizione meccanici, elettronici, indicatori gravitazionali e posizionatori automatizzati su bus di campo.

 Offriamo anche sensori di posizione di alta qualità per il monitoraggio del movimento dei cilindri idraulici, grazie ai nostri trasduttori a filo lineari compatti con corse fino a 5000mm e interfacce analogiche CANopen o SAE J1939 e versioni safety e ridondanti che garantiscono un monitoraggio affidabile e sicuro.

 Forniamo soluzioni per le macchine mobili, agricole, gru e piattaforme aeree per la rilevazione della posizione, velocità e inclinazione. La nostra ampia scelta di inclinometri statici e dinamici, encoder incrementali, encoder assoluti, encoder a filo con Omologazione E1 e sensori sicuri per impieghi fino al Performance Level d (PLd) e svariate interfacce come CANopen, CANopen Safety e SAE J1939, oppure le classiche interfacce analogiche corrente e tensione, ci permettono di offrire soluzioni personalizzate e di alta qualità.

 Inoltre, offriamo soluzioni per il rilevamento della posizione lineare ed angolare tramite sistema senza contatto con tecnica di misura magnetica, grazie ai nostri sensori encoder magnetici, banda magnetica, anelli magnetici ad alta precisione, sistemi assoluti e incrementali.

 Siko è la scelta ideale per le aziende che desiderano soluzioni di automazione affidabili, sicure e di alta qualità per ottimizzare i propri processi produttivi. La nostra attenzione al cliente ci permette di fornire una consulenza a 360° per individuare la soluzione migliore in base alle esigenze applicative. Siamo concentrati sulla cura del rapporto con il cliente, sull'ascolto e sulla comprensione delle loro esigenze.

Name: Klepsan | Vana ve Ölçü Aletleri – Valves & Meters
Description:
1970’te İstanbul’da kurulan KLEPSAN, 15.000 m² kapalı alana sahip modern tesisinde; sıhhi tesisat ürünleri, vanalar, musluklar, ısıtma ekipmanları, pirinç bağlantı parçaları ve GG25–GG40 sfero dökümden mamul ürünler üretmektedir.
Konut, sanayi ve tarımsal kullanım için su sayaçları üretmekte olup, çok yakında akıllı sayaçlar da ürün gamına katılacaktır.
Külçeden nihai ürüne kadar tüm süreci bünyesinde gerçekleştiren KLEPSAN, 50’den fazla ülkeye ihracat yapan sektör lideridir.


Founded in 1970 in Istanbul, KLEPSAN manufactures plumbing products, valves, faucets, heating components, brass parts, and GG25–GG40 ductile cast items in its 15,000 m² facility.
We produce residential, industrial, and agricultural water meters — and will soon add smart meters to our range.
With full in-house production from raw brass to finished product, KLEPSAN is an industry leader exporting to over 50 countries.


تأسست KLEPSAN في عام 1970 في إسطنبول، وتنتج تجهيزات السباكة، الصمامات، الخلاطات، مكونات التدفئة، والنحاسيات ومنتجات GG25–GG40 بمصنعها الحديث بمساحة 15000 م².
نُصنع عدادات مياه للسكن، الصناعة والزراعة، وسنضيف قريبًا عدادات ذكية.
KLEPSAN شركة رائدة تُصدر لأكثر من 50 دولة بإنتاج متكامل داخليًا.

TSE, TSEK, GHOST, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 17020, ISO 17025, MID, CE, WRAS

The solutions offered range from software for creating feasibility studies and route finding to systems for as-built surveys and system solutions for machine control and track surveying for construction and maintenance. 

As Trimble Railway GmbH, we offer system solutions for a wide range of applications based on the Trimble GEDO platform. Our systems are used in planning, construction and maintenance. For special projects and requirements we develop customer-specific solutions in cooperation with users. Name: Klaric GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
PRECISION IS OUR PASSION
E-mobility moves the world like never before. The automotive industry is at a crossroads and we see ourselves as experts in this development. Since our foundation in 1992, we have been developing and offering precision measuring and testing technology for industry, mainly in the automotive sector. 

We are aware: Electronics must function perfectly. This is what the performance of highly qualified engineers stands for. But it is only when testing and verifying that it becomes clear how well electronics serve their purpose. Whether high-frequency or slow measurements, whether high-voltage or low-voltage - our solutions are freely configurable and can be used for any type of measurement of electrical power, currents, voltages and temperatures in technical devices. What matters in the end: The result.

WE ARE WHERE OUR CUSTOMERS ARE
Klaric measurement & testing is represented internationally. Talk to our sales partners in Europe, USA and Asia.

Name: Mvit Technology
Description: MVIT TECHNOLOGY is engaged in the research, development, production, and sales of modular test and measurement instruments, microwave solid-state power amplifiers, and specialized test systems. Its current main products are modular instruments based on PXI, broadband power amplifiers, and emiconductor device testing systems. The company specializes in the field of RF chip testing, focusing on core technologies and product development such as RF broadband signal transmission and reception, high-speed, high-precision data acquisition, RF power amplification, and cloud-based testing control platforms. It provides independent and controllable comprehensive backend testing solutions for RF chips, modules, and micro-systems in terminal device.

Name: messwelk GmbH
Description: At messwelk, you benefit from comprehensive expertise in industrial production metrology. We offer the manufacture and sale of measuring and testing equipment, metrological consulting, DAkkS and ISO calibration services as well as a measuring equipment repair service.

Name: Equipment Force
Description:
Founded in 2018, a B2B solutions provider of products to build, maintain, repair or operate a facility, at Equipment Force we believe in going beyond just "selling" a product, but ensuring that we offer you an end-to-end solution. Ours is a holistic approach, from evaluating customer needs through to on-site deployment, we partner with you ensuring that you "Quality Is the Best Business Plan”

 

With 3 Locations in the Kingdom Of Saudi Arabia & Bahrain, equipped with dedicated sales staff, stock, a fleet of delivery vehicles and an established supply chain, we are well positioned to meet your industrial supply requirements throughout KSA & Bahrain

 

We offer a range of high quality innovative brands that represent the best in each of our product categories. Most of these brands have a strong legacy of innovation some of which continues for over a 100 years. These brands are leaders in their respective product category and help our customers tirelessly "Quality Is the Best Business Plan ".

 

Businesses and institutions depend on us every day as a source of tools, abrasives, material handling, safety and other equipment. We have thus obtained a reputation as a vendor of choice so that our clients can focus on their core business.

Name: ARVE
Description:
Breathe with confidence with ARVE.

ARVE is a Swiss-engineered indoor air quality system that empowers you to see and control the air you breathe. By monitoring pollutants and improving air quality, ARVE helps families, health-conscious individuals, and organizations create cleaner, safer, and more productive environments.

Whether you want to reduce allergens, support respiratory health, or simply elevate well-being, ARVE ensures every breath counts. Make the smart choice for your home or workspace—experience the difference with ARVE.

Name: RHEINTACHO Messtechnik GmbH
Description:
RHEINTACHO Messtechnik GmbH is a company with longstanding tradition and has been engaged for over 124 years in the field of rotational speed, a crucial control quantity for mechanical processes. 
Just over 90 employees are employed at the company’s headquarters in Freiburg. 

In-house product development, production and assembly departments guarantee quick and innovative solutions to customers’ individual requirements. 

The production range incorporates a wide range of solutions of a high technical quality, principally in the field of rotational speed: sensors, hand-held measuring devices, rotary encoders and switching devices. 

RHEINTACHO UK Ltd, a subsidiary of the German company RHEINTACHO Messtechnik GmbH, is specialized in the production of non-electronic measurement and indication instruments as well as tacho generators, and acts as a sales and service center for the UK and Ireland.

We are Novasina.

Name: HTINSTRUMENTS_SL
Description:
HT INSTRUMENTS es diferente
La flexibilidad, el trato directo, la receptividad típica de una empresa de medias dimensiones permiten a nuestros clientes acceder directamente al proceso de decisión, determinar la evolución, dirigir activamente nuestros esfuerzos, siempre atentos a la plena satisfacción de las exigencias del mercado. Presentes en muchos países del mundo, somos capaces de ofrecer a nuestros clientes una combinación única de atención personal y experiencia internacional. HT INSTRUMENTS, guiada por un equipo joven y dinámico, ha construido con solidez su propia reputación basada en la calidad del producto y en el servio al cliente, convirtiéndose en poco tiempo en un líder del mercado en Europa.
Productos y servicios
Nos hemos propuesto como objetivo dar un servicio y un soporte que supere las expectativas de nuestros clientes. Nuestra gama de productos, una de las mejores y más completas, se actualiza, amplía y mejora constantemente. Ofrecemos además una serie de servicios dirigidos a la formación y al mantenimiento. Dentro de las iniciativas más recientes, la organización de seminarios técnicos, ideados para abarcar un amplio grupo de argumento, desde las normativas en vigor al correcto uso de los instrumentos (para aprovechar al máximo las características y entender como obtener las mayores ventajas).
Calidad y certificación
Nosotros sabemos que de la fiabilidad de nuestros productos depende la seguridad y la eficiencia de las instalaciones de nuestros clientes. Nuestras inversiones sobre la calidad han sido premiadas con la obtención de la certificación ISO9001. Todos nuestros instrumentos de verificación poseen el certificado de calibración obtenido con instrumentos patrón certificados con trazabilidad homóloga, ENAC, SIT, etc.
HT INSTRUMENTS reforzará aun más el papel de líder en el campo de la instrumentación de verificación. Trabajando en equipo con nuestros clientes, sabremos desarrollar soluciones innovadoras y altamente tecnológicas.

Name: COMETEC
Description:
COMETEC vous propose une large gamme d’appareils de mesure portables ou fixes pour l’assainissement, l’eau potable, les rivières, nappes phréatiques, environnement, et les réseaux :
• Canaux de comptage
• Débitmètrie sans contact & immergé pour l'assainissement
• Débitmètrie sur conduite en charge en eau potable -> sonde multipoint unique
• Mesure de vitesse / niveau
• Analyseurs portables
• Analyses en ligne
• Contrôle métrologique

Créée en 1989 COMETEC SA s’est imposée dans le milieu de l’instrumentation des eaux grâce à :
• Sa vocation de proposer des équipements innovants,
• Son rôle de conseil auprès de sa clientèle, assurant une garantie de vente en adéquation avec ses besoins.
• La mise en place dès la création d’un service technique équipé d’un banc hydraulique.

COMETEC c’est surtout un service fort d’une grande expérience dans l’instrumentation des eaux. L’entreprise s’est construite autour de produits innovants et d’une expertise, d’une disponibilité et d’une excellente réactivité. Parce que le mot « service » n’est pas pour nous un argument commercial, mais une philosophie, nous sommes à votre écoute pour répondre à vos attentes et problématiques de mesure et d’analyses.

Name: ZAHNER Scientific Instruments
Description:
Since 1976, the German company ZAHNER-elektrik is developing and manufacturing innovative high-precision instruments such as electrochemical workstations, potentiostats, and galvanostats for all kinds of electrochemical applications. Throughout these years Zahner instruments have developed to be the first choice for laboratory equipment in many areas of university and industry research. Our multi-disciplinary team of developers is always in contact with users and at the same time at the front line of technology. All Zahner instruments are completely "Made in Germany". We give great importance to precise manufacturing, thorough testing and accurate calibration of all instruments before they leave our factory.

ZAHNER instruments are highly esteemed for their high flexibility, reliability, and performance. Furthermore, with its experienced specialists, ZAHNER is known to provide an exemplary service before and after sale, an individual, application-specific consultation, and - above all - practical support for setting up an experiment.

Our experience can help you from start to analysis to get the most out of your experiments.

We are looking forward to welcome you in the worldwide community of Zahner users.

Door mee te groeien met de technologische ontwikkelingen en de kennis op hoog niveau te houden, blijven wij expert op het gebied van gebouwautomatisering en gebouwmanagement. Als technisch specialist brengen wij onze expertise in om samen tot een maximaal resultaat te komen, in de breedste zin van het woord. 

SAUTER Nederland heeft de expertise om als systeemintegrator een belangrijke bijdrage te leveren aan ontwerp, realisatie en exploitatie. Enerzijds vanuit de kennis van gebouwautomatisering en gebouwbeheer. Name: Inline Process Solutions

Name: Zygo Germany
Description:
AMETEK Germany GmbH, BU ZYGO is the European office of ZYGO Corporation, worldwide supplier of optical metrology instruments, high precision optical components and complex electro-optical systems, designs and manufacturing services. ZYGO's high-precision noncontact metrology systems use optical interferometry to measure displacement, surface figure, and optical wavefront for yield improvement initiatives in the flat panel display, semiconductor, and industrial markets.

Our Metrology business segment is comprised of three major groups: optical surface profilers, laser interferometers, and stage position metrology. The products and systems produced by these groups use various optical techniques for measuring displacement, surface shape, and texture. Applications for our metrology products are diverse, and include precision machining, optical manufacturing, and semiconductor manufacturing, as well as many others.

Our Optics business segment is comprised of two major groups: Electro-Optics and Optical Components. These groups leverage ZYGO's expertise in optical design and assembly, and high-volume manufacturing of precision optical components and systems, for aerospace, defense, medical, and industrial applications.

It is the world leader in the measurement of density, concentration and CO2 and in the field of rheometry. Anton Paar GmbH is owned by the charitable Santner Foundation.

Over 4500 employees at the headquarters in Graz and the 39 sales subsidiaries worldwide ensure that Anton Paar products live up to their excellent reputation. The core competence of Anton Paar – high-precision production – and close contact to the scientific community form the basis for the quality of Anton Paar’s instruments.

Name: BERTHOLD FRANCE SAS
Description:
Berthold France est la première filiale du groupe Berthold Technologies a être crée en 1965. Elle est située à Thoiry, une petite ville en bordure du parc régional de la vallée de Cheuvreuse, à l'ouest de Paris. Elle commercialise les produits et services des 3 divisions, Process Control, Radioprotection et Bio-analyses en France et sur le continent africain.

La division Process Control commercialise des appareils de mesure et d’analyse utilisés dans de nombreux procédés industriels, tels que la pétrochimie, la métallurgie, l’industrie agro-alimentaire, l’industrie du bois & papetière, l’industrie pharmaceutique, l’environnement & le recyclage, les matériaux de construction, etc :

- Mesure de niveau et alarme de niveau
- Mesure de séparation par batch de deux phases liquides
- Mesure de densité ou de concentration
- Mesure de turbidité
- Détection de mousse
- Mesure d'humidité, de teneur en eau, et de matière  sèche
- Mesure de débit et pesage
- Analyseur pour teneur en huile, en gras, en alcool et en protéines
- Mesure d'émissions de poussières ou particules 
- Protection contre les départs de feu et risques d'explosion de poussière
- Portique de détection de la radioactivité
- Mesure de vitesse et de distance
- Systèmes de mesure pour l’industrie du panneau bois

La division Radioprotection commercialise des appareils de mesure de la contamination, de contrôle de l’irradiation et de comptage en laboratoire utilisés dans le domaine de la recherche nucléaire, de la production d’isotopes, dans l’environnement ainsi que dans le domaine hospitalier.

La division Bio-analyses commercialise des lecteurs et laveurs de microplaques, luminomètres à tubes, station ELISA, spectrophotomètre micro-volume, lecteur label free microarray, détecteurs radio-HPLC, compteur gamma, systèmes d'imagerie in-vivo.

Name: nevolab GmbH
Description:
nevoLab GmbH is a German company dedicated to the sciences, with over 20 years of experience in bench-top lab equipment for R&D labs in the fields of Chemistry, Drug Discovery, Screening, Optimization, Life Sciences, and Biotechnologies.
In addition to the continuous development and manufacture of the Xelsius reaction workstation, nevoLab GmbH provides expertise in parallel synthesis, process development, reaction optimization, solubility studies, photochemistry, electrochemical synthesis, and crystallization experiments. 
nevoLab is a family-owned company established and managed by Dipl. Ing. Martin Metzger, the current General Manager. He drives nevoLab forward by offering new developments using the most advanced and innovative technologies.

Name: HGL Dynamics
Description:
HGL Dynamics is a world-leading developer of high-specification dynamic data acquisition, analysis, and storage systems for industrial and engineering applications, particularly turbines and rotating equipment. We can provide a full service from supply of individual system components through to the commissioning of complete turnkey solutions. HGL Dynamics is an ISO 9001:2008 registered company in the UK.

From ultra-portable to rack mounted Data Acquisition Systems, through targeted simple-to-use monitoring and analysis software, to high-performance low cost of ownership data management systems; HGL Dynamics provides truly integrated solutions for your measurement needs.

The flexibility of our product range, our use of COTS equipment, and our approach of treating clients as partners has helped our customers to achieve their goals of reduced testing times, faster access to results, and improved accuracy over older methods.

We specialise in the continuous recording of measurement data from analogue or digital sources to disk, with automatic simultaneous archival to long-term storage. Our automatic server-based analysis systems and interactive desktop applications provide an intuitive link into the data hierarchy, allowing rapid access to data sets and fast extraction of summary information.

Name: SCHENCK Italia Srl
Description:
Schenck Italia Srl è la sede italiana del noto costruttore tedesco di macchine equilibratrici, spin test e strumenti portatili. In Italia dal 1971, ci occupiamo della vendita e assistenza dei prodotti Schenck oltre ad offrire servizi conto terzi, training e corsi. Dal 2002 facciamo parte del gruppo multinazionale Dürr.

Con oltre 100 anni di storia, Schenck è leader mondiale indiscusso e fornitore premium dei settori automotive, aviazione e aerospazio, oltre all’oil & gas, energia e diverse applicazioni industriali. I nostri prodotti e servizi comprendono:
•	Macchine equilibratrici manuali e automatiche
•	Macchine di spin test per produzione e R&D
•	Bilance pesa momento per la determinazione di massa e centro di gravità
•	Strumenti portatili per l’equilibratura e l’analisi delle vibrazioni
•	Servizi conto terzi di equilibratura e spin-test
•	Servizi conto terzi di Design For Manufacturing (DFM) del rotore
•	Certificazione di rotori master con tracciabilità della catena di misura (unico rotore campione al mondo)
•	Studi di stima dello squilibrio teorico del rotore “unbalance budget”
•	Simulazioni statistiche del processo d’equilibratura del rotore
•	Test e relazioni diagnostiche delle deformazioni elastiche e plastiche del rotore
•	Corsi online o in presenza di teoria e tecnica dell’equilibratura
Negli ultimi anni sono state inoltre sviluppate soluzioni specifiche per soddisfare le esigenze dell’elettrificazione dei veicoli (eMobility) con l’obiettivo di aiutare i produttori di motori elettrici a velocizzare le operazioni di R&D e lancio in produzione dei rotori.

Contattaci per saperne di più schenck.italia@sit.schenck.net

Grande rilevanza rivestono anche i servizi offerti a corredo tutti orientati all'ottenimento della piena soddisfazione del cliente, nostro punto di partenza e obiettivo finale. Name: ZAITRUS
Description:
ZAITRUS is the new name of our previous startup MYTRA. We are a GreenTech start-up in the field of microplastics. We have made it our mission to tackle one of the biggest environmental risks of our time.

Our solution consists of a sensor system for the detection and analysis of particles in real time using the flow-through principle. Using impedance spectroscopy in combination with AI algorithms also eliminates the need for complex processing required by current optical methods. ZAITRUS thus redefines the state of the art and enables a standardized method for the analysis and monitoring of microplastics.

Name: Ionoptika Ltd
Description:
As specialists in Ion Beam Technology, we constantly strive to deliver new and innovative technologies to power the discoveries of tomorrow. 
Established in 1994, Ionoptika are one of the leading providers of high-performance ion beam technologies for surface analysis and nanofabrication applications, and are the experts in cluster ion beams for secondary ion mass spectrometry (SIMS). Our unique water cluster beam is at the cutting edge of Mass Spec Imaging, enabling discovery in drug discovery, lipidomics, multi-omics and materials research.

We are also known as the developers of the Q-One,  a state-of-the-art tool for deterministic single ion implantation with nanoscale precision.  Featuring a host of powerful features, the Q-One is the most advanced system for fabrication of quantum devices and advanced materials engineering.

Our product range extends from instrumentation, to individual ion beam systems, components, and accessories.

We actively encourage collaboration, and are proud to have worked with some of the brightest minds in the scientific community. If you have a project in mind that we might be able to help with, we’d be delighted to hear from you.

Since founding the company in 1976 our employees’ commitment and our ever increasing expertise have aided turning us into a global leader in special instrumentation technology.
