Our commitment is to deliver innovative technology that makes a real difference to the safety of human life, preservation of the environment and true asset management. This commitment sets us apart and makes us, Vallen Systeme, The Acoustic Emission Company.

The company operates in the world’s growing market of Acoustic Emission (AE) test equipment and its demanding applications. For more than 30 years Vallen Systeme provides continuously advanced technology, develops and manufactures state-of-the art AE-System solutions, accessories and software. Our international customers are AE Inspection Services Companies, R & D Laboratories, Industrial Development Groups, Academia, and QA/QC Departments throughout the industries of Aerospace, Oil & Gas, Automotive, Power Generation and Distribution, Medical and the Military.

We see ourselves as partner of our customers through a deep understanding of their demands. Our success is based and secured by focusing on the long-term success of our customers. Dedication to service, reliability and performance results in more than 600 satisfied customers in over 50 countries around the globe. Our success is compounded by technical and sales representatives around the world who work directly with our client base.

Name: Technische Alternative RT GmbH
Description:
Überall dort, wo ein Systemregler nicht mehr ausreicht oder mehr Flexibilität gefragt ist, kommen die frei programmierbaren Universalregler der TA zum Einsatz.

Hybridheizungen, Kaskadenregelungen oder die Nutzung von PV-Überschuss für Heizstäbe, Wärmepumpe und Wallbox. Die Technische Alternative entwickelt und produziert alles, was es dafür braucht. Regler, Smart Meter und Erweiterungen. Sensoren, Pumpengruppen, Heizstäbe und das gesamte Softwarepaket – alles wird im Haus entwickelt und produziert.

Was 1989 in einer Werkstatt in einem kleinen Dorf begann, ist heute eine bekannte Marke im Bereich der Gebäudeautomation.

Die TA wird von Kunden auf der ganzen Welt geschätzt, insbesondere für die Flexibilität, Zuverlässigkeit und Langlebigkeit der Geräte. Die hauseigene Supportabteilung und der Reparaturservice sind der Beweis für Kundennähe und das ehrliche Streben nach Nachhaltigkeit. Made in Austria. Aus Überzeugung.

Name: EvoMesure SAS
Description:
EvoMesure, the exclusive supplier of electrical and temperature metrology instruments, pressure scanners, and flow measurement systems, delivers measurement solutions across a wide range of sectors including Aerospace, Wind Tunnel Testing, Wind Energy, Motorsport, Avionics, R&D, Defense, and Higher Education.

Through strong partnerships with Scanivalve, Guildline Instruments, EvoScann, Vectoflow, and DMA, EvoMesure offers a portfolio of high-technology products, including:
 High-frequency pressure and temperature scanners
 Miniature pressure scanners
 Aerodynamic test benches and automatic calibration systems
 Electrical and temperature reference instruments
 Pitot-static test benches for all types of aircraft
 Design and delivery of unique turnkey solutions, covering engineering, design, manufacturing, delivery, commissioning, training, and ongoing support.

EvoMesure stands for excellence in pressure and temperature measurement for fluid mechanics, combined with advanced electrical metrology expertise.

Name: MOBILTEX FloPath
Description:
MOBILTEX [an XPV Water Partners company] is headquartered in Calgary, Alberta, Canada, and is proud to serve hundreds of industrial, municipal, and commercial customers around the globe — delivering innovative field and cloud-connected AI and ML technologies that ensure significant operational, safety, and sustainability benefits to Energy, Water Utilities, and Critical Infrastructure operations. 

FloPath [a MOBILTEX brand] leverages a team of technical instrumentation engineering experts within the pressurized pipeline monitoring space to design and develop a wide range of robust and innovative field solutions including flow, pressure, and transients data loggers and advanced pressure management controllers to help reduce non-revenue water loss and pipeline leakage. 

Over 40 years of remote and field monitoring innovation, over 200 major organizations across North America and around the globe, and several hundred thousand miles of pipeline assets protected – since 1985 MOBILTEX has been engineering innovative remote monitoring products designed for extreme applications including municipal water & utilities, oil & gas, and power generation. Our customer base represents some of the largest industrial operations in the world – FloPath solutions have earned their TRUST to ensure mission-critical assets are protected.

We’ve also worked very hard to earn our reputation as the best service team in the industry. Our dedicated group of technical support specialists is here to assist at every step as our customers connect, collect, analyze, manage and take action on field data measurements from critical infrastructure assets. Our international field support team is comprised of multi-disciplined, industry-certified engineers who deliver on our commitments with efficient and cost-effective support.

Name: Anton Paar Croatia
Description: Anton Paar razvija, proizvodi i distribuira laboratorijske instrumente i sustave za procesna mjerenja velike preciznosti te pruža prilagođena rješenja na području automatizacije i robotike. Svjetski je predvodnik u mjerenju gustoće, koncentracije i CO2 te na polju reometrije. Vlasnik tvrtke Anton Paar GmbH dobrotvorna je zaklada Santner.

Name: SİRİUS SENSÖR ELEKTRONİK OTOMASYON SAN. VE TİC. LTD. ŞTİ.
Description:
Tarihte buhar gücü, elektrik enerjisi ve sanayi devrimlerinden sonra, dijitalleşme ile gerçekleşen 4. Endüstri Devrimi ile birlikte akıllı makineler, tamamen internet üzerinden kontrol edilebilen prosesler üretimin olmazsa olmazı haline geldi.
Sirius Sensör de hızla gelişen yeni teknolojilerin en üst seviyede uygulandığı endüstrilere yönelik hizmetler sunarak üretim kalitelerini arttıran, kendini sürekli geliştiren, yenilikçi ve sorumluluk taşıyan vizyoner ruhuyla 2019 yılında kurulmuştur.


Farklı şirketlerde 15 yılı aşkın süredir elektronik sensörler konusunda müşterilerimize çözümler sunduk. Geldiğimiz noktada ürün çeşitliliğimizi arttırmak ve hizmet verdiğimiz alanları genişletmek amacıyla yola çıktık. Günümüz şartlarında internet üzerinden dilediğimiz her ürüne ulaşabiliyoruz fakat kullanacağımız ürünün hangi şartlarda çalışacağına, hassasiyetlerine ve hangi verileri sağlayacağına karar vermek bize hem zaman kaybettirmekte hem de yanlış yapılan bir tercih işletmemize maddi zararlar verebilmektedir. İşte bu noktada müşterilerimize daha projelerinin en başında, bir ürünü alırken kazanç sağlayacakları alternatifleri sunmaktayız.

Name: TPS
Description:
We design and manufacture instruments to measure water quality. 

Proudly Australian since 1968, we've been trailblazing wet chemistry instrumentation for 58 years and counting.

Specialising in a range of top-quality measurement devices for water parameters such as pH, DO, ORP, EC, Tubidity, and more - we strive to provide the best equipment possible for the lab, field, and beyond. 

TPS is more than a manufacturer; we're the mates you call when water quality matters. When you choose us, you're investing in a commitment to excellence. 

From industry-leading training to unparalleled product servicing, we're with you every step of the way, ensuring you get the job done right.

Follow us to keep up-to-date with all things water quality and receive sneak peeks for new product launches!

Name: HybridOX Automation LLP
Description:
At HybridOX Automation LLP. (Formerly HybridOX Automation UK Ltd.), we take pride in engineering high-performance control valves that blend safety, precision, and durability. With a deep-rooted commitment to technological innovation and engineering excellence, we deliver cutting-edge solutions that meet the most stringent IBR and Non-IBR industry standards.
 
Our products are designed to enhance operational efficiency, reduce downtime, and ensure long-term reliability. Whether you need precision flow control for oil & gas, power plants, chemical processing, or manufacturing, HybridOX Automation LLP. provides tailor-made solutions that exceed expectations.

Name: ACOEM D-A-CH
Description:
Bei ACOEM schaffen wir eine Welt der Möglichkeiten. Wir helfen Organisationen, das richtige Gleichgewicht zwischen Fortschritt und Erhaltung zu finden. Wir helfen Unternehmen und Vermögenswerte zu schützen, Chancen zu maximieren und gleichzeitig die Ressourcen unserer Erde zu schonen. Wir bieten flexible KI-gestützte Sensoren und Systemlösungen die unsere Kunden in die Lage versetzen,  Entscheidungen auf der Grundlage der richtigen Informationen zu treffen.
Zusammen mit 150 Vertriebspartnern arbeiten unsere über 800 Mitarbeiter in 27 Niederlassungen, 5 Produktionsstätten und 3 F&E-Zentren in 11 Ländern, um unseren Kunden weltweit zuverlässige, ganzheitliche Systemlösungen zu bieten.
Acoem verbindet Möglichkeiten mit Schutz und Sicherheit. 
Für weitere Informationen besuchen Sie acoem.com.

Die ACOEM GmbH ist eine 100%ige Tochter der ACOEM Group, die ihren Hauptsitz in Lyon / Frankreich hat. Unter dem Dach der ACOEM Gruppe werden die Marken 01dB, ECOTECH, ONEPROD, FIXTURLASER, TUNNEL SENSORS, DYNOPTIC SYSTEMS, MEAX, MET ONE INSTRUMENTS und METRAVIB vereint.


Die ACOEM Gruppe
Auswirkungen auf die Umwelt reduzieren
Die Welt von heute verändert sich schnell und die Umwelt  wird immer stärker belastet. Die ACOEM Gruppe steht für eine nachhaltige Entwicklung und hilft Unternehmen und staatlichen Organisationen mit Produkten und Dienstleistungen negative Einflüsse auf die Umwelt zu reduzieren.
•	Begrenzung und/oder Verhinderung von Verschmutzung der Umwelt durch Abgase, Lärm und Schwingungen
•	Produktivität und Zuverlässigkeit von Maschinenparks erhöhen
•	Einen Beitrag zur Entwicklung von geräuschärmeren, robusteren  und besseren Produkten  leisten
•	Schutz von Menschen, Orten und Fahrzeugen bei Militäreinsätzen

Akkreditierungen der Acoem Gruppe: 
DIN EN ISO 45001
DIN EN ISO 9001
DIN EN ISO/IEC 17025

Name: EngDelta Instrumentação
Description:
A empresa dedica-se ao fornecimento de instrumentos industriais, 
equipamentos e serviços, em cobertura regional RN, CE, PI e MA tendo como parceiros fabricantes reconhecidos mundialmente pela qualidade de seus equipamentos.

Missão
Oferecer aos nossos clientes a melhor opção técnica e comercial, aos nossos fornecedores transparência e lealdade na relação de parceria e à todos, o comprometimento com a sustentabilidade do negócio.

Name: CLAUSS Pesage
Description:
Qui sommes-nous ? 
Des spécialistes en pesage embarqué, distributeur exclusif pour la France et les DOM-TOM des produits de la gamme LOADRITE .

Notre mission ?
Optimiser la gestion et le suivi de votre carrière à chaque étape : extraction, production et la commercialisation. 
Tous nos outils communiquent en temps réel vers notre plateforme de reporting INSIGHT HQ afin de vous fournir des tableaux de bord complets et des rapports nécessaires au suivi votre production.

Notre gamme ?
Monitoring sur dumpers, pesage sur convoyeurs, pesage embarqué sur pelles et chargeuses, ces outils peuvent être connectés sur notre plateforme de reporting INSIGHT HQ.

Name: Carmelec
Description: Conception, fabrication , maintenance et réparation de solutions de mesure dans les domaines de la radioprotection, Contrôle Non Destructif, Génie Civil et Environnement

Name: Anton Paar OptoTec GmbH
Description: Anton Paar OptoTec GmbH is part of the Anton Paar Group with more than 4,500 employees worldwide. We develop, manufacture and support analytical instruments for industry quality control and development, academic research and government labs. Our #refractometers, #polarimeters and #Raman spectrometers are renown for quality, precision and ease of use. Many large players in pharmaceuticals trust in our compliant analytics and data management solutions.

Name: FLEXBOOL - The Open Source PLC
Description:
FLEXBOOL is an open source, free of license limitations, industrial-grade PLC family, based on ESP32 MCU and fully compatible with Arduino IDE. With its excellent communication capabilities and wide I/O standards support, the FLEXBOOL PLC can operate as a complete stand-alone system, as well as a part of another system. It allows easy building of control and monitoring systems where the reliable measurements and control abilities can be easily combined with an impressive user interface. 

The CASE STUDY chapter on our website, provides many free code examples, including integration with touch screen displays, SD Card hosted web server, Modbus & MQTT communication based interfaces such as NodeRED, Grafana, Iridium, and others.

Name: MT9 Automation LLP
Description:
MT9 Automation LLP is a leading supplier of industrial sensors, transmitters, instrumentation, and automation components for HVAC, pharmaceutical, cleanroom, OEM, laboratory, and process industry applications. We specialize in delivering high-accuracy sensing and monitoring solutions backed by strong technical expertise and reliable customer support.

We help industries improve pressure measurement, level monitoring, humidity & temperature control, airflow sensing, differential pressure monitoring, and automation system performance through the right selection of globally trusted products.

Our Core Services

Industrial sensor selection consulting (Pressure, Level, Humidity, Flow, DP)

Application support for accurate, stable, industry-specific measurement

PLC, BMS, SCADA & DCS integration assistance

Troubleshooting, diagnostics & performance optimization

Cleanroom & environmental monitoring solutions

Support for HVAC controls, AHU monitoring & room pressure setups

Product training & technical guidance for OEMs and automation teams

Authorized Distribution of Global Brands

We supply genuine, high-performance products from:
Gems Sensors, E+E Elektronik, Trimod Besta, Setra Systems, Jaksa, and Aplisens.

Our portfolio includes pressure transmitters, level switches, humidity sensors, airflow sensors, solenoid valves, DP transmitters, and smart monitoring systems used in critical environments.

Industries We Serve

Pharma & Cleanrooms

HVAC & Building Automation

OEM Machine Manufacturers

Laboratories & R&D Facilities

Manufacturing Plants & Process Industries

Automation & Control System Integrators

Our Commitment

With a customer-first approach, fast support, and expert technical knowledge, MT9 Automation LLP helps industries achieve higher accuracy, improved safety, better compliance, energy efficiency, and long-term operational reliability.

We ensure the right sensors, the right integration, and the right performance  every time.

Name: J.Roma Lda
Description:
J.Roma Lda was founded in 1919 as a provider of instrumentation for electronics. It expanded to instrumentation for several engineering fields, equipment for the experimental education of science and technology and services such as energy audits and equipment rental.

Visit our site to learn more: https://www.jroma.pt/ and https://www.jroma.eu/

Name: Schütz GmbH Messtechnik
Description:
The company has been working in the field of gas leak detection and the technique of gas measurement 
 for more than 40 years. We  check gas supply networks for energy supply companies (DVGW rules) and work on the detection of leaks and pipes as well as on issues such as the changing of metres. In addition, the company gives training courses and specialist training for the partners of the supply companies.

Our services:	
        - Revision of gas networks
	- Interior checks
	- Checking of water networks
	- Detection of water leaks
	- Tracing of leaks with special gas
	- Changing of metres
	- Service in situ (annual service of instruments)
	
We manufacture: 	
        - Gas measurement instruments
	- Gas detection instruments
	- Universal measuring instruments
	- Vehicles fitted with measuring equipment
	- Aspiration equipment
	- Probes

Name: ColorWorkDesk
Description:
ColorWorkDesk è la linea di prodotti URAI in grado di migliorare le performance del controllo qualità e formulazione del colore grazie a software modulari e strumenti innovativi.

ColorWorkDesk è un progetto URAI.
Dal 1948 prodotti innovativi per l’industria del colore

Name: STEP LOGISTICA Y CONTROL SL
Description: STEP AUTOMATIZACIÓN Y CONTROL is a specialized company manufacturing and distributing the latest technologies in Probes, Converters, IoT devices and Scada software for Industry, Building Automation and Energy Efficiency.

Name: Eurosens Elektronik San. Tic. A.S
Description: EUROSENS ELEKTRONİK SANAYİ TİCARET ANONİM ŞİRKETİ, which emerged with the increasing prevalence of industrial automation applications in the international arena, was established to meet the needs of precision measurement control devices, process control equipment, system consultancy and spare parts supply. The industry's leading Manufacturer and Company, carrying out its activities for the needs of industrial facilities in the field of water, steam, chemical and industrial fluid technologies. Our company, which takes care to meet with the cooperation of importing companies, offers a wide product range such as Measurement and Control Systems, Pumps, Valves, Armatures. By providing support to its users, it is both the Turkey Distributor and Solution Partner of European brands.

Name: NTEK s.r.l.
Description:
Ntek Srl is an Italian company specializing in building acoustics, offering cutting-edge solutions for noise and vibration measurement and control. Founded in 2013 as a start-up, Ntek established itself in the sector, becoming a Small and Medium Enterprise in 2017 with a strong international presence.

Ntek's mission is to develop and provide sound insulation test equipment that ensures precision and ease of use. The company designs and manufactures sound sources and innovative devices for sound insulation tests, meeting the needs of professionals in the construction and industrial sectors.

Name: Jooby
Description:
Jooby is part of the Infomir Group, focused on IoT solutions for smart cities and utilities.

Jooby is an IoT toolbox for integrators delivering smart city and utility metering solutions based on LoRa and NB-IoT.

We equip integrators with ready-to-ship retrofit sensors for traditional meters and offer fast custom product development for utility and smart city projects, backed by EU manufacturing and logistics.

Name: Anton Paar Philippines
Description:
Anton Paar develops, produces and distributes highly accurate laboratory instruments and process measuring systems, and provides custom-tailored automation and robotic solutions. It is the world leader in the measurement of density, concentration and CO2 and in the field of rheometry. Anton Paar GmbH is owned by the charitable Santner Foundation.

Over 4,500 employees at the headquarters in Graz and the 39 sales subsidiaries worldwide ensure that Anton Paar products live up to their excellent reputation. The core competence of Anton Paar – high-precision production – and close contact to the scientific community form the basis for the quality of Anton Paar’s instruments.

Name: Anton Paar Hungary
Description: Az Anton Paar nagy pontosságú laboratóriumi berendezések és folyamatmérési rendszerek fejlesztésével, gyártásával és forgalmazásával, valamint egyedi kialakítású automatizálási és robotikai megoldások értékesítésével foglalkozik. A vállalat globális szinten is vezető pozíciót tölt be a sűrűség, a koncentráció és a CO2 mérése, valamint a reometria terén. Az Anton Paar GmbH vállalat a Santner Foundation jótékonysági alapítvány tulajdonában van.

Name: Rupac Srl
Description:
La RUPAC, Rappresentanze Utensili Precisione Apparecchi Controllo, fondata nel 1949 dall’Ingegner Bruno Friso, offre alla propria Clientela un’ampia scelta di strumentazione ed apparecchiature di controllo, sempre a livelli qualitativi molto elevati e rispondenti alle Normative DIN-ISO.

Gli strumenti di misura RUPAC sono il frutto dell’esperienza di lavoro di oltre sessanta anni nel settore della Qualità e del Controllo, ed è con grande orgoglio che possiamo affermare che il marchio RUPAC si pone tra i leader a livello nazionale ed europeo nel settore del controllo.

Oggi la nostra Società, sempre all’avanguardia in un settore in continua evoluzione, può vantare una superficie di 2.000 mq coperti, con due sale esposizione di 180 mq, dove siete invitati a vedere e provare una vasta gamma di apparecchiature, comprese le ultime, e più aggiornate, “novità di mercato”, e con un laboratorio dove si effettuano le riparazioni, il controllo ed il collaudo degli strumenti.

Un magazzino notevolmente ampliato e capiente assicura una pronta disponibilità di tutta la strumentazione presente sul nostro Catalogo Generale.

I nostri tecnici sono sempre a disposizione per risolvere qualsiasi problema o richiesta dei Clienti.

Name: ISATECK
Description:
Para Plantas Industriales de los principales sectores de la Región Andina, ISATECK es la Compañía de Soluciones de Automatización que enlaza sus instrumentos de mediciones (normalmente atípicos) con su Sistema de Manejo de Información de datos en Tiempo Real, permitiendo soportar el retorno sobre la inversión (ROI) de una forma más "tangible", ya que el núcleo de la solución es nuestro sistema el cual permite simular variable + control vs costo de producción.

Solutions Partners:

* ABB

* KTEK

* MICROEPSILON

*SENSYS

* HYDRONIX

Será un gusto asesorarle en sus proyectos de AUTOMATIZACION

Name: Anton Paar Poland
Description:
Anton Paar produkuje wysokiej klasy przyrzady pomiarowe i laboratoryjne dla przemyslu i badan naukowych. Jest swiatowym liderem w pomiarach gęstosci, steżenia rozpuszczonego CO2 oraz w zakresie reometrii. Inne obszary specjalizacji to: badania produktów petrochemicznych, synteza mikrofalowa, badania lepkości, dyfrakcja promieniowania rentgenowskiego, przygotowanie próbek i charakterystyka powierzchni.

Wysoce precyzyjna produkcja i bliski kontakt ze społecznoscią naukową są podstawą jakości przyrzadów Anton Paar. Ciagłe szkolenia oraz inwestycje w badania i rozwój zapewniają, że produkty Anton Paar spełniają wysokie wymagania naszych użytkowników na calym świecie.

Oddzial firmy w Warszawie, Anton Paar Poland, oferuje sprzedaż, wsparcie aplikacyjne i serwis dla użytkowników w Polsce.

Name: Norm T.A.M Takım Aparat Mastar İmalat Sanayi
Description:
30 yılı aşkın süredir hassas kontrol ve ölçüm alanında müşteri odaklı ve yaratıcı çözümler üretmeye devam etmekteyiz
Yılların getirdiği deneyim ve yenilikçi bakış açımızla, kalite kontrol ve ölçüm alanında öncü bir rol üstleniyoruz. Türkiye'de faliyet gösteren yerli bir üretici olarak  endüstrinin sürekli değişen ihtiyaçlarına yüksek hassasiyetle yanıt veriyor ve müşterilerimize özgün çözümler sunmak için çalışıyoruz.

Faaliyet alanlarımız, kontrol mastarları, mekanik ve dijital ölçüm ekipmanları ile başlayarak, seriye özel SPC ve Endüstri 4.0 tabanlı kontrol otomasyonlarıyla genişliyor. Her bir ürünümüz, kaliteyi ve güvenilirliği ön planda tutarak tasarlanmakta ve üretilmektedir.

“Müşterilerimizin beklentilerini aşmayı hedefleyerek, mastar imalatında yüksek kaliteli ve ekonomik çözümler sunuyor ve teknik süreçlerini güçlendiriyoruz. Her yıl yeni ürünlerin eklendiği Standart Ölçü Aletleri kategorisinde, her sektörün kontrol ihtiyacını karşılayabilecek ve doğrudan stoklarımızdan temin edebileceğiniz standart ekipmanlarımıza göz atmanızı öneririz..

Geçer Geçmez gibi standart mastarların yanı sıra, DiaNorm serisi cihazlarımızla her sektöre uygun kontrol çözümleri sağlıyoruz. DiaNorm ürünlerimizin görselleri ve ayrıntılı bilgileri, web sitemizde sizleri bekliyor.

Ürünlerimiz hakkında daha fazla bilgi edinmek ya da örnek projelerimize göz atmak için web sitemizin “Ürünler” bölümünü ziyaret edebilirsiniz.

Kalitenin, inovasyonun ve güvenin buluştuğu bu platformda, siz değerli müşterilerimize çözüm ortağı olmaktan gurur duyuyoruz. Birlikte, geleceğin kalite standartlarını yeniden tanımlamak için sabırsızlanıyoruz!

Name: FairScope
Description: FairScope, founded in 2023, is committed to revolutionizing marine biology research and aquatic ecosystem studies through the PlanktoScope. Our mission is to empower scientists and researchers around the world with state-of-the-art, cost-effective, and sustainable microscopy technology. We strive to enhance the understanding of marine life, particularly plankton, by providing high-precision, high-resolution imaging capabilities. Embracing an open-source philosophy, we foster a culture of transparency, collaboration, and continuous technological evolution. Our commitment extends to sustainability, reflected in our eco-conscious material choices and design principles. At FairScope, we are dedicated to building a global community of researchers and institutions, contributing to the advancement of marine biology, and positively impacting our understanding of aquatic ecosystems for a better, more informed world.

Name: streamwise gmbh
Description: We leverage GPU computing and game engine technology to revolutionize aerodynamic research and development.

Name: Dostmann electronic GmbH
Description: Für die Lösung Ihrer Probleme im Bereich Temperatur-, Feuchte-, Druck- und Strömungsmessung setzen wir uns ein. Unsere Produkte sind auf höchstem Qualitätsniveau und werden in der Chemie, Pharmazie und Lebensmittelindustrie sowie in QS-Laboratorien eingesetzt.

Name: KROHNE México
Description:
KROHNE es líder mundial fabricante y suministrador de soluciones en instrumentación de proceso industrial.

KROHNE DE MEXICO, SA DE CV es su punto de contacto para ventas y servicios en Mexico, Centroamerica y Caribe.

Name: TechnoTeam Bildverarbeitung GmbH
Description: TechnoTeam Bildverarbeitung GmbH is a manufacturer of image processing systems for use in light metrology located in Ilmenau / Germany.

Name: MOVA Technologies
Description: MOVA Technologies, Inc. is a privately funded AgTech and industrial filtration company pioneering scalable air quality solutions for agriculture and industry, starting in the poultry sector. MOVA’s patented selective filtration technology is designed to cost-effectively extract airborne contaminants—purifying the air while creating opportunities for their reuse or resale as valuable commodities. Built on advanced material science and precision engineering, the system is being developed to optimize farm efficiency and enhance the security and resilience of U.S. food production. While agriculture is a primary focus, MOVA’s filtration technology can be adapted to any industry prioritizing air quality performance.

Name: NLOPTICS
Description:
NLOptics is an innovative photonics company specializing in advanced surface analysis solutions for the semiconductor industry and beyond. Born from cutting-edge research at the University of Bordeaux, our revolutionary technology delivers unmatched micrometric precision, enabling detailed and non-destructive analysis of electronic components, with an expertise on Lithium Niobate caracterisation. 

Thanks to a strong commitment to R&D, and protection of our innovations through several patents, we position ourselves as key partners for companies seeking quality, and performance of their products. 

Follow us to discover how we are shaping the future of surface analysis with our expertise, strategic partnerships, and vision focused on excellence, and sustainability.

Name: Avinya Engineers Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Founded in 2019, NextGen Automation provides advanced engineering solutions to clients in a wide variety of domains. We specialise in industrial automation solutions for control systems ranging from energy monitoring, digital integration and industrial IoT to SCADA-based reporting solutions. Our solutions are control system agnostic, making them applicable across industry and application domains.

We take pride in taking on and solving complex engineering challenges with our unique mix of richly capable solutions, vendor integration ability and passionate team of experienced professionals. With NexGen, your challenge is no longer a challenge, it is simply a goal waiting to be achieved.

Name: Data-Pixel
Description:
Data-Pixel is an international leader in technology for image-processing based test and measurement equipment, since 2001.

The fast company’s growth has been primarily achieved by supplying the increasing metrology needs of the fiber optic industry for telecommunications with innovative solutions and superior customer support.

With 98% of its revenues generated in over 25 countries, Data-Pixel has built an international distributor and representative network which extends throughout North and South America, Europe, India, Japan, China, Taiwan and Korea.

Name: ASDevices, Gas Chromatography
Description: ASDevices, a division of Mécanique Analytique, is involved in applied research, designed and manufacturing of technologies and solutions for the analytical market. Our high quality OEM solutions are aimed at simplifying and improving existing analysis methods and offer new possibilities to resolve analytical challenges. Based on our substantial IP portfolio, 40 years of experience and a strong track record, we pride ourselves as being an innovation catalyst for our business partners.

Name: Sensortherm GmbH
Description:
Fast infrared thermometer for non-contact temperature measurement,
System components for extended process monitoring and control.
In-house development and production, sales and service.

Name: BEL Engineering
Description:

Name: Nyx Hemera Technologies
Description:
FR: Nyx Hemera Technologies propose des systèmes intelligents de contrôle de l’éclairage pour les routes, tunnels et autres espaces publics, permettant des économies d’énergie, une réduction des coûts d’exploitation, une sécurité accrue et un développement durable.

Fondée en 2008, l’entreprise est spécialisée dans le contrôle et la communication par ligne électrique — une expertise au cœur de sa solution phare, le TLACS, reconnue pour sa fiabilité, sa stabilité et son efficacité.

Le TLACS est installé aux États-Unis, au Canada, en Asie, en Europe et en Amérique latine, où il gère plus de 100 000 luminaires dans le monde, du tunnel Kallang–Paya Lebar à Singapour jusqu’à des stationnements à New York.

EN: Nyx Hemera Technologies provides smart lighting control systems for roads, tunnels, and other public areas, enabling energy savings, lower operational costs, enhanced safety, and sustainable development.

Founded in 2008, the company specializes in control and power line communication—core to its flagship TLACS solution, known for its reliability, stability, and efficiency.

TLACS is installed in the U.S., Canada, Asia, Europe, and Latin America, managing over 100,000 luminaires worldwide—from Singapore’s Kallang–Paya Lebar Expressway to parking lots in New York.

Name: TeTechS Inc.
Description:
TeTechS provides measurement solutions to plastic packaging manufacturing companies enabling them to automate their thickness measurement quality control processes to reduce scrap and labor costs and improve their productivity.

Powered by TeTechS’ patented TeraGauge  technology, PlastiMeasure is a factory floor proven automated and connected measurement solution that demonstrates both speed and precision to provide thickness measurements with an accuracy of 0.00004″ (1 micron) and a typical gauge R&R <5% .

Measure as many points as required with precision & speed. Having real-time data allows the operators to react quicker and make adjustments faster than before which reduces scrap and production down time.

PlastiMeasure gives companies more visibility into their quality control processes. With real-time data connectivity to the plant’s SPC controller, managers are able to log and monitor the status of the machine anywhere at anytime.

APPLICATIONS:

- THICKNESS MEASUREMENT: Measures both overall wall thickness and EVOH oxygen barrier layer thickness with +/-1 μm of accuracy.
 
- WEIGHT MEASUREMENT: Records the weight of each container with 0.1 g of accuracy.
 
- DIMENSION MEASUREMENT: Automates OD/ID measurement with an accuracy of +/-10 μm.
 
- CAVITY NUMBER RECORDING: Records and saves cavity number of each part for data traceability.

KEY FEATURES:

- Measures opaque and transparent materials (HDPE,PP,PET, etc.)
- Measures overall wall thickness 
- Measures EVOH barrier thickness
- Measures weight & dimension
- Optimizes expensive resin usage
- Frees up staff time for higher value tasks
- Improves on employee safety
- Brings high quality data into the process
- Measures a full batch of samples in a cycle

Name: Anton Paar TriTec
Description:
Anton Paar TriTec develops and produces a wide range of instruments which measure mechanical properties of surfaces by using the characterization techniques called indentation, scratch, and tribology. These instruments answer questions such as: How elastic is a material? How well does a surface coating adhere to its substrate? And how resistant is a material to wear? New fields of applications are continuously investigated.
Every day we all use objects which have been engineered by using Anton Paar TriTec products. For example, there is some Anton Paar TriTec in contact lenses. The lens material is chosen for its optical and mechanical properties, which influence the wearing comfort. This is where the bioindenter UNHT³ Bio comes into play. To provide relevant data, the samples are tested by a nanoindentation technique while being immersed in a liquid. A very fine tip is brought in contact with the material surface and allows measurement of the adhesive forces, stiffness, and the viscoelastic properties of the lens.
Anton Paar TriTec is a legacy of research and industry in the Neuchâtel region: The history of our company began in 1939 at the Swiss Laboratory of Watch Research in Neuchâtel, which was integrated into the CSEM, Swiss Center for Electronics and Microtechnology, in the 1980s. It was spun out in 2002 and then called CSM Instruments. In 2013 we joined Anton Paar under the name Anton Paar TriTec SA. Our solid regional anchors and our Swiss-made products give us an excellent foundation for selling our instruments all over the world.

Name: Micro Photon Devices
Description:
Micro Photon Devices Srl (MPD) is a dynamic production and engineering company based in Bolzano. MPD was founded with the goal of leading the forefront research activities in single photon counting and picosecond timing of single photons. MPD currently produces and commercialises advanced single-photon counting modules with unmatched photon-timing capabilities and overall performance. Silicon SPADs  make it possible to conjugate high detector performance with miniaturisation, low power and development of integrated systems. SPADs in compound semiconductors extend photon counting applications to the near infrared spectral range up to the optical fibre wavelengths.

Besides Micro Photon Devices products range, the company is also available to develop custom designs for specific applications related to photon counting detection technology, taking advantage of its own expertise covering the whole engineering and production flow, including prototyping, components procurement, system integration, testing and shipping.

We bring the latest news about; new digital and optical developments and the European and international norms.

METROMEET will show the sector's experts the newest working methods and formulas that improve your industrial process and your company's productivity. During the two days, international leaders in the Industrial Dimensional Metrology sector will show you how to improve the quality of your product and the efficiency of its production.  

Format: 
-	Live annual conference is held in Bilbao since 2003.
-	6 online events throughout the year inviting the Metromeet community to participate in one-hour sessions with top experts in the field of Industrial Dimensional Metrology.

Name: Wintech Groupe
Description:
Wintech Groupe is a French group specialized in the design and manufacture of precision optical and optronic components and solutions. Wintech Groupe's activities are grouped into 2 subsidiaries: SOREM and UTC-System. 

SOREM (certified AS|EN | JISQ 9100 and NF EN ISO 9001) is a French limited company created in 1953, recognized for its expertise in the following fields: 

- the manufacture of infrared inspection windows dedicated to preventive maintenance by thermography of electrical equipment. SOREM is the inventor of the H.VIR (High Vision Infrared window for use Low Voltage LV to High Voltage HT environments). It is the only window in the world that covers the widest spectrum of infrared (Bands I to III).Used worldwide by most major electrical equipment manufacturers, the H.VIR window can be installed into new equipment or retrofitted to existing panels.  

- machining and polishing of complex shapes on hard materials (specialization in Sapphire with the use of ultrasonic technology). 

- the manufacture of protections for cameras used in the aeronautics sector.

UTC-System is a French limited company created in 2020, currently developing a new patented innovative optronic product. The latest EMC and CE qualifications are underway for a market entry in 2022. 

With solid experience and expertise, Wintech Groupe provides, through its subsidiaries, effective advice and assistance in the development of your projects. Today our products are distributed worldwide both in industry (energy, petrochemicals, transport, agri-food, aeronautics, defense, aerospace, etc.) and in research laboratories and R&D departments.

Name: Silicon Designs, Inc.
Description:
Since 1983, Silicon Designs has served as global industry experts in the design, development, and manufacture of commercial and inertial-grade MEMS DC accelerometer modules and chips with integral amplification. Our MEMS DC accelerometers and chips feature highly rugged designs for zero-to-medium frequency instrumentation requirements, with full-scale sensitivities from ±2 g to ±1000 g. Within standard ranges of ±2 g to ±400 g, most Silicon Designs MEMS DC accelerometers also continue to reliably perform within published specifications, including after exposures to 5000 g and in limited temperature exposures to +175°C.

As the OEM of our own MEMS DC accelerometers and chips, Silicon Designs can provide exclusive benefits to our customers which are otherwise absent from the industry. All products are 100% built in-house at our state-of-the-art worldwide corporate headquarters and R&D center, located just outside of Seattle, Washington, and resulting in superb quality, added qualification capabilities, custom specifications, and private-label solutions -- all supplied with some of the industry’s shortest lead times.

Silicon Designs' quality management systems are also ISO 9001:2015 certified, reaffirming our unwavering commitment to the design and manufacture of accurate, reliable MEMS DC accelerometer chips and modules for defense, aviation, space, automotive, transportation, energy, environmental, and industrial applications. We also use military standards for production, guaranteeing a level of quality that is seldom found in similar MEMS DC accelerometers. 

The miniature MEMS DC accelerometer technologies of Silicon Designs have received critical industry acclaim for their innovation and versatility, as evidenced by our numerous SBIR grant awards, prestigious Tibbetts Award recognition, and induction into the Space Technology Hall of Fame. Silicon Designs is also a 100% veteran-owned small business. We look forward to supporting your requirements.

Name: iumtek
Description:
La vocation de iumtek est de concevoir des analyseurs chimiques temps réel in situ industriels, basés sur la technologie LIBS.

Notre start-up est composée d’une équipe pluridisciplinaire expérimentée. La société a été cofondée avec le CEA Investissement et relève de la filière de valorisation de la Direction Energie Nucléaire du CEA Saclay. Cette collaboration s’exprime par l’exploitation de brevets et un accord cadre de R&D. 
Après deux années d'incubation @IncubAlliance, iumtek intégre l'accélérateur de start-up deeptech Accelair du groupe Air Liquide.

La technologie LIBS est une méthode temps réel permettant l’analyse élémentaire par l’émission d’un rayon laser sur tous types de matériaux, sans préparation préalable et quel que soit son état (liquide, solide ou gazeux). Le rayonnement du plasma généré est analysé par spectroscopie d’émission afin d’obtenir la composition de l’échantillon et aboutir à une donnée qualitative et/ou quantitative.

---------------English below---------------

The vocation of iumtek is to design industrial real-time in situ chemical analyzers, based on LIBS technology.

Our start-up is made up of an experienced multidisciplinary team. The company was co-founded with CEA Investissement and comes under the valuation sector of the Nuclear Energy Department of CEA Saclay. This collaboration is expressed through the exploitation of patents and an R&D framework agreement.
After two years of incubation @IncubAlliance, iumtek joins the deeptech start-up accelerator Accelair of the Air Liquide group.

LIBS technology is a real-time method allowing elemental analysis by the emission of a laser beam on all types of materials, without prior preparation and whatever its state (liquid, solid, or gas). The radiation from the plasma generated is analyzed by emission spectroscopy to obtain the composition of the sample and to arrive at qualitative and/or quantitative data.

Name: GSA Messgerätebau GmbH
Description:
Seit der Gründung im Jahre 1991 stellt die GSA Messgerätebau GmbH speziell entwickelte Probenahmegeräte „Made in Germany“ für Arbeitsplatzmessungen, Emissions- und Immissionsmessungen her. 

Mit unserer langjährigen Erfahrung haben wir uns in Deutschland zu einem der Marktführer und Experten von spezialisierten Messgeräten für den mobilen und stationären Einsatz für die Gefahrstoffmessung und Schadstoffanalyse entwickelt. 

Mit unseren umfassenden Felderfahrungen setzen wir unsere Erkenntnisse für die Anwender um. Wir entwickeln und bieten technisch hochpräzise Probenahmegeräte und Probenträgersysteme zur Messung von Stäuben, Gasen und Dämpfen.

Je nach Einsatzort und Bedingungen für Gefahrstoffmessungen bieten wir GSA Messgeräte für:
- Partikelmessungen für unterschiedlichste Formen der Staubbelastung wie die Messung von A-Staub oder E-Staub 
- Fasermessungen gemäß VDI 3492 für die Asbestmessung oder KMF und Glasfasern 
- Gasmessung
- PAK Messung, die Ermittlung von PCB, Schimmel und sonstiger Schadstoffe an.

Mit den GSA Probenahmegeräten lassen sich mögliche Gefährdungen durch Schadstoffe in Unternehmen und öffentlichen Gebäuden als auch in privaten Wohnbereichen messen. Insbesondere können mit diesen (Arbeitsplatz-)Grenzwerte überprüft werden. 

Neben den Eigenentwicklungen bauen wir in Lizenz auch die Geräte für Messungen am Arbeitsplatz, die beim Institut für Arbeitsschutz der Deutschen Gesetzlichen Unfallversicherung (DGUV) entwickelt wurden. 

Wir haben eine TÜV-Zertifizierung nach ISO 9001:2015. Mit unserer spezialisierten Messtechnik haben wir das Vertrauen zahlreicher Kunden gewonnen, darunter über 50% der DAX-Konzerne.

Our technology is applicable not only to oversized and hard-to-disperse particles, but also to structured or coated particles that are inherently difficult to analyze with conventional sizing and dispersion methods.
Our mission is to develop and commercialize robust particle-level measurement technologies that support better product quality, more reliable processes, and efficient scale-up across industrial applications. Our vision is to become a global reference for particle-level insight, enabling confident, data-driven control of powder processes from R&D through production.

The sensors are suitable for use in hazardous areas (IECEx & ATEX certifications). Analog and digital evaluation electronics complete the product range. Robust and shock-resistant temperature sensors as well as oil level gauges and speed sensors are manufactured especially for the railway industry. Name: Weir-Jones Group
Description:
Weir-Jones Group has over a 50-year history with projects in over 55 countries collecting condition data from critical assets in the Infrastructure, Oil and Gas, Mining, and Marine industries for the purpose of structural integrity/health monitoring and assessment, and failure prediction.  Our goal is to provide clients with valid answers and practical solutions based on the analysis of results obtained from real-time operational data. 

Weir-Jones has developed a complete seismic and health monitoring solution for structural integrity assessment of critical infrastructure and assets, including sensors, instrumentation, installation, monitoring, data analysis, alarming, and report generation.  This enables optimal decision-making with respect to reliability, maintenance, and planning.  The systems can measure vibration, strain, fatigue, bolt tension, shock, and crack propagation on critical infrastructure and assets, in a variety of harsh terrestrial or marine environments, such as offshore and underground.  The data is processed by software that allows operators to predict failures and schedule maintenance events prior to failure, increasing safety and reducing downtime considerably.  Web-portal interfaces allow clients to view the health of their critical infrastructure and assets in real-time, while alerting the client on potential failures and adverse trends.

Examples of past and present projects include:
   - Pattullo Bridge structural integrity / health monitoring system (SIMS / SHMS) and earthquake early warning systems (EEWS)
   - Lions Gate Bridge and Pitt River Bridge SIMS / SHMS
   - George Massey Tunnel EEWS
   - Monitoring oil & gas pipelines in Canada carrying over 2M barrels/day for pending failures & leaks
   - TransLink construction monitoring

Name: EMATronics
Description:
EMATronics is the inventor of the highly sensitive EMATRUS technology for nondestructive testing (NDT) of metallic components. Through the non-contact analysis of vibration behavior, we determine highly precise elastic material properties and detect defects such as cracks and pores that cannot be found using conventional methods.

We carry out nondestructive and non-contact inspections of the most delicate components during production, as finished components and over their entire service life. Ensure maximum customer satisfaction by ensuring that only parts that meet the required production quality leave production.

Thanks to an order of magnitude higher precision compared to the state of the art, we determine material data such as Young's modulus, G-modulus and Poisson's ratio with high precision and anisotropy. Develop even better products more efficiently with a better understanding of materials and protect yourself against nasty surprises with more accurate simulations.

Interested? Write to us here on LinkedIn or at info@ematronics.ch

LoraWan wireless intergation allows the controllers and sensors being intergated to system when wired solution is not practical. LoraWan provides long range communications and is therefore ideal for retrofit projects. Name: DIAMSENS
Description: Sensors for in-situ control of water quality, based on diamond nanocrystals, a material that pushes the limits of durability without maintenance, while maintaining an affordable price. Under the combined effect of global warming and demographic pressure, it is necessary to continuously monitor water quality at many points, before and after use. The large majority of sensors used for this task are electrochemical sensors, yet their large-scale deployment is limited by their purchase price, not to mention the maintenance costs (cleaning and recalibration), which can double the purchase price. DIAMSENS relies on the unique properties of diamond to develop and manufacture sensors that are both efficient and robust – “forever” even, some would say. A process patented by CEA-Leti, which consumes little energy, allows self-cleaning of submerged analysis surfaces. The sensor remains in as-new conditions, and the initial accuracy of the measurements is kept. This avoids frequent manual recalibrations and the associated maintenance costs. As for the price of the sensor itself, the solution is to use conventional microelectronics and electronics equipment to massively and quickly manufacture sensor arrays at an affordable price. DIAMSENS will successively serve the markets of the swimming pool water treatment, then agriculture - with the control of fertilizers - and finally the drinking water treatment associated with wastewater treatment.

Name: SILIX lambda - Ingenieurbüro Prof. Dr.-Ing. Günter Dittmar
Description:
Als Messgerätehersteller und Sachverständiger für Laseranlagen stellt Günter Dittmar mit seiner mehrfach ausgezeichneten Erfindung, dem Spektrodosimeter SILIX lambda, das erste Messgerät für die Auswertung von Röntgenstrahlen bei der Materialbearbeitung mit Ultrakurzpulslasern zur Verfügung.

Das Spektrodosimeter SILIX lambda kann von Lasermaschinenherstellern, Lohnfertigern, die UKP-Lasermaschinen einsetzen, Universitäten, Instituten und staatlichen Prüforganisationen genutzt werden.

Angebote:
 Verkauf des Spektrodosimeter SILIX lambda mit Zubehör, wie Notebook mit Auswertungssoftware, Kabel, Befestigungselemente und Geräte-Koffer.
 Ausleihe des Spektrodosimeter SILIX lambda mit ausführlicher Anleitung für seine Anwendung.

Darüber hinaus bietet Günter Dittmar folgende Dienstleistungen:
 Kalibrierung, Rekalibrierung, Wartung, Reparatur des Spektrodosimeters SILIX lambda 
 Schulung von Betreibern von UKP-Lasermaschinen bezüglich der Gefahren bei Laser-erzeugter Röntgenstrahlung 

Das Spektrodosimeter SILIX ist geeignet, alle geforderten Messgrößen für das staatliche Prüfprotokoll an Lasermaschinen in Echtzeit zu ermitteln. Dazu gehören alle drei geforderten Ortsdosisleistungen und die Bestimmung des worst case (Maximum der Röntgenstrahlung).

Auf der Grundlage der Messergebnisse entscheidet der Betreiber über notwendige Verbesserungen der Strahlungssicherheit.

Name: ESTEDE | Technologies
Description: EESTEDE has developed a platform for measuring all key (growth) parameters in the agricultural sector, consisting of our FieldGuard Measurement Stations and the Tracis Web Portal. The necessary sensors for a specific application are selected and connected to a FieldGuard Station, which then (wirelessly) transmits the measurement data to the internet (cloud). For data storage, security, and analysis in the cloud, we use Microsoft Azure. The data is then made available to the grower via the Tracis Web Portal. The grower logs into the Tracis Web Portal, where the measurement data from various stations is displayed in their account in a clear and organized manner. Additionally, threshold values can be set in Tracis, allowing the farmer or grower to receive a "warning" on their mobile phone, or to automatically schedule or start other processes, such as irrigation/fertigation tasks.

Name: SINTEG Systems
Description:
SINTEG Systems is a TU Delft spin-off dedicated to advancing structural integrity assessment and monitoring for composite materials. We develop wireless sensor systems that enable in-situ, real-time, and non-intrusive evaluation of composite structures without disassembly, destructive testing, or complex procedures.

Our technologies address one of the key barriers to the widespread adoption of composites: achieving reliable quality assurance both after manufacturing and throughout the entire service life. Traditional non-destructive testing methods are often costly, time-consuming, and limited in the insights they provide. SINTEG Systems offers a smarter alternative.

By leveraging advanced algorithms for stiffness evaluation and automated defect localization, our solutions are scalable, cost-effective, and easy to integrate into existing workflows. In addition, our technology can detect damage in adhesive bondlines, supporting a future with fewer mechanically fastened joints.

We are collaborating with industry partners to bring our technology into the field and are proud to be part of the NATO DIANA program, supporting the development of robust, high-impact solutions for demanding defence applications

We are actively seeking manufacturing partners and early adopters who want to help shape the future of composite inspection and structural integrity monitoring.

Per noi di 𝗘𝗹𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗳𝗳 ogni limite è un’occasione per superarsi.

Da 45 anni impieghiamo la nostra tecnologia e la nostra passione per creare e distribuire apparecchiature che favoriscano il controllo dei limiti di velocità e la verifica del rispetto del codice della strada.

La nostra missione è 𝗹𝗮 𝘃𝗼𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗮 𝘀𝗶𝗰𝘂𝗿𝗲𝘇𝘇𝗮, 𝗮𝗹 𝘃𝗼𝗹𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗲 𝗲 𝗶𝗻 𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗱𝗮.

Forniamo ad autorità e amministrazioni pubbliche tutti gli strumenti necessari per rendere le nostre strade più sicure. Perché? Per favorire una circolazione consapevole, nel totale rispetto di chi sta al volante e chi ci circonda.

𝗟’𝗶𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲 è alla base di tutto ciò che facciamo.

Da misuratori di velocità e apparecchiature per il rilievo di infrazioni semaforiche, a etilometri, drug test e sistemi di mappatura degli incidenti: produciamo e importiamo una vasta gamma di prodotti dove tecnologie innovative incontrano precisione e semplicità d’uso.

Crediamo in una circolazione più sicura perché 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝗮𝗺𝗼 𝗻𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗲 𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗲.

Eltraff è una piccola azienda, ma con un cuore grande. Il nostro Team è unito da grande trasparenza, lealtà, condivisione di successi, e anche di valori: ogni giorno, insieme, ci impegniamo su più fronti in numerose iniziative sociali e ambientali.

La nostra azienda è, inoltre, certificata secondo lo standard di Qualità ISO 9001:2015 ed ha implementato un Sistema di Gestione Integrato Qualità, Salute, Sicurezza e Ambiente.

Svolta all’incrocio, e poi dritto fino alla strada più sicura. Ti aspettiamo lì.

Als Spezialist für Prüf- und Messtechnik haben wir langjährige Kundenbeziehungen und gelten für unsere Kunden als wichtiger Innovationspartner und Schrittmacher, der deren Arbeit erleichtert und seine Produkte laufend anpasst an den technologischen Fortschritt. 
Für unsere Kunden entwickeln und produzieren wir zukunftsweisende Lösungen mit unseren Kompetenzen in den Bereichen:
- Automotive Testing
- Industrielle Prüf- und Messtechnik
- Embedded Technologien

...und das in einer State-of-the-Art-Umgebung. Wir laden Sie ein, uns kennen zu lernen, und vielleicht sind Sie schon bald Teil unseres Teams!

Areus als Arbeitgeber
Wir sind überzeugt davon, dass nur innerhalb eines positiven Arbeitsumfelds Höchstleistungen möglich sind. Deshalb legen wir viel Wert auf unsere Unternehmenskultur und eine angenehme Arbeitsumgebung. Wir bewegen gemeinsam Großes und dabei fordern wir nicht nur unsere Mitarbeiter, sondern fördern sie auch.
Hierbei bieten wir neben einer zeitgemäßen Vergütungspolitik auch eine Vielzahl an weiteren Benefits. Auf Deutschlands führender Arbeitgeber-Bewertungsplattform können Sie sich ein eigenes Bild von uns machen – denn unsere Bewertungen können sich sehen lassen.
Zu unserem Kunu-Profil:

Name: EDDYWISE NDT
Description: EDDYWISE NDT is a specialized provider of advanced NDE solutions, particularly in eddy current inspection and dimension measurement for semi-finished products such as wire, rod, bar, and tube. The company delivers turnkey, fully automated systems designed to require minimal operator involvement while offering network accessibility and comprehensive data integration. EDDYWISE NDT’s expertise covers every stage from design and manufacturing to installation, training, and after-sales support, ensuring reliable performance, compliance with international standards, and seamless integration into existing production lines. These capabilities enable manufacturers to optimize quality control, reduce scrap and downtime, and maintain high operational efficiency.

Wir verfügen über mehr als 40 Jahre Erfahrung mit Produkten der

Name: Sensuron
Description: Sensuron’s ground-breaking distributed sensing technology provides engineers with a powerful, robust, and easy-to-use tool for structural testing, design optimization, structural health monitoring, thermal mapping and 2D shape sensing. Unlike strain gauges and thermocouples, which only capture data at a discrete point, Sensuron interrogators monitor strain and temperature distributions by transforming an optical fiber into a spatially continuous sensor that performs like thousands of strain gauges or thermocouples installed adjacent to one another. This allows our customers to capture significantly more data than traditional sensors, with less instrumentation – saving them measurable time and labor costs.

Name: Vibrant NDT Services Private Limited
Description:
With a decade of Realtime Industrial Experience in Non Destructive Testing, we have acquired the Technology and Knowledge to address any challenging inspection works in all major industries. Not limiting to Non Destructive Testing, we are also a major role player in the NDT Manufacturing Industry.

NDT Testing Services

NDT Products Manufacturing

NDT Training & Certification
Our Integrated NDT Training and Certification program offers a direct route to your technology upgradation journey and reach career aspirations with confidence.

Name: Vats Meter
Description:
We Vatturkar Industrial are a Patented Design Genuine Manufacturer, Supplier, and Exporter company of Vatturkar Group since 1993. The dedicated Mechanical Division produces precise Steel & Plastic components in-house. Our ergonomic designed plastic tool is a key to our success.
Along with the mechanical wing, we have the in-house expertise of the embedded design team, which keeps us on our toes, with continuous up-gradation of software and hardware. All our products are well packed in state of art IP-65 enclosures to suit the latest demand from the automation industry.
We are the manufacturer of Plastic and Stainless Steel (SS) Paddlewheel Flow sensors, High-temperature paddlewheel flow sensors, Flow totalizers, transmitters, Batch controllers, and IoT wireless modems for the last 30 years.

Name: KIMESSA AG
Description:
KIMESSA AG was established in 1985 as an innovator in the design and manufacture of electronic fixed gas detection solutions.

KIMESSA AG specialises in fixed gas monitoring and control systems, with customers drawn from industries including underground car parks, HVAC, laboratories, refrigeration, food and brewing.

KIMESSA AG has achieved worldwide notable success with their acclaimed carbon monoxide monitoring and control equipment in the underground car park market, designed to compliment specialist ventilation systems with some of the world’s leading companies in this field.
All of our products are developed and manufactured in Switzerland. 50% of our output is exported through an experienced distributor network.

Certified to ISO 9001:2008 and the production to the high quality requirements of Directive 94/4/EC (ATEX), KIMESSA AG proves they are committed to meeting their customers demand for robust, high quality and innovative products.

Name: Scienzo Sdn Bhd
Description: Supplier for Monitoring Devices

Name: qprobe
Description:
Originating from the Physics Department of the University of Basel, Switzerland, qprobe is deeply rooted in academic excellence and powered by technological innovation.

In response to the critical need for high-throughput device testing at temperatures below 2 Kelvin in our research, and with no suitable cryogenic probe stations available on the market, we developed our own solution. This resulted in a complete redesign of the traditional cryogenic probe station. Our solution supports measurements at temperatures well below 2 Kelvin. A key advantage is its compact size, which allows it to be used in standard cryostats. This means your existing cryostat setup can be easily upgraded with cryo-probing capabilities.

Name: MueTec Automatisierte Mikroskopie und Messtechnik GmbH
Description: MueTec serves the semiconductor equipment industry as well as a number of other, closely related industries. Our systems, services and software algorithms help nanoelectronics manufacturers manage yield and minimize waste throughout their manufacturing process, from research and development to final mass production.

Name: Marshal Systems Private Limited
Description:
Formerly known as Marshal Technology Mktg & Eng'g Pte Ltd, we took a turning point in November 2009 when we renamed ourselves Marshal Systems Private Limited. This rebirth in name was aligned with the company's strategic direction to become a full-fledged systems integration specialist for the Oil & Gas industries. Something we have successfully transitioned to by leveraging on and combining our years of experience, comprehensive expertise, and dream to advance and serve a greater market.

Marshal Systems was established in Singapore, a globally-acclaimed hub for ship repair, ship conversion, offshore construction and specialized shipbuilding. And from its home, its expertise has reached far with its track record that spans almost two decades serving global Offshore and Marine companies on large scale international projects. We are known for our excellence in devising customized solutions that address and resolve the challenges our clients face, keeping them at the forefront of their industry. 

Our systems integration solutions that cover Telecommunication Systems, Fire and Gas Detection Systems, and Control and Instrumentation Systems protect offshore and marine structures such as vessels and rigs from the risks of damages and loss, making them safer places for personnel to confidently function with focus and full force. At Marshal Systems, we provide you with more than just systems, we provide you peace of mind, so you can simply focus on running your business with sustained success. 

As a proactive and innovative company, we continuously seek new markets to serve and come up with products and services that enhances our current and potential clients’ businesses. Because Marshal Systems’ commitment is beyond safeguarding. It is also about empowering our clients to stay in good shape and strongly on top.

Description:

Name: Omicron Controls, Inc
Description:
Omicron Controls, Inc. is a manufacturer's representative/distributor with over 30 years experience in assisting customers in solving some of their most demanding flow, level and control problems.

Representing some of the industry leaders in the manufacture of flow and level instrumentation, tank gauging systems, environmental monitors and flow meter calibration, Omicron Controls has become a go-to source for many in the industries we serve.

We believe our first responsibility is to our customers, the specifying engineer, instrument supervisor, purchasing agent, and all others who use our products and services.  We constantly strive to improve our level of service and provide products representing the latest in technology.

Our goal is to continue to look for ways to better serve our customers from initial contact to order entry and service after the sale when required.  With offices located in the Houston and DFW areas as well as Tulsa, OK, we are strategically located to provide excellent service for our Texas and Oklahoma customers.

Name: Wisebalt
Description:

Name: DYNA - Instruments for bulk solids
Description: DYNA Instruments supports companies all over the world to reliably control the handling of solids with our online process measurement technologies. We offer a broad range of mass flow meters, among them the unique DYNAmas system - installed on free falling pipes and for pneumatic conveyors. Visit our web page.

Name: Manotherm
Description:
Manotherm is a solutions provider to a variety of industries and is Ireland’s leading supplier of pressure, temperature, flow, level and humidity instrumentation. We also offer a comprehensive range of data loggers, calibrators, regulators, control valves, and butterfly, ball and knife valves. In addition, we offer calibration services, ensuring your  pressure gauges and thermometers perform within manufacturer's specification.

Thanks to our commitment to quality products and outstanding customer care, we’re the first choice for clients across a wide range of industries; from food processing, pharmaceutical and HVAC companies to the water, power and IT sectors, we supply some of the most successful established businesses.

Established in 1958 by Bob Gilbert, we have remained true to his original vision — to offer Irish industry the latest, most extensive range of instrumentation at competitive prices.

We have recently introduced new ranges of products — Mankenberg sanitary regulators and Gemini energy loggers. If you’re looking to reduce costs, consider our VP compressed air flow meters which monitor usage levels and leakage, so you can control how much you spend, or our Domnik energy-efficient steam traps that don’t use any live steam to operate.

Manotherm works only with market-leading suppliers who deliver reliable products — such as Dwyer, Afriso, Barksdale, Influx, Bindicator, Drexelbrook, Mankenberg, Schubert & Salzer, Gemini, West, and Land.

We have an excellent understanding of the process requirements of the sectors we serve and are well positioned to provide an outstanding service, holding wide-ranging stock in Dublin and representing best-of-class products. Discover more about us – and all we have available – through this page and our website, or contact our team of key personnel who each provide professional expertise and advice.

Name: AESSE Ambiente
Description:
AESSE Ambiente nasce nel Gennaio 2013 dall'esigenza del mercato italiano di avere un gruppo di professionisti dedicati alle soluzioni per l’acustica e le vibrazioni ambientali. La nostra squadra - tutte persone con una lunga esperienza nel settore - garantisce competenza e assistenza nell’individuazione delle migliori soluzioni tecniche e nel supporto all’utilizzo di strumenti. 

Sistemi di monitoraggio acustico e vibrazionale, modelli acustici previsionali, strumentazione multicanale per analisi suono e delle vibrazioni, strumentazione e sorgenti per l’acustica edilizia, vibrometri e dosimetri per gli ambienti di lavoro sono solo alcune delle soluzioni tecniche che AESSE Ambiente propone come soluzioni innovative per i suoi clienti.

Assistenza tecnica, tarature, noleggi, incontri tecnici, aggiornamento, corsi di formazione, contratti di manutenzione, supporto remoto,  newsletter e note applicative sono i servizi che AESSE ambiente propone attraverso le persone distribuite sul territorio attraverso i suoi uffici e attraverso le nuove tecnologie di comunicazione.

Name: Xintai Instrument Co.Ltd
Description: Dongguan Xintai Instrument Co., Ltd. was founded in 2010 and the headquartered is in Dongguan. It has branches in Shenzhen and Changsha, and owns two major brands: "Xinsite" and "HTI".Since its establishment, the company has been deeply engaged in the technical research of thermal imaging and instrumentation, and has obtained more than 40 authorized patents in the research and development process. Several other invention patents have entered the stage of acceptance and examination. The company has passed ISO9001, ISO14001, BSCI certification, as well as CE, CPA, ROHS, FCC, FDA, ETL, IP65, IP67 and other global professional product certifications. The company has also been awarded the honorary title of "High tech Enterprise" by the state and recognized as a "Specialized, Refined, Unique and New" high-quality development enterprise by the provincial level. The company is committed to the research and development, production, and sales of products. It has launched a series of infrared night vision devices, infrared thermal imaging devices, infrared thermometers, industrial endoscopes, laser rangefinders, coating thickness gauges, gas detectors, digital differential pressure gauges, manifold meters, air ring mirror detectors, and other products to the global market. These products are used for leak detection of underfloor heating pipes, outdoor search and rescue exploration, power maintenance and inspection, automobile manufacturing, environmental monitoring, electronic monitoring manufacturing, mechanical equipment maintenance and inspection, and can be applied to various fields. Our partners are spread across more than 100 well-known enterprises worldwide, and our company has a comprehensive service system that provides pre-sales, in sales, and after-sales technical support and after-sales guarantee. We will continue to provide customers with high-quality products and services, and strive to become a world-class instrument brand.
