Name: Star-Oddi
Description:
We make small, reliable loggers for animal and ocean environments, ranging from short and long term animal research, to oceanographic and quality control studies.

We have over 30 years of experience in making loggers for four main markets:

- Underwater environments and subsea gear
- Aquatic animals
- Wildlife, domestic and laboratory animals
- Production quality control

Star-Oddi offers a wide range of products including depth (pressure), temperature, salinity (conductivity), 3D tilt angle and magnetic field strength (compass heading) loggers for environmental research, and implantable heart rate, temperature and activity loggers for laboratory, domestic and wildlife research.

We are committed to providing long lasting loggers for use in demanding environments in the smallest possible sizes, never compromising on reliability.

Name: amensio GmbH
Description:
Als junges Biotech-Startup entwicklen wir mit Leidenschaft innovative Sensortechnik für das einfache und mobile Messen in Bioreaktoren mit bewegten Flüssigkeiten.
Klein, clean, agil und universell einsetzbar wird sie zum Enabler für Messungen aller Art über Branchengrenzen hinweg.
Maximales Ausschöpfen von Ergebnissen setzt ungeahntes Forschungspotential frei. Mit den Sens-o-Spheres entwickeln wir ortsunabhängige, voll autarke, minimalisierte Mikrosensorik für
eine beschleunigte und effektivere Prozessentwicklung in der Biotechnologie und den Lebenswissenschaften.

Name: KOMEG Industrielle Messtechnik GmbH
Description:
Seit 1974 steht KOMEG  für fortschrittliche Produktentwicklung und die Herstellung anspruchsvoller Komponenten und Präzisionsmesssysteme für die Koordinaten- und Fertigungsmesstechnik.
Als Komplettanbieter verbindet KOMEG Sondermesstechnik mit Qualitätsdatentechnik und Werkstückzuführung zu kundenspezifischen Systemlösungen mit perfekter Kompatibilität und entwickelt komplexe Gesamtlösungen.

Seit 1997 sind wir ein Unternehmen der Mitutoyo Group. Einem der international führenden Technologiekonzernen der industriellen Längenmesstechnik. Mit dem Mitutoyo-Vertriebsnetz erreichen unsere Produkte Kunden auf der ganzen Welt.

#komeg #sonderlösungen

Name: QSOURCES
Description:
Qsources is a highly specialised company, leading in smart noise and vibration excitation technology. The company was founded in 1992 by Peter van der Linden (Msc.) and is rooted in Belgium. Thanks to the expertise in NVH testing, a strong partner network and fast product innovations, Qsources has been accepted in a wide range of industries, institutes and universities worldwide with its specialised equipment.

The mission of Qsources is to propose the highest level of noise and vibration excitation solutions, enabling engineers worldwide to perform the most accurate and fastest measurements leading to a comfortable, healthy and safe acoustic environment. Specialisation and fast innovation has lead to proprietary and patented technologies in our products.

Qsources manufactures and brings three different product ranges:

Infra-Qsources: Highly portable and very powerful sources for efficient on-site testing for the well being in buildings and working environments. Infra-Qsources proposes accurate and lightweight omni-directional sources, low frequency sources and reference sound power sources. Supported by, and in cooperation with, a range of distribution partners worldwide.

Exa-Qsources; currently this product range consists of the Qlws lightweight shaker and Qma single chanel amplifier. These products are aimed at improving the NVH characteristics of mechatronic devices, medical equipment, white goods,.... Exa-Qsources products are brought to market by HEAD acoustics GmbH and Polytec GmbH

Simcenter-Qsources:  Qsources compact integrated shakers, volume velocity monopole sources help generate a higher level of comfort and efficiency on vehicles, aircraft, machinery,... Many of the Simcenter-Qsources products have become the standard equipment for specialized NVH tests in the automotive industry world wide. The Simcenter-Qsources products are marketed in cooperation with Siemens Digital Industries Software.

For further information, please refer to www.qsources.be

Name: Pixact Ltd
Description:
Pixact develops and supplies novel inline process measurement technology based on optical imaging and real-time image analysis.
 
Our mission is to provide new tools for the process industry to improve process control and facilitate the streamlining of process operations.

Name: JCS Nuclear Solutions
Description:
JCS Nuclear Solutions is a UK-based SME, providing nuclear radiation sensing and shielding solutions since 1975. Our range includes radiation dose-rate monitoring instrumentation, designed and built in the UK, world-class scintillation detectors and a wide-range of neutron shielding materials. We specialise in working in partnership with our customers to provide solutions that are fit for purpose.

Our products and projects are contributing to the UK Net Zero Strategy in supporting existing nuclear energy generation facilities; our technology is underpinning, and future-proofing, complex nuclear decommissioning challenges; we are at the forefront of radiation sensor and shielding technologies which are shaping the development of Small Modular Reactors and Nuclear Fusion projects; our technology is used every day to ensure best working practises and dose-reduction for medical professionals handling radionuclides used to diagnose and treat cancer; we support the UK ministry of defence in a variety of activities; and enjoy important collaborative relationships with nuclear research projects at government laboratories and universities.

Name: EOTECH
Description: Eotech specializes in the development, manufacture and sale of non-contact measurement solutions for the life sciences industries: 3D imaging and analysis, roughness and surface state, photometry, distance and displacement measurements.

Name: Bürkert Hungary
Description: Ipari mérés- és vezérléstechnika, folyadéktechnika. A Bürkert mérő- és vezérlőrendszereket gyárt gázokhoz és folyadékokhoz - ebben a világelsők közé tartozik.

Name: GEO Calibration Inc.
Description:
GEO Calibration is a worldwide leader in the manufacturing of temperature and humidity calibration chambers and instrumentation.

Our purpose is to help companies throughout the world to achieve enhanced performance and comply with industry standards for humidity measurement.

We do this by producing and supplying high-precision generators, chambers, instruments and system solutions that measure temperature and humidity and allow for streamlined calibration workflows.

Name: Anton Paar Taiwan
Description: Anton Paar develops, produces and distributes highly accurate laboratory instruments and process measuring systems, and provides custom-tailored automation and robotic solutions. It is the world leader in the measurement of density, concentration and CO2 and in the field of rheometry.

Name: AMC - Analytik & Messtechnik GmbH Chemnitz
Description:
AMC – Analytik & Messtechnik GmbH Chemnitz ist seit 1990 ein Systemhaus für Mess-, Prüf- und Automatisierungstechnik. 

Wir bieten Produkte und Systemplattformen für die Mess- und Prüftechnik, die Steuerungstechnik sowie für die Automation. Als herstellerunabhängiger Lieferant beraten wir unsere Kunden individuell bei der Auswahl der für die konkrete Anwendung optimalen Produkte. AMC ist dabei langjähriger autorisierter Vertriebs- und/oder Systempartner namhafter Hersteller wie z.B. ADVANTECH, GANTNER Instruments, MEILHAUS Electronic, NATIONAL Instruments u.a..

Unser Produktlieferprogramm gliedert sich in folgende Bereiche:
•	Industrielle Computertechnik 
(u.a. Industrie PC, Panel PC, Touch Displays, Embedded Box PC, SBC, Portable PC),
•	Industrielle Kommunikationstechnik
(u.a. Schnittstellenkarten, Geräteserver, Switche, Feldbus-/GPIB-Kontroller),
•	Mess- und Automatisierungstechnik
(u.a. Remote I/O Module, Messkarten, Steuerungen, Messgeräte, Software).

AMC bietet Ihnen für individuelle und spezifische Anforderungen auch kundenspezifische und vorgefertigte Systemlösungen an, die auf dem Stand der Technik maßgeschneidert realisiert werden.
Viele Aufgabenstellungen erfordern angepasste Lösungen, die einmalig sind und nicht „von der Stange“ geliefert werden können. Oftmals sollen dabei Prozesse automatisiert bzw. mit leistungsfähiger Messdatenerfassungstechnik kombiniert werden. Auch in der Qualitätssicherung, für die „Null-Fehler-Produktion“, zur Zustandsüberwachung von Maschinen, Anlagen und Systemen sind solche Lösungen unersetzbar. AMC realisiert Ihnen diese Systeme. Hohe Qualität, Zuverlässigkeit und Termintreue sind uns dabei selbstverständlich.

Unsere speziellen Kompetenzfelder liegen bei Systemlösungen in den Bereichen:
•	Monitoring- und Prozessleitsysteme,
•	Steuerungs- und Überwachungssysteme sowie
•	Test- und Prüfsysteme.

Name: Saveway Germany
Description:
Established in 1992 in Germany, Saveway is an international company and specializes in measuring and safety technologies. We manufacture and distribute diagnostic systems for refractory linings and other components of melting, holding and treatment equipment. Our company has forged a reputation of providing each customer with knowledge about how their particular practices influence lining life, resulting in more efficient operations and optimal safety. 
Global service is ensured by our internationally operating subsidiary companies and distribution partners. 
Based on our long term experience we develop customized solutions even for very specific applications. The close cooperation with our customers, with universities and professional associations is an important component in turning innovative ideas into practical solutions.
What began as a degree dissertation at the Technical University in Ilmenau/Germany, has become an industry-wide standard for safety.

Name: Eilersen Calibration Solutions
Description:
The EilerCal force transfer system is developed to remove the need for weights and/or water when calibrating all types of load cells. Using the EilerCal, technicians are able to frequently perform quick calibrations of installed tanks - all without water consumption, tank entry and risk of contamination.

Eilersen Calibration Solutions is a spin-out of the load cell manufacturing company Eilersen Electric Digital Systems A/S https://www.linkedin.com/company/eilersen-electric-digital-systems-a-s/

Name: Bottazzi Tech Srl
Description:
Bottazzi Tech nasce nel 1961 in un territorio tradizionalmente dedicato alla manifattura di oggetti preziosi, grazie al quale ha presto dovuto confrontarsi con esigenze crescenti provenienti da un mercato in forte ascesa.

La nostra iniziale offerta riguardava la distribuzione di strumenti di pesatura per il mercato dell'industria e del commercio, ma con la crescente richiesta di interfacciamento degli strumenti di pesatura con i neonati sistemi informatici, abbiamo sviluppato infrastrutture a supporto di questa necessità.

Agli inizi degli anni ’80 la Bottazzi Tech si dimostra così essere una delle poche aziende capaci di mettere a disposizione del mercato soluzioni industriali, sia da un punto di vista metrologico, che tecnologico.

I nostri settori di riferimento erano allora la metalmeccanica, la chimica, le gomme e le materie plastiche, il tessile, il sementiero e l’alimentare, seguite dal 1985 dalla distribuzione di strumentazione scientifica per analisi da laboratorio e dalla proposta di nuove soluzioni per il mercato dei preziosi.

Oggi Bottazzi Tech propone oltre 8000 prodotti e servizi, derivanti tanto dal potenziamento delle proprie risorse interne, quanto da importanti accordi internazionali di esclusiva e da alleanze siglate con partner professionali.

Name: Tempcontrol B.V.
Description:
Tempcontrol BV supplies customer specific temperature sensors and supplies instruments for temperature, relative humidity and dew point measurement and control. We specialise in the supply of highly accurate sensors such as thermocouples and resistance thermometers for immersion-, surface-, and air temperature measurement in standard types, or according to the customer specifications. 

For complete systems Tempcontrol offers a wide range of temperature instruments such as: digital indicators, controllers, transmitters, calibrators, calibration blocks and baths, infrared thermometers, precision thermometers and bridges.

Also we offer a fully equipped temperature calibration laboratory for research and development and a cleanroom.

Name: Custom Sensors & Technology

Name: iSPARK SRL
Description:
Plant Digital Transformation is currently a prominent trend that holds the promise of revolutionizing our industrial infrastructure by enhancing efficiency and reducing energy consumption in existing plants.

However, the reality presents challenges. The older, inefficient plants that are prime candidates for digital transformation were predominantly constructed decades ago, prior to the internet and the advent of digital networked sensor technologies. Consequently, there is a scarcity of data to fuel advanced smart applications. These plants still heavily rely on manual instruments such as analog gauges and LCD data loggers, requiring plant operators to manually collect the data.

To address these challenges, iSPARK has developed an innovative software-based sensor solution called UniFieD (Universal Field Data Reader). This solution leverages technologies like computer vision, machine learning  and Edge computing to create non-intrusive overlay solutions. It transforms data from existing non-connected instruments without the need for expensive replacements. UnifieD can be setup in a day per non-connected instrument ! 

To enable more accurate predictions, it is crucial to collect data more frequently. Analytics can only make predictions and diagnoses when they detect changes in data values. Capturing these changes as soon as possible allows for early predictions. Manually collecting data from numerous positions once a minute or even once an hour is impractical. Automating data collection through overlay sensors is an essential step in the transformation of work process.

UniFieD can also be used for many other user cases around automated visual inspections (product quality, tank level, asset status deterioration, valve troubleshooting,...).

Name: Muodim
Description:
Créée en 2021, la startup Muodim, propose de reconstituer de manière très précise des volumes de structures inaccessibles ou opaques. A l’instar de l’imagerie médicale par rayons X, ces images permettent d’interpréter un volume invisible de l’extérieur, identifier la présence de vides ou d’obstacles, distinguer différentes densités ou leurs anomalies. Muodim aide ses clients dans leurs décisions pour anticiper des difficultés d’exploitation et prévenir des risques sur la sécurité des équipes. La société propose des applications dans le génie civil, l’industrie et les géosciences.  

Cette innovation, développée par Jacques Marteau et son équipe au sein de l’Institut de Physique des Deux Infinis de Lyon (Université Claude Bernard Lyon 1, l’IN2P3 et le CNRS), détecte un flux de particules naturellement présent dans l'atmosphère, les muons. L’analyse des modifications du flux après traversée de l’objet permet la reconstruction d’images.

Name: JAWESO GmbH - Mobile Mapping Systems
Description:
Die JAWESO GmbH entwickelt und produziert hochpräzise, gleichzeitig kosteneffiziente Mobile Mapping Systeme zur digitalen Erfassung von Infrastrukturen – von Straßen und Schienen bis hin zu städtischen Räumen und Baustellen. Unsere Lösungen kombinieren modernste 360°-Bildgebung, LiDAR-Technologie und präzise GNSS/IMU-Positionierung zu einem kompakten und leistungsfähigen Gesamtsystem.

Ein besonderer Fokus liegt auf der Bildqualität: Unsere Kamerasysteme erfassen Panoramabilder mit bis zu 200 Megapixeln – gestochen scharf, selbst bei Bewegung und auch über große Distanzen hinweg. So lassen sich z.B. Verkehrsschilder aus 30Metern Entfernung oder feine Risse in der Fahrbahn zuverlässig erkennen. Diese Genauigkeit ist essenziell für die automatische Objekterkennung und KI-gestützte Schadensanalyse im Post-Processing.

Typische Einsatzbereiche:

    - Digitale Bestandsaufnahmen von Straßen, Schienen, Brücken oder Tunnelanlagen
    - BIM-gestützte Modellierung und Erstellung digitaler Zwillinge
    - Automatisierte Schadensdetektion im Bau- und Verkehrsbereich
    - Planung und Dokumentation von Telekommunikationsnetzen (z.B. FTTx)
    - Erstellung hochauflösender HD-Karten für automatisiertes und autonomes Fahren

Name: Batixt
Description:
On the road to sustainability and a green transition, in-depth knowledge of batteries is a fundamental need. Batixt paves this road with their proprietary EIS Scanning technology for battery testing, allowing you to speed up battery analytics, production and innovation or enable a more circular battery economy. 

Batixt worlds-unique innovation of R3 EIS (Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy) stands for non-invasive, Rapid, Reliable and Repeatable EIS battery testing. This Next Generation of EIS technology measures one magnitude faster than older EIS generations. This is because a single measurement in 20-300 seconds measures hundreds or thousands of frequencies in parallel. Accuracy is maintained throughout, and the class of high-resolution data delivered will propel battery knowledge to an entirely new level. 

It is important to note that Batixt EIS Scanners, besides being faster and more competent, open up for entirely new avenues in battery analytics as well as new application areas. For example, given the speed of the EIS measurements and the fact that all frequencies are measured at once, the results will reflect a single battery status. 100+ EIS scans can be performed in a state of charge sweep in hours. This type of testing is not feasible to perform on batteries, using old generation EIS technology. With older generations of EIS, the battery status will invariably change when more than one measurement is required, and even more so when a fuller frequency spectrum is to be achieved. With Batixt Next Generation of EIS technology, EIS becomes feasible also in battery manufacturing contexts where its usefulness so far has been more limited.

Batixt EIS Scanners are nothing short of a revolution and will open up for transformation over the entire battery value chain. 

Batixt first EIS Scanner CLARITY will be on the market in Spring 2025.

Description:
TEXTEST AG exists since 1969 and is a Swiss manufacturer of testing instruments for technical textiles. The main focus lies on a comprehensive family of Air Permeability Testers, a Hydrostatic Head Tester, a Water Vapor Transmission Rate Tester, and an on-line instrument for determination of air permeability and thickness at the moving web. 

The FX 3300 Air Permeability Tester LabAir IV determines the air permeability, the pressure drop and other related parameters under laboratory conditions. It complies with many national and international standard test methods and can be adapted for numerous special applications.

The FX 3340 MinAir is a compact and mobile version of the laboratory instrument.

The FX 3345 FlexAir is particularly suitable for measuring the air permeability or the pressure drop of contaminated (filter) materials. 

The FX 3360 PortAir is a portable instrument for profile measurements of air permeability, pressure drop, and thickness in the production or finishing line. 

The FX 3370 SpotAir can be used to determine the Air Permeability and the Pressure Drop in the moving production line. The same measuring module can be used hand-held, or it can be mounted to the frame of the production or finishing machine for a continuous profile measurement. 

The FX 3500 CombiScan continuously measures the air permeability or pressure drop, and, optionally, the thickness, and displays length, cross or zigzag profiles.  

The FX 3000 Hydrostatic Head Tester HydroTester IV is used for automatic determination of the water resistance of any flat material. 

The FX 3180 Water Vapor Transmission Rate Tester CupMaster automatically determines the WVTR of up to 15 samples simultaneously based on the gravimetric method.  

The FX 3250 PICK COUNTER automatically determines the thread density of woven and knitted materials up to 300/cm or 762/inch.

Name: Termo-Precyzja
Description:
Termo-Precyzja rozpoczęła działalność w 1995 roku. Aby sprostać zapotrzebowaniu naszych klientów na najwyższej jakości sprzęt, oraz wykorzystując wieloletnie doświadczenie pracowników firmy w tematyce pomiarów i automatyki przemysłowej rozpoczęliśmy produkcję przemysłowych czujników temperatury.
W standardzie oferujemy szeroki wybór średnic, długości czujników oraz osłon i przyłączy procesowych. Produkując czujniki temperatury według indywidualnych potrzeb odbiorców, stosujemy krótkie terminy realizacji nie rezygnując z dbałości o jakość. Działania te pozwalają poszerzać coraz większy krąg odbiorców naszych wyrobów. Nad procesem produkcji i jakością naszych produktów czuwa własne laboratorium pomiarowe, wyposażone w najwyższej jakości sprzęt. Między innymi kalibrator posiadający czujnik referencyjny pt100, czy kalibrator wyposażony w czujnik referencyjny – termopara typ S. Aparatura ta umożliwia również wzorcowanie takich urządzeń jak przetwornik oraz termostat. Efektem dynamicznego rozwoju firmy jest oferta stale poszerzana o nowe produkty.

Godna polecenia jest seria czujników TH z elementem pomiarowym pt100, klasy 1/3B i klasy A, mająca zastosowanie w przemyśle spożywczym, farmaceutycznym, czyli wszędzie tam gdzie wymagane są warunki sterylne w procesie technologicznym. Postanowiliśmy rozwiązać problem pomiaru temperatury ciekłych metali (aluminium, brąz, cynk) stosując osłony z SIN - azotku krzemu, wydłużające czas użytkowania termopary do 12 miesięcy.
W 2004 roku firma Termo Precyzja wdrożyła System Zarządzania Jakością według normy ISO 9001:2000 i uzyskała certyfikat. Od wielu lat uczestniczymy w najbardziej prestiżowych targach, na których z dumą prezentujemy ofertę naszej firmy.

Naszą ofertę uzupełnia przegląd aparatury przemysłowej, w tym kamery termowizyjne, przyrządy pomiarowe, pirometry, skanery liniowe, kalibratory, analizatory, rejestratory i wiele innych.

Po więcej informacji zapraszamy na http://www.termo-precyzja.com.pl/

The technical knowledge and experience matched with the long-term practical knowledge was the corner stone for the success of CS Instruments GmbH.

CS Instruments continuously invests into the further training of its staff members and in modern calibration stands for dew point/pressure dew point and flow measurement. Name: Fae Medição
Description:
Há mais de 55 anos a Fae Medição está empenhada na constante evolução e em busca da satisfação total de seus clientes.

A empresa foi fundada em 13 de Setembro de 1967, em Fortaleza, Ceará, Nordeste do Brasil, inicialmente objetivando a venda de medidores de energia mecânicos visando atender o mercado brasileiro, da América do Sul e Central, além do asiático.

No decorrer dos anos a FAE diversificou seu portfólio, passando a fabricar outros produtos, como parafusos, secadores de cabelo, aspiradores portáteis, disjuntores, tesouras e conectores elétricos.

Em 2000, expandiu seu expertise e desenvolveu sua primeira linha de hidrômetros e adentrou-se no ramo de medição de água, dando início a uma nova etapa. Com os novos medidores e hidrômetros a FAE conquistou importantes clientes e uma veloz penetração no novo mercado.

Com o passar dos anos, alinhada com as tendências do mercado e sempre intensificando recursos em P&D, a FAE desenvolveu um corpo técnico especializado e dispõe de uma linha de produção alinhada com os padrões de qualidade internacionais.

Na FAE Sistemas de Medição sabemos que para você é importante rapidez e confiabilidade na aquisição de hidrômetros. Para fazer isso, você precisa ter a garantia da exata especificação técnica e de prazos que atendam sua necessidade. A falta de apoio e confiabilidade na aquisição de hidrômetros é um problema frequente. Acreditamos que a compra de hidrômetros não precisa ser algo complexo. Entendemos que a insegurança técnica, a baixa qualidade do produto e a demora na entrega são fatores de insatisfação, que frustram a sua compra. Dessa forma, a nossa contribuição em fornecer todas as ferramentas e desenvolver um atendimento prático de sua demanda, é o nosso maior compromisso. É por isso que, contamos com uma equipe qualificada e técnica para oferecer todo o suporte durante o processo de compra e pós-venda.

Name: SirenOpt
Description:
SirenOpt helps manufacturers make better, safer, and more reliable micro- and nano-materials. These materials are the building blocks of critical sectors of the global economy such as batteries, computer chips, , aircraft components, and power systems.  Surging material demand and growing complexity are pushing production to unprecedented scales and speeds, leaving manufacturers effectively flying blind. Small, undetected variations during production lead to wastage, lower performance, higher costs, and safety risks.

SirenOpt is changing this. Our manufacturing intelligence platform scans materials, revealing critical internal information without damaging them. Using a novel combination of cold atmospheric plasma, physics-informed machine learning, and predictive analytics, SirenOpt creates unique, real-time fingerprints that capture material signals no other method can access. These insights give manufacturers unprecedented visibility into how materials behave as they are made.

We turn hidden data into actionable intelligence to help manufacturers reduce variability and thus increase yield and performance. The technology can be deployed as a standalone tool or integrated directly into factory production lines. 

SirenOpt is currently deploying early versions of its platform with some of the largest industrial manufacturers in the world across North America, Europe, and Asia. Our first commercial product will be released in 2026.


SirenOpt was founded in 2022 as a spin-out from the UC Berkeley Chemical Engineering Department. SirenOpt is supported by the UC Berkeley Skydeck, Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory Cyclotron Road and Activate science-driven startup accelerator programs.  SirenOpt is also supported by a BRIDGE Grant from the California Energy Commission.

For employment opportunities please visit our careers page: https://www.sirenopt.com/careers

Description:

Name: SIKA
Description:
Precise. Personal. Genuine. Since 1901.

For over 120 years, we have been developing smart measurement and calibration solutions for industrial applications worldwide. What began as a glass instrument workshop in Kassel is now a medium-sized high-tech company with more than 340 employees and customers in over 80 countries.

We make measurement simple – and reliable.

Whether it’s temperature, flow, or pressure: our products perform because we listen, think ahead, and continuously improve. SIKA is not loud, but precise. Not pretentious, but honest. Not arbitrary, but grounded.
Our solutions are created where people tackle real challenges – from heat pumps and data centers to the marine sector and calibration laboratories. That’s where we bring our experience, care, and passion for innovation. Always with the ambition to truly understand the application and deliver the right solution.

From Northern Hesse. For the world.

We develop, manufacture, and calibrate in Kaufungen near Kassel. From here, we ship to Europe, Asia, and the Americas. And even though we think globally, our roots matter. Because they give us what many are looking for – identity, reliability, and character.

Technology with principles.

What defines SIKA isn’t written on paper – it shows in our daily interactions, both internally and externally: respect, commitment, clarity. We speak directly and believe in long-term relationships rather than short-term gains.
We rely on team spirit, responsibility, and the willingness to challenge the status quo. That’s how we create products you can count on – even under the toughest conditions.

We are ready. For what’s to come.

We invest in research, digitalization, and new markets.
With smart measurement technology, we help ensure energy is used more efficiently, processes are controlled more safely, and technologies are applied responsibly.

In short: We measure what matters.

Name: HTA S.r.l.
Description:
When it comes to designing and manufacturing robotics solutions, there’s no company more dedicated, experienced and knowledgeable about the industry than HTA. 

We offer an extensive collection of analyzer front-ends and sample preparation workstations designed specifically to fit applications in analytical chemistry, life sciences and clinical laboratories. This even includes Gas Chromatography (GC), Liquid Chromatography (HPLC, UHPLC, NanoLC, Preparative LC, and IC), Mass Spectrometry (MS) and Spectroscopy (ICP-OES,ICP-MS, FAAS and Flame Photometers).

It all started with our GC and MS techniques, where we provide the widest range of autosampler models available on the market, including all of the popular injection techniques such as liquid, headspace and SPME.

Our fastest growing business line however is our sample preparation workstations. These provide automatic sampling preparation which includes liquid handling, filtration or purification steps (including Solid Phase Extraction), vessel handling (weighing, capping/uncapping, and vortex), identification (BCR and RFID) and sample conditioning (cooling and heating).

If you’re looking to boost the productivity of your lab, look no further than premier an HTA automated device. Manufactured in Italy under a certified UNI EN ISO 9001:2015 and 13485:2016 quality management system, our products are not only superior, they’re made available worldwide through our distributor and OEM partners.

Name: SENTEA Fiber Optic Sensing
Description: SENTEA has the ambition to become a market leader in fiber optic sensor interrogators leveraging the benefits of Silicon Photonics. Fiber optic sensing allows for highly accurate and robust structural health monitoring solutions, predicting and preventing failures even in the most harsh environments. Thanks to the use of Silicon Photonics, wind farms, civil structures, industry and transport will benefit from Sentea’s cost-effective fiber optic sensor interrogators.

Name: Rheolution

Name: H2scan Corporation
Description:
H2scan was founded in 2002 and has its headquarters, sales, production, and marketing staff in Valencia, California. The Company provides the most accurate, tolerant, and affordable hydrogen leak detection and process gas monitoring solutions for industrial markets enabling accurate monitoring and control functions for a wide range of applications, including control systems, safety monitoring and alarm systems. H2scan also provides portable, handheld configurations for easy leak detection and monitoring. 

H2scan's hydrogen specific sensing systems based on a patented "Chip on a flex" technology are able to detect and measure hydrogen without false readings or expensive support equipment required. This makes it ideal for the NeSSI platform. H2scan’s process systems have the ability to operate in real-time, with or without the presence of oxygen, no interference from CO or H2S, separating H2scan from all other in-line measuring technologies.  The leak detector sensing systems are able to detect hydrogen in air down to 15 ppm concentration without cross-sensitivities to other gases.

The company’s solid-state technology was originated at Sandia National Laboratory and the U.S. Department of Energy and is only available commercially through H2scan. Its products are sold in over 50 countries worldwide. For more information, please visit www.h2scan.com.

Name: ALVIM Srl
Description:
ALVIM provides innovative, high-tech solutions for detection and monitoring of bacterial biofilm in industrial plants. ALVIM Technology is currently used in more than 30 Countries, in the five Continents, and every day it helps the Technical Staff in charge of cleaning and sanitation treatments, in different industrial fields, to optimize such procedures and to prevent biofilm-related issues, ranging from microbial corrosion (MIC) to Legionella risk.

The layer of bacteria (biofilm) that forms on surfaces in contact with water and other liquids is a major problem in many industrial applications. Indeed, it causes several issues: 
- microbial corrosion (MIC); 
- decreased efficiency of heat exchangers (loss of 30% and more);
- proliferation of pathogens (90% of bacteria live in biofilms);
- many many more.

The ALVIM real-time, on line, Biofilm Monitoring System is able to detect bacterial settlement since its first phases (down to 1% of surface covered by microorganisms) and, based on these data, to manually or automatically adjust and optimize cleaning treatments / biocide treatments (in industrial water systems, cooling towers, pure water lines, etc.) allowing to check, at the same time, the efficacy of the cleaning.

Among the advantages of the ALVIM Technology:
> early warning detection of bacterial biofilm growing on pipelines, tanks, heat exchangers, RO membranes, ...
> while fouling sensors detect "generic deposit", ALVIM probes detect bacterial biofilm
> optimization of cleaning and sanitation treatments (biocides, disinfectants, ...)
> easy to install, easy to operate
> virtually maintenance-free probe
> real-time, continuous biofilm monitoring
> high sensitivity
> modular, scalable system

More info at http://www.alvim.it

With more than 10.4 million homes on clay soils and many structures in a worsening state of health, it is crucial to act quickly to prevent potential disasters.  Inspired by a tragic event in Marseille and the ease of use of a smartphone, we have developed innovative connected solutions for structural monitoring of buildings. Our goal is to provide accurate data on cracks, tilt movements and moisture, enabling real-time remote monitoring to anticipate damage.  At FEELBAT, we offer Plug&Play tools for the prevention and monitoring of structural problems. Our range of DELTA Feel sensors are designed for easy, connected use with your smartphone. Name: Palas GmbH

PALAS - THE EXPERTS IN AEROSOL TECHNOLOGY

Palas was founded in 1983 and employs around 100 people at its headquarters in Karlsruhe.	

OUR CORE COMPETENCIES

o Expertise in the generation and measurement of particles and aerosols
o Development, production and sales of
o High-precision devices for generating and characterizing particles
o Certified measuring devices for regulatory use
o Modular-built, application-specific test systems
o Transfer and know-how through training courses and seminars

Name: BioIntelligence Technologies
Description:
BioIntelligence Technologies Inc. improves industrial bioprocesses in real-time for higher throughput, reproducibility, and profitability.

𝐁𝐢𝐨𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞’𝐬 𝐜𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐫𝐬 are producers of industrial biochemical, biofuel, food additives, biofertilizers, alternative proteins, cosmetics, biologics, etc. Actually, any production using microorganisms in a tank. They use the BioIntelligence Analytics Solution to de-risk bioprocess scale-ups and maximize full-scale profitability while increasing confidence in product quality.

𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐁𝐢𝐨𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐀𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐲𝐭𝐢𝐜𝐬 𝐒𝐨𝐥𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐢𝐬 𝐚 𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐧𝐤𝐞𝐲 𝐬𝐨𝐥𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 developed by our team to measure in-line the metabolic activity of bacteria, yeast, molds, and cells in fermenters and bioreactors, and to perform advanced customized analytics in real-time, providing key performance indicators to operators and plant managers through customizable dashboards. 

With the BioIntelligence Analytics Solution, 𝐨𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐬 can eliminate process deviations, anticipate contaminations and infections, and maximize productivity in real-time. In a nutshell, operators take better decisions faster, increasing overall conversion yield and throughput of industrial bioprocesses. 

𝐏𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐑&𝐃 automatically learn from the analytics applied on a series of industrial productions, enabling them to find the root cause of variability and of bad batches, moving toward the ideal batch.

Name: ZENNER International
Description:
Die ZENNER International GmbH & Co. KG ist ein weltweit führender Anbieter innovativer Lösungen für Stadtwerke, Energieversorger und Kommunen. Rund um die Digitalisierung der Smart City entwickelt und produziert das Unternehmen Messtechnik zur Erfassung des Wasser-, Wärme- und Gasverbrauches sowie digitale Lösungen für das Internet der Dinge (IoT).

ZENNER richtet den Fokus ganz auf die Digitalisierung.  Von der Messtechnik und Sensorik über die LoRaWAN-Infrastruktur und Datendienste bis zur fertigen Applikation bietet ZENNER alles aus einer Hand. Mit jährlich weit über 10 Millionen produzierter Messgeräte und Sensoren sowie der Erfahrung aus über 350 erfolgreichen IoT-Projekten nimmt ZENNER eine Vorreiterrolle im Bereich Smart City ein.

Die Kunden von ZENNER sind Energieversorger,  Stadtwerke und Kommunen ebenso wie Industrieunternehmen, Großhändler und Messdienstleister. 

Zum Portfolio von ZENNER gehören smarte Wohnungs-, Haus- und Großwasserzähler, Wärmezähler, Gaszähler und moderne Systemtechnik. Eine weitere Stärke von ZENNER liegt in der Entwicklung und Realisierung von IoT-Lösungen für die Sektoren Smart Metering und Submetering, Smart Building, Smart Grid und Smart City - vom Sensor bis zur fertigen Applikation. Dabei gehen Digitalisierung und Nachhaltigkeit Hand in Hand.

ZENNER trägt mit seinen Lösungen dazu bei, Städte und Gemeinden bei der Digitalisierung zu unterstützen. Gemeinsam mit seinen Kunden arbeitet das Unternehmen an Zukunftsthemen wie Nachhaltigkeit und Klimaneutralität. Dafür entwickelt ZENNER in einem kontinuierlichen Wissenstransfer intelligente Komplettlösungen und Geschäftsmodelle für die digitale Zukunft - mit dem Fokus auf das Ziel eines klimaneutralen Europas bis 2050.

ZENNER, mit Hauptsitz in Saarbrücken, betreibt Produktionsstätten in Europa, Asien und den USA und ist weltweit mit 60 Standorten vor Ort. 1903 gegründet, gehört ZENNER heute zur internationalen Minol-ZENNER-Gruppe, die weltweit über 4.250 Mitarbeiter beschäftigt.

Name: MCS ENGINEERING
Description:
We are a solution driven organization. Our engineers have an eye for your product and process and are experienced in finding the best solution, always keeping your requirements (reliability, affordability and precision) our priority. 

Our principle: Knowledge counts but common sense matters. 

MCS Engineering offers (custom made) QCS systems for a wide variety of industries. 
Our standard measurements are: 
-	Basis weight (source and X-ray)
-	(Non) contact thickness (floating caliper)
-	Moisture (microwave and IR)
-	Visual detection (matrix and line scan), system requires NO teaching! Easy to operate
-	Coating thickness (IR)
-	Porosity 
-	Ash content (X-ray)
-	Color
-	Temperature

We offer: 
-	Complete new QCS systems
-	Upgrade obsolete QCS systems
-	Expand/improve running QCS systems 

If a standard measurement does not fit your requirements, we are more than happy to develop a solution for you. We are well experienced in developing some eye popping, jaw dropping custom made QCS systems. In these developments your experience and input are of great value.  
Our systems are provided with HMI (KISS for production, fully adjustable and accessible for engineers). However, if required, we can communicate with every system in your plant, enabling  to integrate our signal in your factory HMI. 
Our main office is in Zelhem (Gelderland, Netherlands) but we provide QCS systems world-wide.

Name: Beijing Precision Wave Instrument Co., Ltd.
Description:
Beijing Precision Wave Instrument Co., Ltd (hereinafter referred to as PW)was established in 2004 by Mr. Xue Zhiyong in  Beijing, China. Mr. Xue was a professional technician, He has rich industry experience, which made him keenly aware that China's industry is developing at an astonishing speed. So he founded the company with great ambition.

After years, in addition to the production base, PW has 4 offices in China, located in Nanning, Chengdu, Tianjin and Shenyang, China.In 2016, according to the regulations of the Beijing government, all production bases need to be relocated, and PW production base was also moved to Xianghe County, which is close to the suburbs.

PW have independently developed, produced and sold 120Ghz, 80Ghz, 26Ghz non-contact radar level meters, guided wave radar level meters, ultrasonic level meters, ultrasonic open channel flow meters, radio frequency admittance level switches, capacitance level switches, tuning fork level switches and other products. They are widely used in petroleum, chemical, metallurgy, steel, coal, water supply, pharmaceuticals, food...and etc. fields. Among them, our 80Ghz non-contact radar level meter is at the leading level in the Chinese market due to its high stability and the PW  professional after-sales service.

At the same time, we began to provide full solutions in the hydrology and water conservancy industry. Therefore, PW established a new production base in Tianjin for the production and testing of radar water level meters, radar flow meters, radar flow meters, ultrasonic water level meters, ultrasonic flow meters etc. Our products are used in a large number of hydrology and water conservancy, smart cities, agricultural irrigation and other projects throughout China.

In 2022, we began to fully embrace the global market and are winning more reputation. PW will keep moving forward and provide satisfactory high-tech products and services to customers in the global market. This is our constant pursuit.

Name: KARL DEUTSCH Austria GmbH
Description: Welcome to KARL DEUTSCH Austria GmbH a 100% daughter of KARL DEUTSCH in Wuppertal, Germany. The privately owned company KARL DEUTSCH was founded in 1949 and develops and produces instruments for non-destructive material testing. Portable instruments, stationary testing systems, sensors and crack detection liquids are produces by 130 motivated employees in two works in Wuppertal. Additional 20 employees in international offices and a worldwide network of dealers support the export business which accounts for more than 50% of the turnover. Our customers are metal producing and processing industries, e.g. steel works, automotive companies and bearing manufacturers. Typical test tasks are ultrasonic weld testing, detection of shrink holes in castings, crack detection in forgings with magnetic particles and dye penetrants, safety components for railway and aerospace as well as the wall and coating thickness measurement.

Name: NIVUS AFRICA
Description:
NIVUS Africa is pleased to announce its establishment in Cairo, poised to offer dedicated service, support, and technical assistance, as well as to furnish integrated and unique solutions for our partners in Africa and the Middle East in the realms of sewage management, drinking water supply, and irrigation systems.
As a region profoundly impacted by drought and water contamination, Africa faces substantial challenges in securing clean and sustainable water sources. It is our belief that, through leveraging our expertise in measurement technology and service solutions, we can make a decisive and positive impact on the optimization of the water cycle in this region.
To better address the complex and varied challenges on the ground and to tailor the most effective solutions, we are establishing a robust presence in Cairo, led by Managing Director Nabil El Kadsi. This strategic move is geared towards fostering closer collaborations and driving innovative solutions in partnership with our esteemed associate, Measuring and Control (MAC).
We are eager to deepen our existing partnerships and to forge new alliances as we endeavour to enhance environmental sustainability through expert instrumentation, automation, and flow meter solutions.
Join us as we embark on this critical mission, equipped with the conviction that our concerted efforts can usher in a future of improved water management in Africa and the Middle East.

Name: Orthodyne Analytical USA
Description:
We are a leading company active in the gas chromatography sector. 

We started as a family business and today, from our headquarters in Alleur (Belgium), we export around 95% of our production. This can be achieved via national sales and distributors on every continent. In addition, we work in cooperation with all major producers and suppliers of industrial gas throughout the world.

We started in the 1920s manufacturing wireless radio sets. Now, we evolved into a whole new field of technology and innovation. For almost 30 years our company was involved in the wireless business, but this dwindled in the early 1950s as transistor radios imported from America brought the curtain down on the firm’s wireless activities.

We then began producing appliances to measure impurities in argon used for welding. These chromatographs were fitted with a detector using high frequency discharges to serve in steel plants in the Liege region of Belgium.
Our product range grew to include new high purity detectors for industrial and laboratory applications. We played a ‘pioneering role’ in this field, following this up by further broadening our product range and developing in-house analytical software and our own ‘engineering’ department among others.

Name: Cignus Instruments AS
Description:
Cignus is industrialising a novel and patented concept for mass-flow measurements of gases and liquids with particular advantage for applications within the emerging H2 and CCS economies.

Our technology is developed in close partnership with major energy companies and equipment suppliers with global ambitions and greatly motivated by the green transition.

Name: Reckmann GmbH | Temperatursensorik und Kalibrierlabor
Description: Seit der Firmengründung im Jahr 1970 haben wir uns zu einem der führenden Herstellern von Temperatursensoren entwickelt. Mit mehr als 180 Mitarbeiter/-innen produzieren wir am Standort Hagen (Nordrhein-Westfalen) Temperatursensoren wie Mantelthermoelemente, Thermoelemente und Widerstandsthermometer. Um unseren Kunden ein Höchstmaß an Qualität zu gewährleisten, besteht bereits seit 1995 ein Qualitätsmanagementsystem nach DIN EN ISO 9001 und das Umweltmanagementsystem gemäß DIN EN 14001.

Name: U-Sense.IT srl
Description: U-Sense.IT is  an innovative start-up, formerly a spin-off of the Polytechnic University of Marche, Italy. Since 2020 It Is targeting the specific market of optical/image sensors for inline quality control. Its vision is to provide SMART measurement systems to enhance the operator in the Digitally Connected World.

Name: Bela Instruments
Description: Bela Instruments (BI) is a leading process automation solutions provider headquartered in Mumbai. It has an all India presence and has been in this field for more tahn 36 years. Being largely research oriented, in fact 1of every 4 employees is involved in R & D. A large number of innovative products have resulted.

Name: MI Spekter
Description:
ABOUT:
Development and production of innovative complex measuring instruments like Portable appliance testers (PAT), Machinery testers, High voltage dielectric testers, Welding machine testers, EVSE adapters, etc. 
Additional custom services:
- Hardware development
- Software development
- Assembly of PCBs / mechanical & electro-mechanical devices

All testing equipment developed and produced by MI Spekter is in accordance with the latest functional and safety standards like IEC/EN 61557, IEC/EN 60204-1, IEC/HD 60364-7-722, EN 50678/DIN VDE 0701, IEC/EN 61010, IEC/EN 61326-1 and others.

OUR PEOPLE:
We are strategists, engineers, constructors, production specialists … . A team full of talented enthusiasts, who enjoy coming to work every day, motivated to deliver real results, every time.

Our engineers are passionate, open-minded, data-driven techies, and very enthusiastic when it comes to new technologies or inventions.

We are concerned about the well-being of our employees and work towards maintaining a pleasant environment in all our departments. We believe that happy people are more creative and innovative at work, and are the key to creating new stories of innovation.

Recently we expanded the research & development department as well as production capacities and increased the number of employees in all areas of the business. Today we employ more than 35 dedicated people, with our relatively small size making us more effective.

Name: flucon fluid control GmbH
Description:
flucon fluid control GmbH is an innovator of measuring technology for fluids. Our company is based in 37431 Bad Lauterberg/Barbis, Germany.

flucon‘s portfolio consists of the following instruments:
- Q-Vis inline viscometer,
- CGS inline aeration meter,
- FOAM aeration test rig,
- LAMBDA thermal conductivity meter (ASTM D7896),
- EPSILON+ electrical conductivity, permittivity and DDF meter (DIN 51111),
- E-Lub Tester for electrical analysis and breakdown testing of lubricants.

We also offer temperature- and pressure-dependent fluid analyses in our unique High-Pressure Fluid Laboratory as part of our service sector.


flucon GmbH | Experts in fluids since 1991.

Name: Instrumatic USA
Description: Instrumatic is a company formed by engineers and technicians from the industrial instrumentation area, with extensive technical experience in automation projects, installation and maintenance. Our expertise comes from several industrial segments and processes, such as: sugar & ethanol, aluminum, mining, oil & gas, pulp & paper, food, among others.

Name: CryoTechnics LLC
Description:
CryoTechnics LLC specializes in low-temperature thermometry and cryogenic devices for medical equipment, aerospace propulsion, liquefied natural gas, cryopump technology, superconductivity, and quantum computing.

We employ innovative design and manufacturing strategies that enable us to support both legacy systems and state-of-the-art applications with high quality and cost-effective products and solutions.

The team at CT possesses a broad range of research and product development skills. We have decades of experience in not only cryogenic technology but also specialty packaging, process design, and instrumentation.

CT is committed to providing the high level of service and customer satisfaction made possible by a small, highly knowledgeable, and motivated staff of scientists and engineers.

Name: SGM LEKTRA srl
Description:
SGM LEKTRA è sinonimo di affidabilità e innovazione dal 1977. 
Progettiamo e realizziamo strumenti per il controllo di livello, portata, analisi chimica, pressione e temperatura, al servizio dei processi industriali, del ciclo integrato delle acque e dei settori agroalimentare e molitorio.

Soluzioni su misura, qualità costruttiva e responsabilità ambientale guidano ogni nostro progetto: utilizziamo materiali riciclati per ridurre l’impatto ambientale e sviluppiamo strumenti PFAS free, nel rispetto delle persone e dell’ambiente.

Il nostro laboratorio interno di Ricerca & Sviluppo, in collaborazione con il mondo universitario, integra costantemente tecnologie innovative e sostenibili per rispondere in modo efficace alle esigenze di ogni applicazione e processo.

Trasformiamo la misura in valore, per rendere ogni processo più efficiente, sicuro e sostenibile.
_________________________________________________________________________________

SGM LEKTRA has stood for reliability and innovation since 1977. 
We design and manufacture instruments for the measurement and control of level, flow, chemical analysis, pressure and temperature, supporting industrial processes, the integrated water cycle, and the agri-food and milling sectors.

Tailor-made solutions, high build quality and environmental responsibility guide every project: we use recycled materials to reduce environmental impact and develop PFAS-free instruments, with respect for people and the environment.

Our in-house Research & Development laboratory, working in collaboration with the academic world, continuously integrates innovative and sustainable technologies to effectively meet the needs of each application and process.

We turn measurement into value, making every process more efficient, safe and sustainable.

Name: Elemetrics scientific instruments
Description:
Elemetrics is dedicated to the distribution of measurement products.
We exclusively represent certified international brands, making continuous innovation available to sensor technology and measurement, as well as data management and transmission.
We provide wide range of measuring products including solar radiation, anemometers, pluviometers, sonometers, temperature and humidity, dew point, air & liquid flow, combustion, differential pressure, pressure, liquid level, air quality, etc.
We operate in the renewable energy sector, in hydrology, in environmental monitoring, in the prevention of natural events and disasters, in precision agriculture, in infrastructure control.
We provide complete solutions for the process industry, for HVAC, in the pharmaceutical industry up to the food industry, for water cycle management, for intelligent buildings and for safety at work.
We provide solutions that can meet the needs of the present without compromising the ability of future generations.

Name: Morbee Industry
Description:
Morbee Industry, endüstriyel dijitalleşme, veri analitiği ve otomasyon çözümleri alanında faaliyet gösteren yenilikçi bir teknoloji firmasıdır.
Üretim hatlarından elde edilen verilerin anlamlandırılması, süreçlerin optimize edilmesi ve sürdürülebilir verimlilik sağlanması için uçtan uca çözümler geliştiriyoruz.

Vizyonumuz; sanayide dijital dönüşümü hızlandırarak, firmaların karar alma süreçlerini veriye dayalı hale getirmek.

 Uzmanlık Alanlarımız:
• Endüstriyel Veri Toplama & Analiz
• IoT ve Dijital Dönüşüm Çözümleri
• Üretim İzleme ve Optimizasyon Sistemleri
• Yapay Zeka Destekli Süreç Analitiği



Morbee Industry is an innovative technology company operating in the fields of industrial digitalization, data analytics, and automation solutions.
We develop end-to-end solutions to interpret data collected from production lines, optimize processes, and ensure sustainable efficiency.

Our vision is to accelerate digital transformation in the industry and enable companies to make data-driven decisions.

 Areas of Expertise:
• Industrial Data Acquisition & Analysis
• IoT and Digital Transformation Solutions
• Production Monitoring & Optimization Systems
• AI-Powered Process Analytics

Name: PhoenixTM GmbH
Description:
PhoenixTM GmbH - Temperature measurement

For over 10 years now, we‘re designing and manufacturing temperature measurement systems for the heat treatment industry.

Providing solutions for various industrial sectors including heat treatment of aluminium and steel, ranging from raw materials to finished products, such as carburizing automotive components. Other applications include Paint and Powder Coating, Food Processing (HACCP), Glass Processing and Ceramic Firing.

Protected by a thermal barrier, the data logger travels through the process and thermocouples measure the product temperature. A historic temperature record (profile graph or TUS) is collected which then can be analysed using industry specific software to generate AMS2750G and CQI-9 compliant reports.

Understand, control, optimize and certify your furnace process to guarantee product quality, process operation efficiency and regulatory compliance.

Name: Everest Polska Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Everest Polska specializes in Remote Visual Inspection. Based on the products of Everest VIT (now Waygate Technologies) and other manufacturers of professional RVI equipment we solve problems related to visual inspections in the industry. Innovative Everest VIT products enable inspection of entire systems, machines, devices and infrastructure in the safest, fastest and most economically effective way. Our tools are essential for conducting examination wherever safety, accuracy and precision are the basic requirements, such as in aviation, oil&gas, energy, production, processing or activities ensuring public safety.

We sell, service and advise on the selection of RVI equipment, and we also have a pool of equipment for rent for our clients.

The Mentor Visual IQ+ by Waygate Technologies is an industrial videoscope designed for precision and efficiency in remote visual inspections. 
Equipped with an HD sensor, interchangeable probes, and an intuitive touchscreen interface, it ensures unparalleled image clarity and ease of use. 
Its advanced software offers real-time 3D measurement and data analysis, while features like secure Cloud integration enhance workflow and collaboration.
Ideal for industries such as aerospace, energy, and manufacturing.

Name: VacuTec Meßtechnik GmbH
Description: VacuTec develops and markets a wide spectrum of ionization chambers and counter tubes which are used for medical applications, measurements in industry, environmental monitoring and analyses.

Name: Collaborative Testing Services (CTS)
Description:
Founded in 1971, Collaborative Testing Services (CTS) is a leading proficiency testing provider that serves the evolving quality assurance needs of several industries with innovative interlaboratory proficiency testing.

With worldwide clients in both the public and private sectors, we aim to create and administer sustainable and meaningful testing schemes in both our industry and forensic programs. 

We currently offer accredited industry proficiency testing for agriculture, color, containerboard, fasteners and metals, paper, plastics, rubber, and wine, and accredited forensics proficiency testing for drug analysis, forensic biology and DNA, firearms and toolmarks, latent prints and impressions, questioned documents, trace evidence, toxicology, crime scene analysis, digital and multimedia evidence, and forensic anthropology—all organized by our skilled, full-time technical staff.

In addition to our commitment to quality proficiency testing, we are dedicated to leadership in our industry. As a 100% employee-owned small business, we foster a growth-oriented culture where our staff are empowered by their colleagues and motivated by their direct contributions to our success.

CTS is ANAB-accredited to ISO/IEC 17043:2023.

Name: Calex Electronics
Description:
Since 1973, Calex has been providing high quality, cost effective temperature measurement and power conversion solutions for industries worldwide. Our in-house design and manufacturing is focused on innovative non-contact infrared temperature sensors.

We also offer a wide range of complementary products including temperature indicators, PID controllers, blackbody calibrators, thermocouples, resistance thermometers, and DC/DC converters.

Name: Benchmark Instrumentation and Analytical Services
Description: We are an industry leading product representation company focused on sampling, measuring, and monitoring instrumentation and analytic equipment.

Name: DOSIM
Description:

Name: Setpoint Building Automation
Description:
Setpoint Building Automation Inc. believes that a properly installed Building Automation System starts with an excellent design and installation, backed by accurate programming, commissioning and above all, superior service and support. Our Setpoint Team strives to exceed your expectations and are committed to earning your business. 

We service and install Reliable Controls Building Automation Systems (BAS) in Greater Toronto Area, Niagara, Hamilton, Barrie, Caledon, Collingwood, Muskoka, Peterborough, Oshawa, Durham region, and York regions.

Name: ReFlow Technologies
Description:
In today’s industrial landscape, manufacturing and process-based industries struggle with inefficiency, unoptimised operations, and poor visibility into their production data. Operators rely on manual monitoring and delayed reporting, resulting in increased downtime, inconsistent quality, and avoidable energy wastage.
Despite having modern machinery, most industries lack an integrated system that can translate raw process data into actionable insights in real time. This gap prevents decision-makers from improving productivity, reducing losses, and achieving sustainable performance.
ReFlow Technologies bridges this gap by providing AI-driven process monitoring and optimisation solutions that empower industries to understand, predict, and enhance their operations  in real time, with measurable results.

Name: MESEL REGULACION Y CONTROL
Description:
Desde el año 1964, en MESEL S.L nos dedicamos al diseño, fabricación e integración de elementos y sistemas de control para la medida y control de 
temperatura en procesos industriales. 
Desarrollamos una solución personalizada y global ante necesidades especiales, ofreciendo una respuesta ágil y eficaz.
Nuestra amplia experiencia nos avala, presentándonos además como mucho más que un distribuidor de productos de las más prestigiosas marcas, ofreciendo un asesoramiento completo y cubriendo un amplio espectro dentro de nuestro sector.

Nuestro catálogo de productos abarca las resistencias eléctricas, sondas de temperatura, instrumentación, cables de alta temperatura y un sinfín más de productos.

Para más información no dude en consultar nuestra web o póngase en contacto al +34 933088558

Name: WinTek srl
Description: WinTek is an engineering company specialized in the development of tools, methods, and techniques for the analysis of dynamic systems, with applications in sectors such as automotive, aerospace, consumer electronics, and telecommunications. Our solid experience and knowledge of the most innovative technologies enable us to develop turnkey measurement systems, starting from customized consulting and design services.

Name: CALMET
Description:
Innovative-Developing Enterprise "Calmet" Ltd. was founded in 1989 by designers from Calibrators Laboratory of Lumel's Research & Development Centre. It was arisen for meet the needs of designing, production, selling and servicing a new kind of calibrators and electric equipment testers. Name Calmet derive from words CALibrators and METrology - the main action's field of Calmet company. For several years, about 70% of our sale has made export, mainly to EU and Asia countries. Topic of export are:

equipment sold by using our own brand Calmet,
special order realized projects,
equipment sold by using brand of other companies.

Equipment designed and produced by us, are used in many laboratories all over the world using brand many different companies or our own Calmet as well. It is possible thanks to our big experience in designing, production and servicing of new electronics and computers technology devices.

Traditionally we specialize in electrical power quantities generating – calibrators of voltages, currents and power. Since 1996 we have also busy with testing electricity meters and power network parameters analysing – meters testers, standard meters and connected with them network parameters meters. Since 2002 we have involved in generating and measuring network quality parameters - calibrators, network quality recorders and analysers. Since 2006 we have been also interested in automation of electro-utility automatic protective equipment testing - relays and modern digital protection. 

We work according to ISO 9001:2015 Quality System

Name: Asia Technology & Engineering Pte Ltd
Description:
Established in 1998 in Singapore, ATE is now a leading ISO9001 certified specialist company for process & environmental instrumentation and analytical systems integration. Not only a preferred engineering services provider for instrumentation, control and analyzer, ATE also distribute various internationally proven brands of process & environmental instrumentation and analytical instruments.

Since its inception in 1998, ATE has been providing process & environmental instrumentation and analytical systems integration for process and environmental industries including oil & gas, petrochemicals & chemicals, pharmaceutical, power generation, onshore & offshore facilities and water treatment plants. Today ATE is recognized as one of the most established leading system integrators for process and environmental analytical systems in Asia.

Name: CONATEC
Description: CONATEC helps its customers to control its processes and business through two differentiated product lines: high quality temperature sensors and customised process control electronic interfaces.

Name: KUNTZE INSTRUMENTS LIMITED
Description:
Kuntze Instruments is a German, family-owned company established in 1945, specializing in the design and manufacture of high-quality water analysis solutions. With over 80 years of experience, Kuntze is renowned for its in-house production of electrochemical sensors and integrated measurement systems, serving a global market across Europe, North America, and Asia .

Kuntze's primary expertise lies in producing sensors for monitoring key water quality parameters, including:

Disinfectants: Free chlorine, total chlorine, chlorine dioxide, ozone, and hydrogen peroxide

pH and Redox Potential (ORP)

Conductivity

Gases: Chlorine, ozone, and chlorine dioxide

Name: MIB GmbH
Description:
We are the manufacturer of ultrasonic flow measurement systems under the brand name Flowmax. 
Thanks to our innovative design and the use of premium materials, our solutions deliver reliable and highly accurate measurements across a variety of industries. Whether in chemicals, (bio)pharmaceuticals, water management, or food processing – our Flowmax systems are versatile, robust, and built for demanding applications.
Interested in seeing if your industry can benefit from our technology? Discover our full product range and learn more at www.mib-gmbh.com.

Name: HyperAxes
Description: HyperAxes is building the OS for real-time underwater intelligence. Installable. Scalable. Already validated in critical infrastructure and defence scenarios.

Name: Instrument Control Center (ICC) Manufacturing
Description: ICC has been supporting a wide range of industries, applications, and technologies. With more than 20 years of experience in these areas, we offer solutions that range from simple push button stations to complete plant-wide control systems. We can provide new solutions as well as seamless integration with your existing systems.

Name: PMK America Corporation
Description:
PMK is an international manufacturer of electrical measurement components, equipment, probes and accessories. 

With over 30 years of experience in developing state-of-the-art, high quality probing solutions, PMK is well established with leading vendors for measurement equipment world wide. 

We are always open to discuss your special requirements to create your unique customized probing solutions. 

Our world wide network enables our customers easy access to our solutions. Since 2022 PMK is also available in local time zones for customers from the Americas with the new subsidiary PMK America Corporation based in Portland, Oregon, USA. 

Our probing portfolio from the Americas is complemented with high voltage and with AC/DC current probing solutions from IWATSU ELECTRIC Co. LTD, Japan.

Name: IC Controls
Description: Instrumentation for Extreme Environments - IC Controls is a Canadian manufacturer and distributor of process water sensors, analyzers, and calibration standards. Our online process analysis products are designed to excel in the most demanding applications. Having been a manufacturer of industrial online sensors for over 40 years, we are also one of the world’s longest-standing distributors of Thermo Fisher Scientific Orion process products. Our portfolio covers online measurements such as pH & ORP, Conductivity (including salinity, resistivity, high purity and % concentration), Total Dissolved Solids (TDS), Dissolved Oxygen (DO), Chlorine, Specific Ion (including sodium, silica, calcium, chloride, fluoride, ammonia and phosphate), Ozone and Total Organic Carbon (TOC).

Name: Pelilab Scientific
Description: Pelilab Scientific, established during the COVID-19 pandemic, specializes in the manufacturing of import substitute laboratory equipments in India. With a focus on producing high-quality, reliable products, the company quickly gained a reputation as a trusted source for labs across the country. All of the company's products are distributed exclusively through a network of dealers, ensuring that customers have access to a wide range of equipment and services. The company's product line includes a variety of items, including Nitrogen Analyzer, COD Analyzer, Water purification system, Hot air oven cum Incubator, Incubator shaker, Reciprocal cum orbital shaker, Environmental shaker, water bath cum shaker, solvent extraction system, all of which are manufactured using advanced techniques and the latest technology. Dedicated to meeting the needs of its customers, the company works closely with its dealers to provide ongoing support and service. As the demand for laboratory equipment continues to grow, this company is well-positioned to become a leading player in the industry.

Name: EcoFusion Solutions Middle East LLC-FZ
Description:
We are dedicated to curating a diverse range of sustainable products and solutions designed to transform commercial spaces into eco-friendly environments. By providing cutting-edge technologies and environmentally responsible options, we aim to empower businesses to make a positive impact on the planet while enhancing their operational efficiency.

At EcoFusion, we are committed to driving the global sustainability initiative by embracing and promoting eco-conscious products and solutions for Commercial Buildings. Our mission is to develop a comprehensive portfolio of sustainable offerings that cater to every aspect of Commercial Building needs.

Our offering consists of HVAC equipment, Control & Measuring Devices and Software Platform.

Name: L.E.T. Group
Description:
The L.E.T. Group is a family SME that was founded in 1967 as L.E.T. NV by Jozef Vandewalle. L.E.T. is both locally and internationally active in the field of headlight aiming and driving assistance systems. The first step in that direction was the development of the first "Luminoscopes" in 1980 for Belgian inspection stations.
Over the years the product range has grown and in the meantime L.E.T. grew to be a leading global supplier of adjustment systems for headlamps and driving assistance systems for the automotive industry.
In addition, the L.E.T. Group is active in the development, production, assembly and adjustment of electro-optical measuring devices.
Over the years, numerous precision tools and components have been developed and produced for a variety of industries, ranging from the automotive industry, to nuclear research centers and biomedical applications. To this end, the L.E.T. Group houses four major technologies: precision engineering - electronics - optics and (vision) software.

Name: Instrumentation Live
Description:
Instrumentation Live is a platform dedicated to showcasing the latest technology in the fields of test, measurement and control, the free-to-attend event attracts influencers and key decision makers that are looking to source the latest products and solutions and stay up to date with the latest developments.

Visitors benefit from the unique opportunity to see all of the market leaders under one roof, while exhibitors enjoy an incredible ROI from the highly-targeted and relevant crowd that the show attracts in the brand new table top format.

Name: BioMétriz
Description: BioMetriz a été fondée en 2013 par 4 chercheurs de l'ENSIP puis a été rachetée en 2020 par la société OrigaLys. Fabricant de solutions innovantes pour l’analyse et le monitoring du développement des biofilms pour l’industrie. Le système fournit un indicateur de suivi et d’efficacité pour définir et évaluer les stratégies de traitement des installations et est une aide à la maîtrise du risque légionelle. N'hésitez donc pas à nous contacter pour le suivi du développement des biofilms dans vos réseaux d'eaux.

Name: Nanopartizer
Description: Nanopartizer pioneers a groundbreaking Dynamic Light Scattering (DLS) nanoparticle size analyzer with unparalleled capabilities, enabling exploration of the nano-scale universe. Our innovative technology, which was developed to address limitations in commercial DLS devices, offers a novel solution. Our device exceeds current weaknesses by analyzing samples ranging from nanometers to micrometers, providing precise particle size distribution in solutions, suspensions, and emulsions. Versatile and adaptable, Nanopartizer accommodates a diverse range of sample types, including transparent, opaque, homogeneous, and heterogeneous substances.

Name: Deckma Hamburg GmbH
Description:
Deckma Hamburg GmbH is the world leading provider of IMO certified 15 ppm bilge alarms.  For over 40 years and with more than 60,000 units delivered, we have been helping the maritime world to actively protect the environment.

Additionally, we offer a broad portfolio of industrial measurement technology. Detecting Oil in water, measuring particle sizes or sample stream turbidity, analyzing microplastics on-line and without delay, our instruments help optimise processes and prevent environmental damage.

Name: Halytech
Description:
Halytech manufactures a range of data-logging products with built-in mobile, Satellite and Ethernet communications. 

Product applications:

- Environmental monitoring
- Automatic meter reading
- Non-Urban metering for utilities and water authorities
- Weather stations
- Trade waste monitoring
- Monitoring and alarm notification (SMS / email) in a wide range of OEM equipment (pump controls, refrigeration systems, data centres etc.).
- Sports field lighting management

Key features:
 
- Very low power consumption for use in remote areas
- Browser based configuration - no need for special software
- Simple to use - setup and configuration can be done by personnel with limited technical knowledge.
- Can be configured remotely

Target Markets:

- Commercial and Industrial automatic meter reading (Water, Air, Gas, Electricity & Steam)
- Hydrography/Hydrology
- Air monitoring
- Mine site environmental monitoring
- Pipeline monitoring
- Cathodic Protection
- Origianl Equipment Manufacturers
- Utilities (Water, Gas, Electricity)
- SCADA systems
- Sportsfield Lighting (Municipal authorities, universities and sports clubs)

Name: Monaderm

Monaderm est au service des industries pharmaceutiques et cosmétiques (services études et tests, services marketing), des laboratoires de recherches et développement, des fabricants de matières premières et principes actifs et des unités cliniques en dermatologie/allergologie.
Nous avons pour vocation d’accompagner nos clients dans la résolution de leurs problèmes en leur proposant les techniques les plus adaptées à la démonstration de l’efficacité de leurs produits et en fabriquant les instruments et matériels adaptés à leurs besoins dans leurs recherches et expérimentations.

Tel: +377 93252608
