Name: Total Analytical Solutions (PTY) Ltd
Description:
Total Analytical Solutions is a proudly South African company specializing in the supply of laboratory instrumentation, consumables, chemicals, reagents and vast array of other products. 
Our extensive background in the analytical sector can also cater for assistance in the manufacturing/renovations of laboratories, general laboratory practices training, auditing process for laboratory compliance, or any other laboratory-related enquiry.
With our globally located team of hand-selected preferred suppliers and contractors - our total combined experience exceeds 180 years of industry experience. We have worked and trained in over 120 laboratories across 14 different countries including Germany, France, Netherlands, Dubai, India and numerous other African countries. 
Total Analytical Solutions has grown to meet the huge demand of customer expectations, quality and precision and strive to provide services that others are not able to. Total Analytical Solutions is a locally owned and founded company which boasts a level One BB-BEE company.  We are committed to promoting sustainable job creation and local empowerment in an effort to stimulate the local economy

Name: SA Gauge (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Welcome to SA Gauge.....

Since 1988 SA Gauge (Pty) Ltd has been designing and manufacturing pressure and temperature
measuring instruments.

SA Gauge's extensive in-house manufacturing capabilities coupled with the close relationship between
our sales, engineering and manufacturing sections ensures the ability to react quickly to customer
requirements and to rapidly incorporate customised and non standard items in our daily production
without it compromising normal production.

Our highly committed and enthusiastic employees ensure that customer demands are met and that
high quality, accurate instruments are available on time to a diverse marketplace.

Products

SA Gauge products include pressure gauges, temperature gauges, diaphragm seals and pressure
testing kits as well as other related products such as siphon tubes, gauge cocks and cooling elements.
The range of heavy duty pressure gauges and inert gas filled dial thermometers carry a comprehensive
two year guarantee.

Because of our extensive in-house manufacturing capabilities and extremely short lead times SA
Gauge has become the preferred supplier to many OEM customers that require non standard items in
small or large quantities.

SA Gauge's in-house calibration laboratory offers calibration certificates for our own as well as other
brands of pressure and temperature gauges. Normal turn around time offered is two days. On site
calibration can be done on request.

Name: Fringe Metrology
Description:
Fringe Metrology is redefining how the semiconductor industry measures the building blocks of innovation. We develop next-generation optical inspection systems that deliver nanometer precision with unmatched stability and speed. By rethinking how geometry, shape, and surface quality are measured—from wafer substrates to advanced packaging—Fringe enables manufacturers to see more, move faster, and unlock new frontiers in semiconductor performance.

Schedule a Free Consultation with us to talk about your application:
https://calendly.com/joelberkson

Name: Mhara Holdings
Description: Mhara Holdings is an Approved Channel Partner for IFM that provides innovative automation and sensing technologies for the manufacturing, mining and agriculture sectors that want to improve their efficiency and productivity.

Name: CAA Sensors
Description:
At CAA Sensors, we’re redefining how industrial facilities manage and monitor their utility systems. Specializing in the monitoring and optimisation of critical utilities, our advanced sensor technologies deliver real-time, actionable insights that drive efficiency, reliability, and sustainability across industrial operations.

Built for the demands of modern industry, our solutions help uncover hidden inefficiencies—like leaks, pressure drops, and energy waste—before they become costly problems. Whether you're aiming to improve uptime, reduce energy consumption, or meet ESG goals, our monitoring platform gives you the data visibility you need to take control of your utilities infrastructure.

From factories and food processors to mining and manufacturing, CAA Sensors empower maintenance, engineering, and sustainability teams to make smarter decisions—backed by hard data.

Name: Ufuk Kontrol Araçları

Başlangıçta standart tampon ve özel ölçüm sistemleri üretimiyle adım atan firmamız, zamanla ürün yelpazesini genişleterek 1992 yılında konum kontrol mastarları ve havalı tampon mastarları üretim hattını devreye aldı. Sektördeki taleplere paralel olarak, bağlama aparatları, problu ölçüm sistemleri ve özel komplike ölçüm sistemlerinin imalatını da 2013 yılında üstlendi.

Büyüme ivmesini desteklemek adına, ulaşım ve üretim açısından daha elverişli bir konuma taşınarak, fabrikamızı Kocaeli ili Gebze ilçesine taşıdık. Bu sayede, daha geniş bir üretim kapasitesi ve daha etkin bir lojistik altyapı ile müşterilerimize hizmet sunmaya devam ediyoruz.

"Ölçülebilen İş Yapılır" mottosuyla, siz değerli müşterilerimize en iyi hizmeti sunmak için çalışmaktayız.

Name: IST - Innovative Scan Technologies
Description: Innovative Scan Technologies GmbH produziert Messsysteme zur Analyse von Fasern und Partikeln. Die Länge, Breite und weitere Formparameter von natürlichen und technischen Fasern können mit FibreShape quantifiziert werden. FibreShape eignet sich für das Prüfen und Klassifizieren von natürlichen Fasern wie Flax, Hanf, Wolle oder Holzfasern, aber auch für die Analyse von Industriefasern wie rCF & rezyklierte Glasfasern sowie Faserverbundwerkstoffen. In der Kreislaufwirtschaft spielt das Recycling von technischen Fasern eine wichtige Rolle, aber auch der vermehrte Einsatz von Naturfasern gilt es voranzubringen und die Naturfasern für die Compositeindustrie interessanter werden zu lassen. In unserem Labor im Technologiezentrum in Flensburg stehen verschiedene Systeme zur Analyse von unterschiedlichen Fasern zur Verfügung. Die FibreShape Systeme können zur Qualitätskontrolle von Rohstoffen oder Schneideprozessen, zur Überwachung der Faserverarbeitung oder zur Vorhersage von Werkstoffeigenschaften eingesetzt werden.

Name: SIKA FRANCE
Description:
SIKA France est la filiale française du groupe Allemand SIKA Dr. Siebert & Kühn GmbH & Co. KG, dont le siège se trouve à Kaufungen, près de Kassel, en Allemagne. SIKA est un fabricant de solutions de haute qualité dans le domaine des techniques de mesure et d'étalonnage industrielles. 

Fondée en 1901, cette entreprise familiale développe et produit une large gamme de produits standardisés et personnalisés pour la réalisation de mesures de température, de pression et de débit. La gamme de produits de l'entreprise s'étend des thermomètres industriels classiques aux capteurs de débit vortex et turbine et aux calibrateurs de température de haute précision. 

SIKA France emploie 8 personnes pour un chiffre d’affaires de 3,6 millions d'euros en 2021.
SIKA a inventé le thermomètre industriel et a établi de nombreuses normes industrielles, par exemple, avec ses innovations dans les domaines de la mesure du débit et de l'étalonnage de la température. Les capteurs et les instruments de calibrage de l'entreprise sont utilisés ou montés par certains des plus grands fabricants d'appareils au monde et se retrouvent dans les produits ou les processus de production de nombreux leaders du marché issus de différents secteurs, tels que les techniques de chauffage, de ventilation et de climatisation, la construction navale, l'ingénierie automobile et la construction de véhicules commerciaux ainsi que la technologie industrielle. 

Les capteurs et les calibrateurs SIKA exercent ainsi leur magie non seulement dans les pompes à chaleur, les installations de traitement de l'eau et les stations de transfert de chaleur, mais aussi à bord du légendaire paquebot de croisière Queen Mary 2 et dans pratiquement tous les domaines de la production industrielle.

Name: ECOTEC Solutions, Inc.
Description:
ECOTEC specializes in the design and development of customized equipment and technology solutions for gas collection, transmission, and treatment systems. The products of our efforts improve the accuracy and quality of data collected for use in our enterprise based software systems as well as those of our clients. The Tunable Diode Laser (TDL) absorption spectroscopy used in ECOTEC’s gas analysis and water vapor measurement product lines is accurate, reliable, and field ready. We also work closely with customers for client specified custom prototypes and system development on individual facilities and project sites.

Technology development and integration is a key strength of ECOTEC. Our DataField Software provides users a web accessible platform for data warehousing and reporting. Information is validated for data integrity, securely maintained, and presented in a number of formats including ad hoc reports, graphs, concentration maps, spatial plotting, and more. The Automated Equipment Monitoring System (AEMS) integrates data from several components in the field and transmits the information to the DataField Software for use by project stakeholders, operators, and analysts.

ECOTEC’s innovation, ingenuity, and attention to detail provide continual advancements and opportunities for project developers, operators, and end users.  Applications for ECOTEC’s TDL solutions include regulatory compliance monitoring for low level fugitive emissions and leak detection as well as pipeline gas quality for carbon/greenhouse gas emissions and gas production processing.  Other applications include water vapor measurement in Proton Exchange Membrane Fuel Cells (PEMS), Polymer Electrolyte Membrane Fuel Cells (PEMS), and products of combustion.  AEMS offers an industry agnostic integration platform for data collection from standard digital and analog field process equipment.

This enables direct pressure and temperature sensing of harsh environment applications including process plant, energy, and aerospace systems. With two major partnerships Oxsensis in place the market reach is extending. Oxsensis is keen to work with end users, systems integrators, and instrumentation partners to exploit the benefits of optical instrumentation in key applications.

Keywords: High performance temperature, dynamic pressure and acceleration sensors. Aerospace, oil and gas, energy generation, aeroderivative gas turbine sensors, liquid hydrogen, renewable energy. Harsh environment optical sensors, fibre optics, EMI immune, flight systems sensors, fuel systems and landing gear. Power generation, land based gas turbines, combustor and compressor sensors, high temperature environments, SAGD wells, low emission engines, sapphire sensors. Industrial instrumentation and low temperature cryogenic / liquid Hydrogen storage/combustion applications. Energy Transition to cleaner alternatives. Considered as academic but also industrial “gold standard”, our PTR-TOF instruments are used in environmental research, air quality monitoring networks, atmospheric chemistry, engine emissions testing, food & flavor science and medical breath analysis. 
We also supply industrial VOC monitoring systems such as the AMC-Monitor for cleanroom and FOUP analysis in the semiconductor industry, BTEX air pollution monitoring as well as instruments for COVID-19 detection in breath.

This transaction is a strong fit with ATS’ customers, suppliers, and staff as strategic expansion will lead to innovation, increased efficiencies, and better service for our valued customers.

In October 2022, ATS Scientific acquired Folio Instruments Inc., a Kitchener-ON based provider of scientific equipment and services, making the combined company one of the largest independent scientific equipment providers in Canada.

All products sold are supported by factory trained Technical Sales/Support and Service Representatives with well over 250 years combined customer support. Application driven consultations including sample evaluations and instrument demonstrations are routinely offered to their clientele.

ATS Scientific Inc. has received many accolades from both their suppliers and customers for exceeding their expectations. They have forged partnerships with private industry, academia, Provincial and Federal Government laboratories.

Those solutions cover areas of water, environment, livestock, supply chain, and industry.

Pressure sensors, Pressure Transmitters, Pressure Transducers

Manufacturers of equipment from submersible, subsea and mining equipment up to aerospace find solutions for pressure measurement at ESI Technology. Custom solutions are the norm at ESI.

Name: YGEN Engineering Ltd

YGEN Engineering Ltd is a ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 45001:2018 certified company. YGEN was established in 2012 and since then, it has started its journey with Construction, Electrical, instrumentation and automation in Bangladesh. With an unbeatable team of business and technical strategists, YGEN specializes in integrated engineering, instrumentation, control systems, installations, and commissioning maintenance. We help industrial manufacturers to achieve top quartile business performance through industry’s broadest portfolio of technologies to measure, control, optimize and power their operations with the experience and expertise to solve their toughest problems. Description: Signal is a manufacturer of emissions monitoring equipment. Simply put, we make analysers to measure gases. This could be for boilers, vehicle exhaust, what comes out of the chimney of your industrial plant, even measuring how clean the air is in your local town centre.

Name: ACAProLearn
Description: Expert Training in Process Measurement Instruments

Name: Sanecomfibra Saneamento
Description: Sanecomfibra provides solutions for the measurement, conditioning, and control of water in open channels...for industries, municipalities, research organizations, and State / Governmental organizations.

Name: ZENNER Metering Technology
Description:
Zenner Metering Technology (Shanghai) Ltd., established in 2011 as a China-German joint venture with a registered capital of 292 million yuan (approximately 40 million USD), became publicly listed in China on February 20, 2023, under the stock abbreviation 'Zenner Metering' and stock code 301303. Recognized as a national high-tech enterprise and a 'Small Technology Giant', Zenner and its subsidiaries hold nearly 600 intellectual property rights, including 40 national invention patents. Our company has achieved EU quality system certification from the prestigious Netherlands Measurement Institute (NMi), as well as national CNAS laboratory accreditation and ISO9001/ISO14001/ISO45001/ISO10012/ISO27001/SA8000 certification.
Zenner specializes in the R&D, manufacturing, and sales of gas and water meters and related products. The key offerings include residential, industrial, and commercial diaphragm gas meters, smart gas meters, ultrasonic gas meters; smart water meters in DN15-DN300 calibres, ultrasonic water meters; smart rotary and turbine flow meters, ultrasonic flow meters, smart flow controllers, and the iGasLink cloud-based smart gas information platform.
Zenner has developed a comprehensive industry chain, encompassing mould design and production, component manufacturing, software development, intelligent module production, and automated assembly of metering instruments. With over 1,800 employees, including around 1,000 at the Shanghai headquarters, Zenner leverages talent in Shanghai, Beijing, and Xi'an to establish a robust R&D network, integrating technical research, marketing, and customer service.

Name: Guangzhou GZAIR Instruments Co., Ltd.
Description:
GZAIR Instruments is a globally recognized provider of advanced environmental sensing and control solutions, dedicated to improving indoor air quality, energy efficiency, and workplace safety. Founded with a vision to create healthier living and working environments through intelligent monitoring, GZAIR has grown into a trusted partner for businesses and institutions across diverse sectors.

We specialize in the development, manufacturing, and integration of cutting-edge air quality monitors, purification and ventilation systems, smart thermostats, and portable gas detection devices including CO, O₂, and multi-gas detectors. Leveraging the latest IoT technologies, we empower users with real-time data, actionable insights, and intelligent control—enabling a safer, cleaner, and smarter world.

With a strong emphasis on R&D, quality assurance, and customer-centric innovation, our products are deployed in homes, schools, commercial buildings, factories, greenhouses, healthcare facilities, and industrial environments around the globe.

Name: tec5 AG
Description:
tec5 manufactures high-quality, state-of-the-art spectrometer systems and components for process analytics. One focus is on sensor concepts that are completely hardware-oriented and have numerous applications in highly regulated production environments.

Our experienced team of engineers, scientists and application experts supports and accompanies our customers throughout the entire realization process – from conceptual design to adaptation, engineering and application support.

With the PROGAZE product family we offer a comprehensive spectroscopy platform for UV, VIS, NIR and Raman. Powerful and perfectly coordinated, it enables you to quickly and easily implement customized measurement technology for for a wide range of applications.

Name: Up Energy Brazil
Description: Empresa focada em soluções integradas de medidores de energia elétrica conectados às redes inteligentes que controla de forma eficiente a energia, permitindo aos clientes autonomia da gestão energética.

Name: Hinalea Imaging
Description:
Hinalea Imaging Corp. provides intelligent imaging solutions combining hyperspectral imaging with advanced neural network-powered analytics systems for quality assurance, testing and inspection applications.

Applications include in-line inspection of products for quality and safety (notably food), medical diagnostics, and precision agriculture. As part of its solution offering, Hinalea developed the world’s first high-resolution, handheld autonomous hyperspectral camera, which was awarded the SPIE Best Camera and Imager Prism Award.

Name: Micro-Poise Measurement Systems
Description: Micro-Poise Measurement Systems, a business unit of AMETEK, Inc., is the leading provider of test and measurement solutions for tire manufacturing and automotive industries. We provide a complete line of uniformity machines, dynamic balancers, geometry measurement and X-Ray machines. We are a recognized global leader in providing critical balancing equipment solutions for nearly any rotating component or assembly. Our aftermarket service offices are strategically located throughout the world. Micro-Poise provides field service, spare parts, training, and upgrades.  Contact us today to see why "The World is Turning to Micro-Poise".

Name: AMETEK Brookfield - Arizona
Description: AMETEK Brookfield, with a legacy dating back to 1934, pioneered viscosity measurement setting the global standard still recognized today. Committed to offering innovative scientific lab instrumentation that empowers customers to meet regulatory requirements and make informed decisions for optimal results across nearly all industries, the product lines include viscometers, rheometers, powder flow testers, texture analyzers, Computrac moisture analyzers, Jerome toxic gas analyzers, and supporting software, accessories, and consumables.

Name: Innowater
Description:
Innowater, especializados en la fabricación y desarrollo de sistemas de electrocloración salina para el tratamiento de agua: procesado de las aguas residuales, desarrollo de agua para la industria alimentaria y el mantenimiento de piscinas, a partir de nuestros cloradores salinos y equipos de control, dosificación de pH y cloro.

Desde 2010 trabajamos en la investigación y desarrollo de productos óptimos para proporcionar a nuestros clientes un servicio impecable con los cloradores salinos más efectivos del mercado. Nuestro proceso de fabricación, íntegramente español, se lleva a cabo en consonancia con la preservación del medio ambiente, ya que no presenta químicos dañinos ni gases nocivos.

Los cloradores salinos de Innowater mantienen el agua en perfectas condiciones para disfrutar de baños de calidad sin infecciones. Este tratamiento también supone un ahorro a largo plazo y una optimización de los recursos necesarios para llevar a cabo un correcto mantenimiento de las piscinas.

Estamos en más de 50 países, cumpliendo así nuestro firme propósito de adquirir una posición de liderazgo en el sector de electrocloración salina a nivel internacional. Tenemos la clara intención de llevar la calidad, eficiencia e innovación de nuestros productos a todos los rincones del planeta, con soluciones precisas en el tratamiento de aguas.
-
Innowater is an electrochlorination company specialising in the development and manufacture of water treatment systems. In other words, we use Salt Water Chlorination as a pioneering and innovative method in the sector for the treatment of all manner of household or industrial water. The wide range of services offered by Innowater includes water development for the food industry, waste water processing and swimming pool maintenance. Innowater has set itself the clear aim of achieving a leading position in the Salt Water Electrochlorinator sector at the international level. We currently have operational processes in place in over 50 countries.

Name: Yokogawa Iberia
Description:
YOKOGAWA IBERIA engloba las sedes de YOKOGAWA en España y Portugal.
Fundada en 1915, YOKOGAWA se dedica a una amplia gama de actividades en las áreas de medición, control e información. 

El negocio de automatización industrial proporciona productos, servicios y soluciones vitales para una amplia gama de industrias de procesos que incluyen petróleo, productos químicos, gas natural, energía, hierro y acero, y pulpa y papel. Con el negocio de innovación en Life Business, YOKOGAWA pretende mejorar radicalmente la productividad en las cadenas de valor de la industria farmacéutica y alimentaria. Los negocios de test y medida, aviación y otros, continúan brindando instrumentos y equipos esenciales con precisión y confiabilidad líderes en la industria.

Yokogawa co-innova con sus clientes a través de una red global de 112 empresas que abarcan 61 países, generando 3.800 millones de dólares en ventas en el año fiscal 2017.

Name: ENVIRO SOLUTIONS TECHNOLOGY LIMITED
Description: Enviro Solutions Technology Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as “ESE Technology”), a manufacturer and high-tech platform enterprise specializing in providing instrument equipment products and online gas monitoring solutions with sensors as the core. For over ten years, our company has been a leader in providing ODM/OEM services for the integration of gas analysis systems used by many internationally famous brands

Name: CAEN SyS
Description:
CAEN SyS relies upon an extremely strong foundational knowledge of nuclear measurement instrumentation in developing Radiation Measurements Systems and Spectroscopy Solutions.  These systems and solutions are perfectly suited to operations involving Nuclear Fuel Facilities, Nuclear Power Plants, Measurements Laboratories, and Security Applications.

CAEN SyS is built upon CAEN traditions of teamwork and partnership.  Decades of collaboration and co-development with very large international research projects (LHC@CERN, ALMA@ESO, DEAP@SNOLAB, ICARUS@LNGS, XMASS@Kamioka ...) have maximized our capability to translate a customer’s needs and expectations into cost-effective and reliable solutions.

CAEN SyS is committed to delivering exceptional nuclear measurement instrumentation, expertise, and technical support.  CAEN SyS products and systems will allow operators to maintain online operation with a high degree of quality, safety and security, while minimizing operational expenses via on-time delivery.

Name: AWI - Alert Worksafe Innovation.
Description: Ofrecemos productos, servicios y soluciones integrales y personalizadas para ayudar a las empresas a gestionar y mantener un ambiente de trabajo seguro y saludable libre de alcohol y drogas; gestion del riesgo por fatiga y somnolencia, etc

Name: Opsens Solutions Inc.
Description:
Fabricant de capteurs à fibre optique offrant des solutions pour les industries du pétrole et du gaz, de l’aérospatiale et de la défense, du génie civil, de la géotechnique et d’autres industries

Opsens Solutions, division d’Opsens, développe, fabrique et distribue un large éventail de solutions novatrices de détection à fibre optique et de conditionneurs de signal associés utilisant des technologies brevetées et en instance de brevet. Ces systèmes sont conçus pour effectuer la mesure de paramètres variés incluant la température, la pression, la contrainte et le déplacement pour les utilisateurs finaux des domaines industriels tels que l’industrie minière/géotechnique, le pétrole et gaz, la défense et l’aérospatiale, l’industrie et les laboratoires, la surveillance intelligente de l’état des structures, l’industrie alimentaire et la chimie par micro-ondes.

Opsens Solutions offre également des services techniques tels que l’installation sur le site, la formation ainsi que l’établissement clé en main des systèmes de mesure à fibre optique.

L’équipe d’Opsens Solutions possède une grande expérience technique de conception, de développement et de production de systèmes à fibre optique. Les produits Opsens Solutions sont faciles à personnaliser et hautement adaptables pour offrir une précision à long terme et une fiabilité à toute épreuve dans les environnements les plus hostiles.

Opsens Solutions conçoit et fabrique des produits aux performances incomparables grâce à notre investissement en recherche et développement, notre constante amélioration, notre poursuite de l’excellence en innovation tout en maintenant la meilleure performance sur le marché.

Name: ADZ NAGANO GmbH
Description:
ADZ NAGANO develops and produces transmitters, sensors and electronic switches for measuring pressure, temperature, force and combined. We work out the optimal solution for every specific need. From the limitless variety of possibilities that sensor technology offers, we develop exactly the right one for you and produce your request 100% customer-specific. No matter what your challenge is: sensor, transmitter, switch, measuring range, accuracy, ambient conditions, test media, media connections, output signals - analog, digital, via cable, plug or wireless, volume and weight, protection class and much more or a lot together. ...We develop your ideal solution!

Since 1998, more than 100 employees have been developing and manufacturing pressure, temperature and force sensors at the very highest level. ...innovative, competent and highly motivated!

Over a third of our team are engineers and technicians - real experts in sensor technology. They take on your challenges, specify the specific sensor requirements in extensive interaction with you and develop a 100% tailor-made solution. ...regardless of the complexity!

An intelligent modular principle and an optimal degree of automation enable production quantities from individual items to series of tens of thousands of items. Aware of the responsibility of your use of our products, we reliably manufacture each individual sensor with care and passion. ...fast, inexpensive and of outstanding quality!

We proudly produce well over 500,000 units of more than 5,000 individualized sensors for over 500 satisfied customers worldwide. ...a good feeling not only for us!

Customers from rail and vehicle technology, aerospace, marine, medical and environmental technology, mechanical engineering, automation and process technology as well as motorsport and many other areas trust in our solutions.

Name: PMS BECUS Metrology
Description:
Now located in Marnaz, in the heart of the Arve Valley in Haute-Savoie, PMS BECUS Metrology starts its activities in 1969.
PMS BECUS Metrology is the result of the merger of PMS and BECUS, two companies specializing in metrology and dimensional control, each with its own specialties.
The merger carried out in 2003 brings to each of the complementary services that are today the strength of PMS BECUS Metrology.

PMS BECUS Metrology is one of the leaders in Metrology and Control for industries in France, Switzerland, United Kingdom, Belgium, Poland, Romania, Morocco, Tunisia ...
We offer a complete range of products and services in metrology and dimensional control for all trades :

Calibers, instruments, measuring systems,
Benches, tables, measuring units, "Made in France" PMS meters,
Study, design and realization of means and control machines,
Manufacture of gauges, jigs, fixtures, measuring benches, control tools, etc.
Calibration accredited COFRAC (N ° 2-1658 *) in laboratory and on customer site,
Repair, after-sales service, retrofit.

In addition to our PMS products, we offer the products of the world's leading manufacturers : Mahr, Mitutoyo, Heidenhain, Tesa, Compac, Cary, Sylvac, Preisser, Trimos, Leitech, Diatest, Käfer, Schwenk, Girod, Hartig, Bowers, Microtest, Kroeplin, CEJ, Metro, Vision Engineering, Heine, Motic, Isoma, Starrett, Diavite, Microtecnica, Phynix, Affri, Taylor Hobson, Noga, Sauter, Kern, Plastiform, Horex, Stahlwille, Norbar, Testo, Leica, Renishaw, ...

Name: Instrucamp - Instrumentos de Medição
Description:
Fundada em março de 1997, a Instrucamp tem como objetivo principal oferecer a seus clientes suporte comercial e técnico de qualidade em instrumentos de medição industrial e equipamentos laboratoriais. 

Trabalhando com seriedade e buscando soluções completas para as necessidades de seus clientes, a Instrucamp vem conquistando mais espaço no mercado a cada dia, além de reconhecimento e credibilidade em seu segmento de negócios. Os frutos desses esforços são a satisfação de cada cliente atendido e as parcerias de sucesso firmadas com seus fornecedores, líderes mundiais de vendas em seus segmentos, que juntos proporcionam um constante crescimento da companhia.

A Instrucamp conta com profissionais com vasta experiência no mercado, altamente capacitados e habilitados para oferecer o que há de melhor no portfólio para seus clientes, espalhados por todo território Brasileiro. Além disso, tem em suas instalações um laboratório com padrões rastreados à Rede Brasileira de Calibração, onde são feitas calibrações de instrumentos para diversas grandezas. 

As Instalações da Instrucamp estão sediadas na cidade de Campinas, SP, região com importante polo tecnológico e industrial do Brasil, além de contar com um escritório comercial na cidade de São Paulo.  A empresa distribui várias marcas (Fluke, Testo, Dwyer , Ika, Tektronix, Qualitrol, Nuova Fima) e conta com estrutura física para importação direta de instrumentos. 

Mais do que apenas distribuir instrumentos, a filosofia da Instrucamp visa compreender as necessidades especificas de cada um de seus clientes, de forma a oferecer as melhores soluções quando se fala em medição e controle de processos industriais das mais variadas grandezas.

Nossa política de qualidade:

Fornecer produtos e serviços de qualidade, que atendam aos requisitos especificados por nossos clientes, melhorando continuamente a eficácia do nosso sistema de Gestão da Qualidade.   

Empresa certificada ISO 9001 /2008

Name: HLM Diagnostics Inc.
Description: HLM diagnostics has developed a novel spray sizing device, named SparyCheck, that can be used in a wide range of industries, including agricultural, pharmaceutical, chemical, mining,  and energy-related industries. SparyCheck is the first-ever easy-to-use and affordable spray sizing device, which has the potential to significantly reduce the cost of spraying different materials.

Name: Hypersoniq
Description: Hypersoniq develops a cutting-edge software platform that combines existing sensor data from industrial wastewater treatment plants with AI models into actionable optimizations to reduce environmental impact, save cost and ensure compliance.

Name: LABORATOIRE METROTEC SERVICES
Description:
METROTEC SERVICE est un laboratoire d’étalonnage crée en 2009, accrédité NM ISO/SEI 17025 (N°: AL95.01/2018) par l’organisme marocain d'accréditation SEMAC, nous assurons la qualité des instruments de mesure et des équipements de référence de nos clients. Cette accréditation signifie que nous réalisons nos prestations selon des normes internationales et des méthodes validées par des experts et que nos instruments sont raccordés aux étalons nationaux et internationaux les plus précis.

Notre laboratoire est aussi agrée par le ministère de l'Industrie et du Commerce N°: M.06.51/2023/CA pour la réparation et l'installation des instruments de pesage à fonctionnement non automatique IPFNA (Balances, bascules, pont bascules, Balance poids et prix...).

Name: NEXIS Proses Ölçü ve Kontrol Cihazları
Description:
Our company, which gathered under a corporate roof with more than 15 years of experience in order to anticipate the needs and potentials in the sector, to meet the needs and to offer an innovative and solution-oriented customer approach, was established in Bursa. We intend to be a solution partner for your businesses with our long years of field experience in industrial instruments "level, flow, temperature, pressure, analytical measurement and calibrators". In order to meet the needs of our customers before and after sales, we develop special solutions and provide “on-site discovery and supervision” services in determining the product suitable for the needs of your business.

15 yılı aşkın tecrübeyi sektördeki gereksinim ve potansiyelleri öngörerek ihtiyaçları karşılamak, inovatif ve çözüm odaklı müşteri yaklaşımı sunmak amacıyla kurumsal bir çatı altında toplanan firmamız Bursa’da kurulmuştur. Endüstriyel enstrümanlar “seviye, akış, sıcaklık, basınç, analitik ölçüm ve kalibratörler” konusunda uzun yıllara dayanan saha tecrübemiz ile işletmeleriniz için çözüm ortağı olmak niyetindeyiz. Satış öncesi ve sonrası müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarını doğru karşılayabilmek adına özel çözümler geliştirip, işletmenizin ihtiyaçlarına uygun ürün belirlemede“yerinde keşif ve süpervizyon” hizmetleri de vermekteyiz.

Name: NXT GmbH
Description:
For over three decades, NXT's high-precision spectrometric measuring systems have been supporting industrial companies all over the world to meet exacting quality standards and increase production efficiency at the same time. 

We are convinced that only with the help of precise measurement data can manufacturers consistently meet their tight tolerance targets to achieve production excellence. 

That’s why we support them with our team of skilled experts, backed by our customizable measuring devices and specialized software, to analyse and optimize their production processes. 

Our innovative solutions offer actionable insights to detect deviations where they occur, whether in dynamic production environments or controlled laboratory settings. 

NXT’s competence spans a diverse range of industries, including: 
• Renewable Energy (solar wafer, lithium battery) 
• Automotive (coatings, glass) 
• Consumer Products (displays, foils, varnishes) 
• Mechanical Engineering (wires, semiconductors) 
• Healthcare (vials, syringes) 

and many more. 

Let’s explore how we can unlock new possibilities for your production processes, drive continuous improvement and achieve your efficiency goals. 

Our team of experts is ready to offer tailored guidance and solutions – get in touch with us today!

Name: SCITEQ -SMART TESTING. PROVEN EXCELLENCE
Description:
With more than 55 years’ experience, SCITEQ A/S is one of the world's leading specialists in process control and test systems for plastic pipes and hydrogen  vessels and related. We develop, produce and sell quality control and laboratory test equipment of the highest standard. Our global customers are leading manufacturers of vessels, tanks, pipes & fittings as well as raw material suppliers a
and independent test institutes. Whether you are planning to invest in a complete turnkey laboratory or a single product. The SCITEQ range of quality test equipment consists of:

- Pipe, tanks & vessels testing i.e. pressure test, impact test, leak tightness test, rapid crack propagation test, compression test, tensile test, resistance to liquids and temperatures.
- Raw material testing i.e. melt flow test, density test, OIT, carbon black test.
-Software on-line and local hosted solutions offering user-friendly test control and reports.
-Preparation for test i.e. laboratory saw, copy miller, notch miller, conditioning chambers and ovens.

We help you achieve perfection
We supply comfort in product quality, through state-of-the art testing equipment developed and manufactured in Europe. When working with SCITEQ you gain full access to our extensive experience and competencies. We acknowledge the importance of moving forward and being innovative and we take pride in providing our customers with the most durable and future-proof solutions in the market.  

Excellence in service
We believe service is the key to a fruitful and long lasting cooperation. We are experts in testing, fully focused on helping our customers increase their performance. Our team of experienced project managers and engineers is dedicated to finding the best solution tailored to your plans and needs. The highly skilled SCITEQ service engineers perform global on-site service and training as well as online support 24/7, so you can rely on optimal performance.

Learn more here: http://www.sciteq.com

Name: Shanon Technologies
Description:
Shanon Technologies is revolutionizing embedded DSP and control development through its innovative Drawing-Like Programming (DLP) framework. Unlike traditional tools that are powerful but notoriously hard to learn and often hide the implementation details, PAPAYA offers an entirely new level of simplicity, clarity, and control.

Our flagship platform, PAPAYA, lets you build and deploy real-time signal processing and control applications with ease—backed by fully open-source code. Developers are no longer locked into opaque, auto-generated code they can’t understand or modify. With PAPAYA, what you design is what you run, and every layer is transparent, hackable, and yours to control.

Built for engineers, researchers, and educators, PAPAYA makes advanced embedded design not only accessible—but open.

Name: INSPEC.TECH
Description:
Inspec.tech is a leading manufacturer of inspection and measurement systems for plastic sheet, film, and pellet producers, supplying many prominent names in the plastics industry.

Our solutions help to eliminate many issues that can result in critical production and product quality failures, offering a simple yet effective shortcut to genuine top-notch quality without exceeding your budget or compromising on efficiency.

Inspec.tech's innovative pellet inspection technology is proven to detect, sort, and alert for quality problems such as contamination, variations in size and shape, and color shift. It features the most compact design on the market, making it especially easy to integrate with your current production lines.

We also offer user-friendly inspection systems for plastic sheets and film, detecting the complete range of dark and clear defects with unparalleled sensitivity: scratches, crystals, gels, bubbles, black specks, contamination, distortion, and more.

Inspec.tech is committed to delivering the most reliable solutions, and develops unique components, features, and user interfaces with your needs in mind. So you can always rest assured that Inspec.tech inspection technology is the best choice for your quality assurance requirements.

Please visit www.inspec.tech for more details or contact us here to arrange a meeting with our representative in your area.

Name: GEONICA
Description: GEONICA Spanish Company founded in 1974, designs, manufactures, installs and maintains Automatic Stations, Systems and Measurement Networks with Data Transmission, Images and Alarms in Real Time, for Environmental Monitoring. A Senseca company

Name: Anton Paar Belgium
Description:
Anton Paar Belgium, een dochteronderneming van Anton Paar GmbH, is verantwoordelijk voor de commerciële en technische ondersteuning van alle Anton Paar instrumenten in België en Luxemburg.

Anton Paar ontwikkelt, produceert, verspreidt en onderhoudt analytische meetinstrumenten wereldwijd gebruikt in onderzoek, ontwikkeling en kwaliteitscontroles. 

De stichter, Anton Paar, begon in Oostenrijk met een bescheiden éénmanszaak in 1922. Hij herstelde machines voor bakkers en slagers en genoot een uitmuntende reputatie voor zijn kwalitatief werk. Als snel werd hij gevraagd door universiteiten en onderzoeksinstituten.

Decennia later is de onderneming gegroeid tot een bedrijf met meer dan 4,500 werknemers uit 110 verschillende landen, geleid door de filantropische Santner Foundation. Vandaag hanteren we nog steeds de originele waarden: een focus op kwaliteit en onderzoek naar nieuwe ontwikkelingen.

Ons enthousiast team staat voor u klaar. Daarbovenop is het stand-by ingenieursteam paraat voor alle technische interventies. In ons kantoor in Gentbrugge staat ons demolab tot uw beschikking. U kan stalen laten meten of de juiste meettechniek aan het werk zien voor al uw toepassingen.

Name: Nynomic
Description: Nynomic AG is an internationally leading manufacturer of products for permanent, non-contact and non-destructive optical measurement technology. Name: NCTE AG
Description:

We have been working in this field since 2003 and know what measurement technology has to achieve today. Customers from a wide variety of industries trust us - from e-bikes to motor sports, agriculture and aviation to medical equipment and wind turbines. Name: Postnova Analytics GmbH
Description:
About Postnova Analytics
Postnova is the inventor and leader in field-flow fractionation and an innovator in light scattering technology, offering instruments, software, and services used in laboratories of universities, institutions, and corporations worldwide. Its solutions are used to separate and to subsequently characterize nanoparticles and microparticles as well as macromolecules by multiple physico-chemical properties including particle size, molecular weight, concentration, density and surface charge in a single fractionation run.
Fields of application are growing constantly, including life science such as biopharmaceuticals, nanomedicine, nutrition, or personal care, as well as material science such as synthetic polymers, advanced materials, nanomaterials, or sustainable materials, and environmental science such as nanoplastics and microplastics, soil and water contamination, or particle migration.
Postnova's portfolio and expertise help its customers to develop and optimize products and production processes, to ensure product quality, to contribute to a safer and more sustainable environment, as well as to fight and cure diseases.
Information about Postnova is available on www.postnova.com.

Name: NATA Laboratuvar Çözümleri
Description:
Nata Laboratuvar Çözümleri, laboratuvar cihazları ve sarf malzemeleri alanında geniş bir ürün yelpazesi sunarak, bilimsel araştırma ve endüstriyel uygulamalar için güvenilir çözümler sağlamaktadır. 

Teraziler: 
Analitik, hassas, portatif ve endüstriyel teraziler ile nem tayin cihazları, yüksek hassasiyetli ölçümler için idealdir.

Laboratuvar Ekipmanları: 
Santrifüjler, pH metreler, iletkenlik ölçerler, çözünmüş oksijen ölçüm cihazları, petrol ve madeni yağ test cihazları, yüksek hassasiyetli termometreler, pipetler, büretler, ısıtıcılar, karıştırıcılar, su banyoları, pompalar, spektrofotometreler, bulanıklık ölçerler, titratörler, termoreaktörler, rotary evaporatörler, distilasyon üniteleri, buz makineleri, erime noktası tayin cihazları, homojenizatörler, çalkalayıcılar ve koloni sayaçları gibi geniş bir ürün yelpazesi mevcuttur.

Densitometreler: 
Dijital Yoğunluk Ölçerler, hassas yoğunluk ölçümleri için tasarlanmıştır.

Refraktometreler, Polarimetreler ve Viskozimetreler: 
Çeşitli uygulamalar için uygun cihazlar sunulmaktadır.

Mikrodalga Sistemleri: 
Mikrodalga yakma ve sentez sistemleri, laboratuvar ihtiyaçlarına yönelik çözümler sunar.

Etüvler: 
Sabit sıcaklık koşullarında güvenilir sonuçlar elde etmenizi sağlar.

İklimlendirme Kabinleri ve İnkübatörler: 
Çeşitli boyut ve özelliklerdeki modeller, farklı laboratuvar ihtiyaçlarına cevap verir.

Masa Üstü ve Portatif Renk Ölçerler: 
Birçok farklı sektör ve uygulama için renk ölçümlerinde yüksek hassasiyet sunar.

GC ve LC Kolonları: 
Silika kapiler kolonlar, ULTRA-ALLOY paslanmaz çelik kapiler kolonlar ve çeşitli LC kolonları, kromatografi analizlerinizde en doğru sonuçları elde etmenize yardımcı olur.

Laboratuvar Sarf Malzemeleri: 
pH, iletkenlik, DO, iyon ve ORP elektrotları, spektroskopi ve kromatografi sarfları, pipet uçları, standart çözeltiler ve erime noktası sarfları gibi geniş bir ürün yelpazesi sunar.

Name: iNSyT Solutions
Description:
iNSyT Solutions, a spinoff project from the NanoInstitute at LMU Munich, is offering distruptive microscopy technologies for the demands of modern materials science.

For centuries, microscopes have propelled technological progress. However, traditional microscopy, while effective for static structures, falls short in capturing the ultrafast, nanoscale processes essential for advancing renewable energy technologies—often at the risk of altering the sample itself.

Our non-invasive, in-operando microscopy technology changes that. By capturing dynamic behaviors in real-time without disrupting the material or the process, iNSyT provides transformative insights into processes like catalytic water splitting, battery charging cycles, semiconductor corrosion, and light conversion in solar cells.

With this level of precision, iNSyT enables scientists and industries to unlock the full potential of materials, accelerating breakthroughs and pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.

Name: Scientific Instruments, Inc.
Description:
Scientific Instruments (SI), an ISO 9001 certified company, is one of the world leaders in design and manufacturing of measurement systems for cryogenic science applications. From quantum computing, space launch support and flight hardware, cryopumps, zero emission technology to Liquid Natural gas storage tanks, SI stands ready to provide the most reliable cryo measurement systems in the world.  

SI was founded in 1967 by Jack Hoey and Gilbert Halverson. Coming from aerospace and academic backgrounds, they identified a market need for cryogenic (4K) temperature measurement and developed one of the world's first Germanium Resistance Thermometers (GRT). These sensing devices were supplied to NASA and used in the Apollo Lunar Program. Today, SI products can be found around the globe in all sorts of cryogenic applications.

Name: Mag-Instruments UG
Description: was founded by a group of specialists in geophysics, mechatronics and robotics to bring state-of-the-art technology into magnetic measurements. We develop and manufacture high quality equipment for laboratory and field measurements of magnetic properties of materials, biological matter and rocks.

Name: Ethera
Description:

Ethera is also specialized in Air purification with an unique formaldehyde filtration pellet without any release.

Name: CellSense
Description:
CellSense Technologies is a leading manufacturer of advanced Brillouin Microscope systems, designed for mechanobiological applications across diverse fields such as cell biology, biomedicine, developmental biology, tissue engineering, pharmacology, and cancer research. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany, CellSense combines the highest level of technical expertise with visionary applications.

Driven by inspiration and ambition, we believe that only the best tools are good enough for the study of life. We listen to our users’ challenges with a scientist’s ear and find innovative solutions to individual problems.

At CellSense, we are dedicated to advancing the field of mechanobiology through our expertise in microscopy. We provide Brillouin Microscopy to researchers engaged in both basic and translational research. Our aim is to integrate Brillouin Microscopy as a standard tool for studying mechanobiology and innovating within 3D cell culture systems. Brillouin technology allows researchers to explore and understand the mechanical properties of organelles, cells, organoids, tissues, biomaterials, and organisms, opening new possibilities in scientific discoveries and industrial applications.

Brillouin Microscopy earned its place in The Guardian’s Top 10 biggest science stories of 2022, standing alongside exciting topics from space exploration to climate research and from number theory to developing new antibiotics. Since then, it has evolved rapidly and gained increasing recognition.

Brillouin Microscopy is enhancing life science research by offering a non-invasive way to analyze cell and tissue stiffness. This method avoids the damage associated with traditional techniques, providing valuable insights that can aid in the early detection of diseases and improve our understanding of cellular mechanics. By enabling detailed observations of mechanical changes in cells, Brillouin Microscopy supports advances in medical diagnostics and research.

Developed by our Swiss engineering office FiveCo, our solution is the result of the know-how of a team of multidisciplinary engineers.

Description:
Desde hace 40 años brindamos a las empresas del sector industrial, soluciones integrales de instrumentación, control y automatización para el mejoramiento de sus procesos productivos.
Somos una empresa especializada capaz de soluciones integrales adecuadas para la medición y el control de variables físicas como te,perseguirá, presión, nivel, caudal y variables analíticas. 
Para satisfacer las necesidades de  los mercados, hemos configurado  un equipo de especialistas en instrumentación y control de procesos industriales, tecnología de punta y alianzas comerciales con marcas de alta reconocimiento y trayectoria.
Contamos con tres unidades de negocios 
1. Comercialización industrial.
2. Servicios de taller y laboratorio de metrología
3. Desarrollo de soluciones de automatización y control industria.

Sviluppata in collaborazione con utenti e partner, aiuta gli utilizzatori a personalizzare il flusso di lavoro, aumentare l’efficienza e massimizzare la produttività.
GeoMax fa parte della svedese Hexagon, gruppo tecnologico globale leader mondiale nei segmenti micro e macro delle tecnologie di misura e del positioning.
Le società di fama internazionale facenti parte del gruppo Hexagon distribuiscono da decenni prodotti di precisione e soluzioni per l’industria della misura. La tecnologia all’avanguardia di queste compagnie è costantemente supportata da un network globale di vendite e servizi che copre tutti i continenti con oltre 100 filiali.
La stretta collaborazione con il gruppo Hexagon, garantisce a GeoMax l’accesso allo stato dell’arte dello sviluppo e della produzione in Europa, America e Asia; questo permette a GeoMax di concentrarsi sulla distribuzione di prodotti “Works when you do” ottimizzando qualità e produttività.
Attraverso una distribuzione in continua crescita, i prodotti GeoMax sono disponibili in Europa, Asia e Medio Oriente con un ottimo rapporto prezzo-prestazioni.

A well trained and equipped after sales and service staff is available if extra support is required.

Within Observator Group, Observator Vision focuses on window wipers and sunscreens. The window wipers and sunscreens are used in wheel houses ranging from inland vessels to sea going tankers. These products take care of a clear view from the bridge.

Name: Kuebler en France
Description:
Fritz Kübler Sàrl est la première filiale française du groupe Kübler en Allemagne. 

Nous sommes une filiale commerciale implantée à Wittelsheim en Alsace. Notre groupe conçoit et fabrique des capteurs de position et de mouvement, des solutions de transmission de signaux et des appareils de traitement de signaux. 

La société Fritz Kübler Sàrl a été créée par Mme Marie-Odile Weiss et M. Andrea Ermacora en octobre 1996 suite à la volonté de M. Fritz Kübler de créer une filiale Française, la première filiale du groupe Kübler !
Le marché Français était important pour M. Fritz Kübler et cette décision a été la bonne puisque la société a constamment évolué toutes ces années.
 
La rigueur et l’esprit d’équipe initiés à la création sont toujours aujourd’hui les bases fondamentales de la société.
 
D’abord implantés à Wittenheim, nous avons déménagé ensuite sur le site de Wittelsheim en restant proche de notre maison mère qui se situe à moins de 2 heures de route
Cette proximité nous permet de rencontrer fréquemment les équipes techniques et commerciales de notre usine pour le suivi de projets.
 
Nous sommes l’interface pour nos clients avec nos différents centres R&D, usines et centres logistiques à travers le monde.
 
Les commerciaux responsables de secteurs ainsi que nos ingénieurs applications sont à l’écoute des clients pour comprendre leurs applications, leurs attentes et ainsi proposer des produits et solutions adaptées à leurs besoins.
 
Notre seul but étant de mettre aux services de nos clients nos compétences dans nos domaines d’activités qui sont la Mesure, la Transmission et l'Exploitation.

Name: BRS Messtechnik GmbH
Description:
BRS Messtechnik GmbH is an expert in battery measurement technology. Batteries and battery systems can be tested quickly and efficiently with our compact battery testers, independent of the battery technology.

Our instruments are universal tools for professional battery users and enable:

   - standard battery tests (voltage, internal resistance, capacity)
   - battery analysis (comparison, trends, modeling)
   - diagnosis (state of charge, state of health, integrity)
   -  recording of ambient conditions (temperature)

They are used for testing cells and modules in

    - development for suitability analyses
    - production for quality control in incoming and final inspections
   -  reuse for determination of aging trends
    service for battery diagnostics (SoC, SoH)

Our offer includes:

    - Professional battery measurement equipment and test systems
    -  Development of customized measurement technology
    - Consulting and engineering for battery measurement technology

Name: Timegate Instruments Ltd.
Description:
Timegate brings intelligence to bioprocessing. Timegate Instruments is a rapidly growing, deep-tech company operating globally, headquartered in Oulu, Finland. We enable the biopharmaceutical industry to see what has not been seen before in bioprocesses. We offer a solution for real-time process monitoring, improved product quality, and faster time to market for biopharmaceuticals. 

Timegated technology provides accurate and real-time molecular composition information in different production stages of the biopharmaceutical process by measuring several metabolites, nutrients, and proteins in real-time in a bioreactor during the bioprocess. 

This leads to improved product quality, reduced failures and better productivity through increased yields. In addition, this enables faster time to market through optimized process development and scale-up.

Name: Anton Paar QuantaTec
Description:
Anton Paar revolutionizes measurement techniques by designing instruments that enable accurate, precise, reliable characterization of powdered, solid, semi-solid, and porous materials. Our goal is to provide customers with the largest portfolio of superior instruments for measuring particle properties - by offering a wide range of fully automated gas, vapor, and water sorption analyzers, gas pycnometers, flow chemisorption analyzers, porosimeters, and porometers suitable for research and development and industrial quality control. Our instruments are used to propel advances in battery and fuel cell materials, heterogeneous catalysts, pharmaceuticals, ceramics, carbons, zeolites, advanced mesoporous and microporous materials, pigments, food, and many others. Our fully-equipped, state-of-the-art laboratory is also an excellent resource for sample analysis.

Name: ABLATOM
Description:
Established in 2017, Ablatom is a pioneering company specializing in the analysis and multi-elemental imaging of various samples using laser-induced breakdown spectroscopy (LIBS). These samples include those from catalytic chemical processes, biomedical applications, geological sources, and more.

In collaboration with the esteemed Light and Matter Institute of Lyon (ILM), Ablatom leverages exclusive patented LIBS technologies renowned for their efficiency in both cost and time. With a combined 15 years of expertise in LIBS development and application, Ablatom's founders bring unparalleled knowledge to the field.

Ablatom is dedicated to delivering cutting-edge LIBS expertise and technologies to its clients, offering fast, cost-effective analysis and detailed multi-elemental imaging tailored to their needs.


Créée en 2017, Ablatom est une entreprise innovante spécialisée dans l’analyse et l’imagerie multi-élémentaire par spectroscopie de plasma induit par laser (LIBS) d’échantillons provenant de domaines divers et variés tels que la catalyse, le biomédical, la géologie et bien d’autres encore. 

Forte de son partenariat avec l’Institut Lumière Matière de Lyon, la société Ablatom dispose d’une technologie LIBS brevetée, unique et performante, ainsi qu’une expertise de près de 10 ans dans son développement et dans son application dans divers domaines. 

La mission d’Ablatom est de fournir ses services et son expertise en spectroscopie de plasma induit par laser pour l’analyse et l’imagerie multi élémentaire de vos matériaux.

Description:
Greenwood Engineering, Denmark, is a global recognized engineering company specializing in development and manufacturing of professional measuring equipment for outstanding condition surveys in the global road and railway industry. With more than 30 years of experience, expertise and continuous focus on new development and customer requirements, we present a strong, innovative and unmatched product line ranging from the small handheld MiniProf railway profile measuring systems to the truck-size Traffic Speed Deflectometer for network level and project level bearing capacity measurements on roads while driving at normal traffic speed.

Our products are operated with minimum disturbance to environment and traffic and with the highest user safety and comfort in focus. The solutions provide outstanding measuring results and constitute an extremely reliable foundation for making critical and economic decisions in maintenance, quality and safety departments all over the world.

Greenwood has approximately 40 employees, thousands of users, a strong global agent network and local offices in Copenhagen, New York and Beijing.

Much has happened since the first projects were launched in 1992, but one thing remains unchanged: Still, the basic premise for all marketed products is to stay at the leading edge of frontier technology!

For more information, we welcome you to visit our website www.greenwood.dk or contact us at greenwood@greenwood.dk

Name: Mecanum Inc.
Description:
At Mecanum, we help you overcome your noise and vibration challenges and specialize in acoustic material characterization and noise control solutions.

For the last 25 plus years, we stand out for our ability to deliver quality work and to design equipment that is precise, reliable and very easy to use. Through our scientific support, we build solid relationships with our clients.

We serve major manufacturing and construction industries as well as higher educations. Our solutions fit several fields, from automotive to aerospace, including R&D laboratories and many more.

Discover our efficient acoustic test cabin, the perfect tool to measure diffuse-field sound absorption and transmission loss of small size samples between 250 and 10 000Hz.

Our team of passionate experts offers a complete range of performant and user-friendly acoustic material characterization instruments. We also offer different types of consulting services for noise and vibration control, transport and building acoustics, and characterization of damping and poroelastic properties of acoustic materials. In addition, we develop specific or general software for characterization and vibroacoustic simulations.

Name: Northwold Investments Ltd
Description:
Northwold is an ISO 9001 certified company and was established in 2008 on the simple idea of bringing exceptional service support, and weighing & measurement products to its customers. Our emphasis on a complete customer experience has allowed NORTHWOLD to become a preeminent supplier of measuring and weighing instruments, 

In addition to being a Preferred METTLER TOLEDO distribution partner, NORTHWOLD specializes in process automation, software development quality control laboratory setup and instrument service and certification. Each of our solutions is fully customer tailored and customizable and precisely built to provide unrivalled quality for total customer satisfaction and product assurance.

Laboratory and Analytical Measurement- Balances, Titrators, pH meters, Conductivity meters, Density Meters, Refractometers, UV/VIS Spectrophotometers, Pipettes, Melling and Dropping Point system.

Name: ColVisTec AG - Leaders in Inline Spectroscopy
Description:
At ColVisTec, we work with the world's leading manufacturers in the paint, pharmaceutical, plastics, and chemical industries. Our team of highly knowledgeable engineers and scientists support them with a reliable and industry-ready inline UV-Vis spectroscopy. 

By adding inline UV-Vis spectrophotometry devices onto the assembly line, we can measure the production output in real-time. In addition, it opens fantastic opportunities for productivity as well as quality gains, leading to a huge stand-alone benefit for your factory when implemented into the context of digitalized manufacturing: Industry 4.0. 
 
Our technology can be customized for a wide variety of processes, allowing flexible hardware configurations, offering data output in different formats, and excellent integration with the software solutions already in place.
We take pride in our extensive customer support and provide a full menu of training options to secure a smooth transition from off-line measurement to fully automated inline solutions.

From our headquarters in Berlin, Germany, we support our product line worldwide and work in close cooperation with other process machinery manufacturers to provide complete solutions when customers are in the market for new plants. Most often our technology is fitted to the existing manufacturing facilities, boosting their productivity and quality. We don’t see ourselves as suppliers of hardware, our aim is to provide unique solutions that are specifically required by your process.  

Our company was founded in 2009 and is now co-funded by the Horizon 2020 program of the European Union.

Name: GrainSense
Description:
GrainSense offers an innovative grain analysis solution featuring its patented NIR sensor. This sensor transforms traditional, bulky Near-Infrared (NIR) spectroscopy equipment into a compact, affordable format, significantly reducing costs compared to conventional equipment. The GrainSense solution is tailored for industrial, trading, research, and farming customers, providing instant grain quality analysis.

GrainSense technology quickly measures protein, moisture, oil, and carbohydrate contents from just a few kernels or flowing grain without stopping the grain flow. It is applicable during harvesting, processing, or storage—anytime grain quality measurements are needed. The same laboratory-accurate sensor is used in all GS FLOW products, bringing laboratory precision to mills, breweries, combine harvesters, and more. The GS FLOW sensor is also available as an OEM product, allowing companies with automated moisture measurement systems to extend their capabilities to measure additional parameters. The handheld unit is portable and popular among farmers, traders, researchers, and other professionals in the grain industry.

Name: EOS Srl
Description:
EOS S.r.l. — www.eosinstruments.com
Pioneering the next generation of advanced technologies and scientific instrumentations for the classification and characterization of single particles and particle mixtures in biological, industrial, and environmental heterogeneous liquids and aerosols. Through the innovative light scattering technologies SPES, SPES², SPESe, and μDHM, EOS introduces the CLASSIZER family of platforms—cutting-edge solutions for multiparametric single-particle analysis based on patented technologies.

CLASSIZER instruments analyze individual particles by their optical properties, enabling:
Discrimination of particles in highly heterogeneous samples
Monitoring of particle behavior in real-world complex fluids (e.g., aggregation, degradation, wetting)
Enhanced product formulation and stability assessment
Reliable quality control—even in the presence of impurities, synthesis residues, bubbles, or immiscible droplets—without the need for filtration or purification

Designed for research, development, and quality assurance, CLASSIZER platforms serve a wide range of industries including life sciences, pharmaceuticals, cosmetics, food & beverages, inks & pigments, agrochemicals, lubricants & abrasives, and environmental monitoring.

EOS is committed to transforming particle analysis with precision, versatility, and real-world applicability.

Name: Litech
Description: Fires in waste facilities often begin with what can’t be seen, hidden batteries or gas bottles in fragmented waste streams. Litech tackles this challenge with sensors based on Magnetic Inductive Spectroscopy (MIS), combining cutting-edge research and industry insight to detect hazards early. The result: safer workers, more reliable operations, and a cleaner, more sustainable future.

Name: Resensys
Description: Resensys pioneers cloud-based wireless instruments tailored for comprehensive structural health monitoring, anchored by its renowned Wireless SenSpot sensor technology offering an impressive 10-year battery life. These SenSpot sensors offer continuous monitoring of vital parameters including strain (stress), displacement, tilt, inclination, acceleration, temperature, and humidity. Seamlessly connected, they provide real-time data crucial for a myriad of bridge testing and monitoring applications, including: (1) Tracking strain in fracture-critical bridges; (2) monitoring depth and assessing foundation stability in scour-critical structures; (3) Monitoring bridges in waterways and detecting impacts such as barge collision; (4) Monitoring cracks for change in width and propagation; (5) Analyzing thermal strain and conducting fatigue analysis; (6) Monitoring the operation of expansion joints, bearings, and pin/hanger systems, detecting frozen bearings; (7) Monitoring bridge foundations for instability caused by settling or geotechnical issues; (8) Measuring deflection and strain in critical bridge elements for load rating; (9) Detecting overweight vehicles on bridges. With a proactive approach, the system promptly alerts authorities via automated email or text messages upon detecting any structural issues, ensuring timely intervention and safeguarding bridge structural integrity. Additionally, Resensys systems can be deployed on culverts, sign structures, tunnels, retaining walls, buildings, and dams, expanding their utility across various infrastructure assets.

Name: Svan Analytical Instruments
Description:
Founded in 2008, Svan Analytical Instruments is redefining aseptic and analytical excellence for the pharmaceutical and life sciences industry.

We partner with global technology leaders to deliver state-of-the-art isolators, aseptic decontamination systems, and analytical instruments that safeguard what matters most—patients and products.

Built on precision, compliance, and innovation, Svan solutions go beyond meeting regulatory standards—they set new benchmarks for purity and protection. From microbiological monitoring to advanced sterility testing, we help our customers achieve absolute confidence in every process.

At Svan, we believe science and design must work together—creating equipment that is not only reliable, but visionary.

 Purity. Precision. Protection.

Name: Gentec-EO
Description:
Gentec Electro-Optics (Gentec-EO) has a long history in the laser measurement field. With a 50-year track record of innovation and providing quality solutions for laser power and energy measurement applications from the factory to the hospital and laboratory

As a former laser manufacturer, Gentec-EO knows the needs of its customers. In fact, its first laser energy measurement products were developed for internal use as the company put the first high repetition rate TEA CO2 lasers on the market in 1972. Gentec, Inc. introduced the first pyroelectric joulemeters shortly after that. Gentec, Inc. was also the first to manufacture both thermopile and pyroelectric laser power and energy detectors. In the mid-1990s, the company introduced the WB series (today known as the W5 and W9 series) with an average power density damage threshold of over 100 kW/cm2 that is still unrivalled today.

In 2000, Gentec Electro-Optics, Inc. was formed from Gentec, Inc. so that it could focus entirely on thermal laser power and energy measurement. The acquisition, in 2010, of Spectrum Detector Inc. allowed to add measurement solutions for the new and rapidly expanding THz market, ultra-sensitive optical Joulemeters for applications down to femtojoules, instruments for pulse to pulse energy measurements up to 200 kHz and Optical TRAP detectors that act as primary calibration standards, to name a few.

Name: Anton Paar Singapore
Description:
Anton Paar develops, produces and distributes highly accurate laboratory instruments and process measuring systems, and provides custom-tailored automation and robotic solutions. It is the world leader in the measurement of density, concentration and CO2 and in the field of rheometry. Anton Paar GmbH is owned by the charitable Santner Foundation.

Over 4,500 employees at the headquarters in Graz and the 39 sales subsidiaries worldwide ensure that Anton Paar products live up to their excellent reputation. The core competence of Anton Paar – high-precision production – and close contact to the scientific community form the basis for the quality of Anton Paar’s instruments.

Name: Utopia Technology
Description: We offer a comprehensive range of instrumentation solutions designed to monitor, control, and optimize industrial processes. Automation Systems: Our automation systems are tailored to enhance productivity, reduce costs, and improve overall operational efficiency.

Name: Anton Paar UAE
Description:
Anton Paar develops, produces and distributes highly accurate laboratory instruments and process measuring systems, and provides custom-tailored automation and robotic solutions. It is the world leader in the measurement of density, concentration and CO₂ and in the field of rheometry.

Over 4,200 employees at the headquarters in Austria and the 39 sales subsidiaries worldwide ensure that Anton Paar products live up to their excellent reputation. The core competence of Anton Paar – high-precision production – and close contact to the scientific community form the basis for the quality of Anton Paar’s instruments, with Anton Paar UAE supporting customers across the United Arab Emirates, Kuwait, Qatar, and Oman.

Name: Solartron ISA
Description:
Solartron ISA is the leading supplier of flow measurement solutions. From our manufacturing headquarters in County Durham, UK, we manage the complete product lifecycle design, from product development, design, manufacture, to field support for the life of the product. As a part of AMETEK, it allows us to leverage global support close to our customers operations. 

Solartron ISA’s strategy is to provide clients with a total delivery experience. Providing engineered solutions is our number one priority. 

Since the company was founded in 1968, Solartron ISA has been partnering with our customers to provide bespoke solutions for the most challenging flow conditions across various applications. Not every challenge can be easily solved by a ‘one size fits all’ approach, but through our best-in-class technical team, and extensive product range, we can create a tailored solution for our customers. 
Key applications include multiphase measurement of wet gas in gas condensate fields and injection measurement for gas lift or water/inhibitor injection for subsea oil or gas developments. As well as continued supply and development of quality product into clean energy applications. The Dualstream, Seastream, and Carbonstream family of flow meters are uniquely designed to provide the operator with the optimum solution for years to come.

Name: Productivity Quality, Inc.
Description:
Productivity Quality, Inc. (PQI) knows that all you make are numbers, and they better be right. PQI helps quality and manufacturing engineers improve their quality processes. We are the Upper Midwest distributor for many of the best-known names in metrology – Hexagon, Optical Gaging Products (OGP), Renishaw, Heidenhain, Mahr, Mitutoyo…the list goes on.  We are the North American Technical and Sales center of industrial CT scanning systems from RX Solutions, and the North American distributor of automated fabrication systems from InspecVision.

Our MT Probing Solutions group is the largest installer of Renishaw machine tool probing systems in the US.

Advanced Inspection Services, a PQI subsidiary, is the leading contract dimensional inspection service with customers nationwide.

Our employees are out every day producing calibration certificates, generating part inspection reports and helping our customers select and implement measurement systems . Our ISO 17025 accreditation is constantly improving including recent additions for pressure, temperature and electronics, and enhanced sub-micrometer uncertainty for CMM measurement.

Name: beadedstream
Description:
beadedstream manufactures digital temperature sensors and temperature data loggers for the infrastructure, mining, oil & gas, ice roads, environment, renewable energy, and aquaculture monitoring industries around the globe. 

REAL-TIME TEMPERATURE MONITORING 
Our beadedcloud software makes remote temperature monitoring easy and cost-efficient, as our data loggers are designed with solar power to recharge the battery and direct to satellite data transmission from pole to pole. With beadedcloud, you can access your data from remote locations anytime and anywhere. 

FLEXIBLE DATA ACQUISITION 
Our beadedstream thermistor strings are compatible with major third-party data loggers using SDI-12 or Modbus RS-485 protocols to monitor environmental data conveniently.

Visit our YouTube channel to learn more at: https://www.youtube.com/@beadedstream

Name: Fastmicro
Description:
We help our customers to overcome today’s cleanliness challenges in microtechnology. At Fastmicro, we believe you can accomplish breakthroughs in cleanliness control with fast, accurate and quantitative surface particle
measurements.

Fastmicro enables process quality engineers to take reliable decisions on where and how to improve their cleanliness processes and deliver consistent quality products. And ultimately, reach high equipment performance for their
end users.

To do this, we collaborate with the best to accomplish breakthroughs in cleanliness control.

Name: Chireh
Description:
The main core of "Chireh Sanat" company was created and expanded with the aim of supplying, installing, commissioning and after-sales services of laboratory equipment for laboratories and industries.
Also, more than 20 years of scientific and practical experience supports the efforts of our engineering team.

We are proud to have young and talented people in our team and we eagerly welcome cooperation with interested people. Your creative ideas will be realized by observing all professional principles in this company.

Name: Magcam
Description:
Advanced permanent magnet inspection. 
We will unlock your magnet’s secrets. Magcam offers industry-leading technology for measuring magnetic fields of permanent magnets, magnetic assemblies, and permanent magnet rotors.

At the heart of Magcam, there is Magcam’s magnetic field camera, MiniCube 3D. It offers advanced measurement and visualization of full three-dimensional magnetic field distributions with high spatial resolution in less than one second. 
With the help of MagScope, Magcam’s advanced data analysis software for measuring and analyzing magnetic field distributions, we can offer: 
•	High-Speed Measurement; Less than 1 second per image generated
•	High Spatial Resolution; 100µm per sensor
•	High-Accuracy Results; 0.1 mTesla

Discover how Magcam breakthrough technology is solving magnetic field challenges in different industries with the optimal solutions to measure and analyze the magnetic field while developing permanent magnet applications. 
In industries like: 
•	Automotive Industry
•	Green solutions Industry
•	Medical devices Industry
•	Consumer goods Industry
•	Industrial Industry  

We look forward to helping you measure, analyze and optimize your products.

Name: JUMO Denmark A/S
Description:
