Name: AVS Römer
Description:
Part of your Success: AVS Römer entwickelt und produziert Komponenten zum Verbinden von Schläuchen und Rohren oder zum Durchleiten, Verteilen und Absperren von gasförmigen und flüssigen Medien. Dazu zählen Steck- und Schraubverbindungen, Magnetventile, Sensoren und Pumpen. Das Unternehmen zeichnet sich vor allem durch sehr hochwertige Sonderlösungen aus, die nach Kundenwünschen gefertigt werden – auch in sehr geringen Stückzahlen. Die Produkte werden in den Bereichen Food & Beverage, Industrial und Life Science eingesetzt. Dazu gehören Anwendungen im Maschinen- und Anlagenbau, in Automaten für die Lebensmittelbranche, in der Telekommunikationstechnik, in der Medizin- und Labortechnik, in der Wasseraufbereitung oder bei Heiz- und Kühlsystemen. Die Kunden stammen vorwiegend aus dem europäischen Raum, aber auch aus den USA und Asien.

Das Familienunternehmen wurde 1970 von Joachim Christian Römer gegründet und hat spätestens seit dem umfangreichen Neubau 2023 seinen Mittelpunkt in Grafenau. Das Werk in Langenberg/Erzgebirge dient als weitere Produktionsstätte. Die G. Römer Schweiz AG ist ein zusätzlicher Vertriebsstandort.

AVS Römer erhielt in den letzten Jahren zahlreiche Preise: dazu gehören im Jahr 2019 der Sieg beim Großen Preis des Mittelstandes (Oskar-Patzelt-Stiftung) sowie die Auszeichnung mit dem Bayerischen Mittelstandspreis durch das Europäische Mittelstandsforum e.V. (EWiF). Zudem zählt AVS Römer zu den BEST 50 in Bayern des Jahres 2018 (Auszeichnung des Bayerischen Wirtschaftsministeriums für die 50 wachstumsstärksten Unternehmen des Freistaates Bayern). Weitere Preise sind „Finalist“ beim Großen Preis des Mittelstandes 2017, „Unternehmer des Jahres“ der Wirtschaftsjunioren Freyung-Grafenau sowie „TOP-Unternehmen Niederbayerns“ vom Niederbayern Forum e.V. als eines von insgesamt nur fünf Unternehmen im Landkreis Freyung-Grafenau.

Aktuell beschäftigt AVS Römer mehr als 500 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter.

We design, engineer, and build robust, versatile laser alignment and measuring systems varying from standard off-the-shelf to fully customized solutions. These solutions help manufacturers solve alignment problems, improve workflow, reduce downtime, and boost productivity.

Our laser alignment products are used across a wide range of industries, including aerospace, aircraft power generation, shipbuilding, medical device manufacturing, plastics and film production, electronics manufacturing, machine shops, and more. These customers are measuring and verifying straightness, squareness, parallelism, flatness, bore alignment, shaft positioning, and a variety of other critical and custom alignment and measurement tasks.

Since 1995 we’ve focused on producing U.S.-made, durable, easy-to-use and versatile laser alignment tools, delivering measurement resolutions down to 0.0001 inch.

We back our solutions with expert engineering support, customization options, and ongoing technical assistance to ensure each customer gets the alignment solution that fits their unique needs.

AIP liefert insbesondere Fahrzeugprüfsysteme zur realitätsbezogenen, reproduzierbaren Simulation von Straßenfahrten im Laborbetrieb, z.B. in den Bereichen Abgasmessung, Dauererprobung, Messung der elektromagnetischen Verträglichkeit, Akustik- und Vibrationsmessung. Neben den Fahrzeugprüfständen zur Straßenfahrtsimulation hat sich AIP einen sehr hohen Bekanntheitsgrad in den Bereichen Messtechnik, der stationären und mobilen Abgasanalyse sowie flexibler Prüfstandautomatisierung im In- und Ausland erarbeitet.

Name: fluiidd
Description:
In the process industries sector, our pumps, valves, and pipes play a crucial role in efficiently transporting various substances, from raw materials to food, chemicals, or thermal power plant fluids. Detecting hidden flaws in pipes can be challenging, causing costly production disruptions and contributing to global energy waste.

Meet fluiidd—a mission-driven startup dedicated to accelerating the industry's shift to greater efficiency and to reduce waste. Our solution focuses on predictive maintenance, advancing the digital transformation of process industries to improve safety, control, and optimization globally.

fluiidd draws on a decade of groundbreaking research from the French Atomic Energy and Alternative Energies Commission (CEA), specializing in Tomography, Signal Processing, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronics.

Currently, we're working towards market industrialization while actively participating in innovative R&D programs for nuclear reactors, fusion reactors, and hydrogen technologies.

Gullimex, believing in understanding

Meten is weten. Gullimex is sinds 1981 actief in de verkoop, kalibratie (ijken) en service van meetapparatuur van o.a. temperatuur, lekdetectie en vochtgehalte. We zijn gespecialiseerd in Food, Medisch Pharma en Cold Chain en als zodanig marktleider.

Wij zijn kennispartner voor onze klanten. Al onze meetinstrumenten voldoen aan het voedselveiligheidsprotocol HACCP. De merken die wij leveren zijn Atago, Dansensor, Datapaq, Ebro, EuroScan, Hygiena, Swema, TempCube, TempMitter, TempWeb & Trans-Safety Locks.

Gullimex ontleent haar marktleiderschap aan voortdurende innovatie van haar product- en serviceconcepten. 

We zijn gevestigd in Nederland (Borne) en België (Erpe-Mere) en hebben aldaar onze Kalibratie- en Serviceafdeling gehuisvest. Jaarlijks voert Gullimex meer dan 25.000 kalibraties uit met behulp van haar yellow box gratis verzendservice.

------

Gullimex, believing in understanding

Seeing is believing. Since 1981, Gullimex has been active in the sale, calibration and service of devices for measuring temperature, leak detection, moisture levels and more. We are specialised and market leader in Food, Medical Pharmaceuticals and Cold Chain.

We are an expert partner for our clients. All our measurement devices comply with the HACCP food safety protocol. Our brand range comprises Atago, Dansensor, Datapaq, Ebro, EuroScan, Hygiena, Swema, TempCube, TempMitter, TempWeb and Trans-Safety Locks.

Gullimex owes its market leadership to the constant innovation of its product and service concepts. 

We are based in the Netherlands (Borne) and Belgium (Erpe-Mere) where our Calibration and Service departments are located. Gullimex carries out more than 25,000 calibrations a year with the help of its free yellow box shipping service.

Name: The Paquin Company
Description:
Paquin designs, builds, and distributes precise control instrumentation and ruggedized connectivity for equipment that operates in harsh or safety sensitive environments. We combine in house manufacturing with our broad partner network to deliver both catalog parts and one off custom solutions under tight performance requirements. Headquartered in Mentor, Ohio, Paquin has operated continuously since 1949.

Paquin operates through 4 coordinated divisions that cover the full lifecycle from design to delivery. Paquin Sensors manufactures pressure, temperature, flow, level, optical, proximity, humidity, and gas detection devices, along with related accessories and industrial communications options such as HART, IO Link, CAN, Modbus, RS 232 and RS 485. Global Intex engineers ruggedized cable harnesses and electrical connectors for hazardous and non hazardous settings. Excel Manufacturing produces high precision valves, actuators, and related control devices, with offerings that carry globally accepted explosion protection approvals for use in critical industries. Paquin Engineered Products supplies hydraulic, pneumatic, and fluid control components from long term partners, backed by technical support and rapid shipment.

Our products are selected and built through an engineering process that emphasizes specification accuracy, material suitability, and verifiable performance testing. We highlight quality protocols and reference certifications and marks on applicable product lines, including ISO 9001, ATEX, IECEx, UL, CSA, CE and UKCA, with additional approvals such as MSHA and MASC.

Industries served include water & wastewater, food & beverage, HVAC & refrigeration, heavy duty process, underground mining, oil & gas, hydrogen, agricultural equipment, factory automation, test & measurement, and general manufacturing equipment. Applications range from tightly controlled environments to the most extreme conditions on Earth where durability and reliable data are mandatory.

Your benefit:
Higher efficiency. Less scrap. Predictable quality.

Our technology takes your production to the next level:
 Reduced injection pressure (e.g. in cascade molds)
 Early detection and removal of defective parts
 Transparent process stability – even with recycled materials
 Predictive maintenance via continuous wear monitoring

Why Moldsonics?
 Retrofit on existing molds & machines
 No media contact – easy and robust integration
 Real-time data for PLC and quality control
 ROI in less than 6 months (based on pilot projects)

With over 12 years of research expertise in plastics engineering, we deliver tailor-made solutions that work in practice – not just in the lab.

 Let’s talk about how we can make your production smarter.
Reach out here on LinkedIn or at moldsonics.com

FTIR, Gas Detector, Portable GC-MS, VOCs Analyzer, Flue Gas Emissions Continuous Monitoring System, etc.

Metal analysis, Medicine industry, Food industry, Environmental analysis industry, Petroleum and chemical industry, Semiconductor industry, etc.

Name: H&B Sensors

Name: Sensors + Testing Monthly
Description:
Sensors + Testing Monthly is a global B2B e-news platform showcasing advancements in sensors, instrumentation, data acquisition, testing, simulation, metrology, calibration, and software.

Our editorial coverage spans product design and development, engineering, systems integration, and component manufacturing—with a focus on smarter design, greater reliability, and faster innovation. 

We highlight emerging applications across aerospace, automotive, industrial automation, energy, and electronics as well as in battery + electrification, industrial AI and machine learning, IIoT, MEMS and nanotechnology, photonics, process control, quantum, robotics, semiconductors, wearables, and wireless within the global sensors and testing ecosystem, while advocating for supply chain diversity, sustainability, and small business.

Published on the Components Source Network, Powered by Embassy Global, LLC — the world’s first and only 100% woman-founded, -owned, and -led publishing and consultancy network (WBE/WOSB/DOBE certified) serving the high-tech manufacturing and engineering sectors — Sensors + Testing Monthly connects engineers, OEMs, and technical professionals worldwide through expert-driven content designed to educate, inform, and empower.

As part of a growing portfolio of 11 specialized e-news sites, Sensors + Testing Monthly contributes to a living data ecosystem that informs key industry stakeholders, public and private sector leaders, and academia. Together, our publications advance awareness, advocacy, and sustainable innovation across the global supply chain.

Our sister publications include:

• Industrial Automation Monthly
• Robotics Industry Monthly
• Electronics Industry Monthly
• Semiconductor Industry Monthly
• Photonics Industry Monthly
• AI + Quantum Tech Monthly
• Process Control Industry Monthly
• EV + Battery Tech Monthly
• Aerospace Technology Monthly
• Industrial Sustainability Monthly

Visit our site today to join the conversation.

Name: Irtech

Na poziom zadowolenia z zakupu urządzeń pomiarowych składa się wiele czynników, dlatego pracujemy od A do Z. Wspólnie z klientem analizujemy jego potrzeby, dobieramy rozwiązania dopasowane do posiadanego budżetu, kompleksowo szkolimy, a na koniec – zapewniamy wsparcie merytoryczne i serwisowe na każdym etapie prowadzonych badań i pomiarów.

Name: Lange-Electronic GmbH
Description:
We develop, produce and distribute systems adapted to the needs and projects of our customers. We generate and distribute very precise time, frequencies or pulses for the synchronization and control of test ranges, laboratories, sensitive computer networks or vehicles.

Our analog and digital clocks and time displays make the time and additional information visible from afar.

We offer our own time and frequency systems worldwide, the products of the companies Masterclock, Elproma and PikTime in German-speaking countries.

Another area that has evolved from working with the precise time signals of satellite navigation systems is the simulation of satellite systems. With the help of a GNSS simulator, navigation devices can be reliably developed and tested under laboratory conditions. We represent the company Spirent Communications in Germany, Switzerland and Austria.

Functional Safety: STOLZ provides functional safety services to IEC 61508 standard with TÜV Rheinland FS certified engineers. Full or partial life cycle support is offered. Process Measurement: STOLZ excels in providing reliable process measurement solutions tailored to diverse industries. Control Systems: We can review, design and implement control systems to enhance operational efficiency across industries. Our custom-tailored control solutions streamline processes, reduce downtime, and boost overall performance, helping clients meet their unique operational goals.

Name: Duff and Macintosh Pty Ltd
Description:
Duff & Macintosh Pty Ltd (est. 1928) are suppliers of:

Posiadamy wyspecjalizowaną pracownie ciśnień, w której sprawdzamy i wystawiamy świadectwa sprawdzenia na przyrządy do pomiaru ciśnienia. Oferujemy usługi ultradźwiękowej kontroli poprawności działania odwadniaczy pary i zaworów odcinających.

Oferujemy usługi związane z optymalizacją kotłowni parowych. Projektujemy i wykonujemy kotłownie parowe, węzły para/woda, wymiennikownie, stacje uzdatniania wody.

Name: Senhitu
Description:
We are a team of three air quality experts and research scientists at Senhitu, a company specializing in air quality monitoring and management. Our team has extensive experience in academic research, commercial air quality expert services, and regulatory air quality measurements and know-how. We share a deep commitment to improving air quality and providing reliable air quality monitoring solutions for individuals, organizations, and communities. At Senhitu, we leverage our expertise and passion to help our clients achieve their air quality goals and improve the health and well-being of people and the environment.

Our flagship product, the HITU aerosol sensor, is at the forefront of accessible air quality monitoring technology. The HITU sensor is designed to provide reliable and accurate measurements of particulate matter (PM1, PM2.5 and PM10), a major contributor to air pollution and associated health risks. With its compact and user-friendly design, the HITU sensor can be easily installed in homes, offices, and public spaces, as well as industrial facilities and outdoor monitoring stations to provide real-time air quality data. This allows individuals and organizations to take informed actions to reduce their exposure to air pollution and improve their overall health and well-being. At Senhitu, we are proud to offer the HITU sensor as part of our commitment to making air quality monitoring accessible to everyone.

Name: Thélyos
Description:
Thélyos – Revolutionizing Thermal Nanoscale Characterization! 

At Thélyos, we are pushing the boundaries of Scanning Thermal Microscopy (SThM) to deliver unmatched precision in nanoscale thermal analysis. 
With the increasing complexity of semiconductor devices and advanced materials, understanding temperature distribution at the nanoscale is now more critical than ever.

 What We Do
Thélyos develops characterization solutions for thermal studies.  
Our core technology : high-performance SThM probes and cutting-edge electronic modules designed to integrate seamlessly with Atomic Force Microscopes (AFM). 

Our solutions provide:
 Sub-10 nm thermal resolution for ultra-precise characterization
 Innovative patented NbN-based thermometer probes for enhanced sensitivity
 Automated calibration & data interpretation tools to simplify analysis

 Why It Matters
Traditional methods fail to capture thermal properties at the required scale, limiting insights into semiconductor hot spots, phase transitions, and energy dissipation. 

Our technology enables:
 Better failure analysis for semiconductor R&D
 Optimized thermal management in microelectronics
 Enhanced metrology for next-gen materials & devices

 Join the Nanoscale Revolution
We are looking for partners, AFM manufacturers, and semiconductor leaders to collaborate on cutting-edge projects. 
Whether you're in academic research, industrial R&D, or advanced metrology, Nanotip is ready to elevate your thermal characterization capabilities.

 Let’s talk!    contact@thelyos.com

#Thelyos #Nanotip #SThM #AFM #ThermalMetrology #Semiconductors #Nanocharacterization #ScanningThermalMicroscopy

Disponemos también de laboratorio acreditado ISO/IEC 17025:2017 para la realización de ensayos acelerados de intemperismo y corrosión.

Name: Dewesoft Srl
Description:
Dewesoft handles complete data acquisition instrument design, development, manufacturing, sales and marketing... ALL IN ONE HAND.

We are producing very flexible measurement instruments to measure parameters like voltage, current, strain, force, torque, pressure, distance, speed, rotational angle, rotational speed, velocity, vibration, sound, video, GPS, IMU - everything perfectly synchronized.

We can also connect to wide variety of modern vehicle and industrial bus systems such as CAN, Flexray, OBD, CCP, XCP, ARINC 429, MIL 1553, PCM, iNET, Chapter 10, Ethernet,  Serial, Modbus, Siemens S7, OPC UA and many others.

Our turn key software Dewesoft handles all these data with easy to use flexible interface providing ultra fast storage, reload, display, export and processing capabilities such as filtering, math formula, statistics, power analysis, FFT analysis, order tracking,  modal analysis, torsional and rotational vibration, combustion analysis, acoustic and many many others.

DEWESoft was founded back in year 2000 and today DEWESoft products are being used in many applications by global market leaders all around the world. Dewesoft positioned it self in the global market with innovations in software and hardware products. We gained trust with our customers by keeping a close contact and tight support on all levels from sales down to technical support.

For more information please visit our web site or contact
support@dewesoft.com

Name: Rivertrace Limited
Description:
Specialists in water quality monitoring

Rivertrace Limited is an ISO9001 Quality-Assured Company and market leader with over 30 years’ experience of oil-in-water monitoring.

The company employs approximately 25 people at our 10,000 sq. ft. factory close to Redhill, 20 miles south of central London. Our global network of agents ensures local service and support worldwide. 

Today we are at the forefront of designing systems that not only meet but go beyond the requirements of tightening environmental legislation.  

Marine
Rivertrace produces a range of products that meet and exceed the I.M.O. resolutions MEPC 107(49) and MEPC 108 (49) relating to water discharges from ships.
Our commitment to ongoing development ensures that these products remain at the forefront of available technology, and consistently push the boundaries of oil-in-water analysis.
Whatever your environmental monitoring needs, Rivertrace has the solution.

Industrial
Rivertrace has the solution to your environmental monitoring needs and can tailor make systems to your own individual requirements.
The range of monitoring applications covered includes boiler water, condensate cooling water, produced water and discharge water.

Name: ZENNER worldwide
Description:
ZENNER International GmbH & Co. KG, with headquarters in Saarbrücken, develops, produces and sells technology of metering and metrology for global markets. The product line includes apartment-, residential- and bulk-water meters, heat meters, gas meters and modern system technology such as radio-systems (wireless-bus, LPWAN for Internet of Things, GSM) and M-Bus systems. 

In 2016 Zenner was starting the transition path into the digitalisation with an own IoT-business (internet of things). Since 2018 Zenner is also offering full-integrated IoT-solutions from innovative sensor-devices over connectivity, fixed-networks up to IoT-cloud-services and IoT-applications for smart metering, smart utilitys and smart citys.

Zenner customers primarily include power suppliers and public utilities, but also industrial companies, wholesalers and measurement service providers. ZENNER has own production facilities in Europe, Asia and the USA and is represented with 40 local companies all over the world. Founded in 1903, the company has been a member of the family-managed corporate group Minol-ZENNER since 2005. Around 4.250 employees work for ZENNER worldwide.

Name: SHRIDHAN Automation, India
Description:
Shridhan  manufactures Field Instrumentation for highly critical applications along with necessary product and system Approvals to support most Global Applications in Oil & Gas, Onshore and Offshore, Power, Steel, Pharmaceutical, Chemical, Food & Beverages, Marine and Mining industries.

Our global sales and marketing reach covers Middle East, USA, Northern Europe and Far East with diverse sales and representative offices. 

Having a team of qualified Engineers, Technicians & Highly Experienced Employees - we form a superior solution provider to your application needs.

Shridhan firmly believes that continuous pursuit of customer satisfaction starts with the close analysis of our customer requirement and continuous innovation that is consistently performing in the market with an excellent product range and support.

An essential part of our activities in the last decade has been expanding our global reach with our subsidiary in the Middle East and gradual implementation of expanding our product manufacturing facilities globally which lead to enlarging our customer base around the world.

In the coming years, we strive to be one of the most reputed brands in Field Instrumentation worldwide.

Name: SCAIME
Description:
With over 40 years of experience, SCAIME is one of the world leaders in weighing for automated systems and a specialist in measurement for industry and structural monitoring by means of fibre optics.
The company employs 95 staff and achieved a turnover of almost 16 million euros in 2023. With continual growth in recent years, the company is pursuing its development ambitions while also retaining its human scale.
Committed to this growth and to customer satisfaction, our teams based on the Annemasse site have developed expertise in a wide range of skills.
Our production site houses a number of special facilities, including a cleanroom, climatic chambers, laser welding robots, and linked calibration systems.
The flexible and modern production resources at the French headquarters, combined with those of the Shenzhen site in China, enable SCAIME to ensure the best price/quality ratio for manufacturing with high added value, as well as for large production runs of standardised parts.
It is thanks to this mastery of the entire design and manufacturing process that SCAIME is able to provide quality in keeping with the most demanding international standards.
Based in France, the company is pursuing a proactive strategy of international expansion across all continents.
For this purpose, SCAIME has a worldwide network, provided by a presence in more than 65 countries in collaboration with specialist partners and distributors.
This presence is further strengthened by the establishment of commercial offices in China (Shanghai) and in Germany.
This international development strategy enables the company to achieve more than 45% of its turnover from exports.

Name: OxyGuard International
Description: OxyGuard International is leading supplier of equipment for water quality measuring and monitoring to the aquaculture and other markets around the world. We supply a wide range of portable and stationary equipment - from simple oxygen probes to advanced systems which can control an entire fish farm. The hallmarks of OxyGuard equipment are reliability and accuracy.

Name: ZERA GmbH
Description:
ZERA develops and manufactures systems for producing, measuring, testing and calibrating electrical quantities and sells them worldwide. Renowned utilities as well as meter and instrument transformer manufacturers are among our customers.
ZERA is an independent company, led by its employees. Maintaining close contact to our customers and long-term thinking oriented toward cooperation define our actions.

Name: PARS SANAT ESHTEAL
Description:
مجموعه پارس صنعت اشتعال در زمینه واردات و تأمین تجهیزات صنعتی و ابزار دقیق به ویژه کالاهای نایاب و تحریمی فعالیت گسترده داشته و با عنایت به بهره مندی از کارشناسان فنی و مجرب در زمینه های برق , اتوماسیون , ابزار دقیق و بازرگانی، توانایی واردات و تهیه کلیه تجهیزات مورد نیاز شما را با مناسب ترین قیمت و کوتاه ترین زمان تحویل و با کیفیت عالی دارا می باشد.

با استفاده از ما می توانید تمامی ملزومات صنایع نفت، گاز، پتروشیمی و نیروگاهی را بدون محدودیت و مستقیماً تهیه فرمایید.

این گروه بازرگانی همواره با حذف واسطه های موجود در عرضه کالا و ارائه محصولات با قیمتهای واقعی رضایت مشتریان را به شکلی شایسته پاسخگو می باشد. و همچنین با دارا بودن دفاتر رسمی در کشور های امارات متحده ,ترکیه و چین , قابلیت تهیه و تأمین کلیه تجهیزات و قطعات مورد نیاز را به شرح ذیل دارد:

– تهيه اقلام ابزار دقیق شامل انواع فلومترها , ترانسمیترها, سوییچ ها, سنسور ها و گیج ها

– واردات انواع چراغ های ضد انفجار برای صنایع نفت, گاز , معدن و آتشنشانی

– تهيه انواع شیرهای صنعتی شامل شیرهای کنترلی ، دستی و برقی

– تامین قطعات یدكی (Spare part) مورد نیاز تجهیزات اتوماسیون صنعتی و ابزار دقیق

– تامین تجهیزات آزمایشگاهی و انواع آنالایزرها

Name: DEKA SA
Description:
DEKA SA was founded in 1940 and deals with Import & Trade of Measurement and Automation Instruments.
Following a particularly successful presence in the Greek market– since 1940– and always bearing the best customer service as its priority, DEKA SA in order to meet the challenges of the times, constantly specializes and  always seeking to optimize its knowledge and performance.
The company’s experienced associates, both in the technical and commercial sector, constitute a precious asset in its constant effort of satisfying the customer needs, trusting the company all those years.
With respect and a high sense of responsibility, DEKA SA continues to provide successful solutions across a broad range of shipping, industrial, laboratory and manufacturing applications.

Name: Meteoxperts Solutions
Description:
At MeteoXperts, we transform weather data into powerful insights.
We design and deliver advanced meteorological, solar, and environmental monitoring systems — helping industries, researchers, and governments make data-driven decisions.

From Automatic Weather Stations (AWS) and Wind Monitoring Masts to Solar Resource Assessment and Thunderstorm Detection Systems, our solutions are built to perform in the toughest terrains — from Antarctica to the Himalayas.

With 1000+ successful installations and partnerships with leading organizations like IMD, IITM, DRDO, NHPC, UNDP, and ADANI etc. we’re proud to be a Make-in-India pioneer delivering world-class, standards-compliant (WMO | IEC | CEA | ISO) technologies.

Our goal is to empower you with knowledge and insights to make informed choices in this dynamic field. Explore our collection of articles and stay updated with the latest developments in instrumentation.

Name: GENTEK ELEKTRONIK SAN TIC A.S
Description:
GENTEK Elektronik San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. Endüstriyel Elektronik alanında Türkiye'de ve dünyada farklılık yaratmak amacıyla 2009 yılında kurulmuştur.

Tasarımını ve üretimini yaptığı ürünleriyle farklılığını ön plana çıkaran GENTEK, Amerika, Fransa, İsviçre, Mısır ve Hindistan gibi ülkelerde distribütörlükler kurarak adını, Türkiye ve dünyada kabul ettirmeyi başarmıştır.

Kısa sayılabilecek bir geçmişi olmasına rağmen, elde ettiği başarıların en önemli nedenleri, çağdaş, dinamik ve genç bir kadroya sahip oluşu ile güçlü bir Ar-Ge yapılanmasını sağlamış olmasıdır.

Gentek Elektronik olarak anlayışımız; "Yapılmayanı yapmak" tır...
Yani; Rakiplerinden ürün kopyalamak yerine, endüstriyel elektronik alanında ihtiyaç duyulan ürünleri, yapılan piyasa analizleri sonucunda ve cesurca alınan kararlar doğrultusunda risk alarak üretmektir.

Her yıl bütçe planlamalarında en büyük payı Ar-Ge ve Reklam/Tanıtım hizmetlerine ayıran şirketimiz, markasının Türkiye ve dünya pazarlarında bilinirliğini her geçen gün arttırmak konusunda kararlıdır.

Gentek Elektronik, Bundan sonra da Endüstriyel Elektronik sektöründe farklılıklarıyla adından söz ettirmeye devam edecektir.

Name: Anton Paar Switzerland
Description:
Anton Paar GmbH, founded in 1922 as a one-man locksmith‘s workshop, today is a globally active high-tech company headquartered in Graz, Austria with 35 subsidiaries worldwide. The company currently counts 4,200 employees. Anton Paar develops and produces high-precision laboratory instruments as well as process measurement technology and provides custom-tailored automation and robotics solutions.

A love of research and high quality standards have made Anton Paar a world market leader in the fields of density measurement, the determination of dissolved CO2, rheomety, material characterization and the production of complex high-precision parts, e.g. for medicinal prostheses. Innovation is essential: About 20 % of the company’s annual turnover is invested in Research & Development.

Anton Paar provides solutions to industries in over 110 countries. Customers include, among others, the world’s largest soft drink producers, all major breweries, the chemical and pharmaceutical industry and food producers, including chocolate manufacturers.

Anton Paar GmbH is owned by the Santner Foundation, which is exclusively and directly aimed at charitable causes.

Name: Aavad Instrument Pvt. Ltd.
Description: AAVAD Instrument Pvt. Ltd. is an ISO 9001:2015-certified engineering firm specializing in manufacturing and supplying high-precision measuring instruments for temperature, pressure, flow, level, automation, and instrumentation cables. Established in 2009, AAVAD has grown rapidly, serving over 2,300 clients worldwide. The company is committed to delivering innovative, customized solutions with a strong focus on quality, on-time delivery, and exceptional after-sales support, helping industries optimize performance with cutting-edge technology.

Name: Micro Sensor
Description:
Since its inception in 1993, Micro Sensor Co., Ltd. (Micro Sensor) has been a global manufacturer and service provider of industrial instrumentation. Specializing in providing industrial measuring instrument solutions for pressure, level, temperature, and flow, Micro Sensor serves various industries including oil & gas, renewable energy, industrial gases, water & wastewater, marine & shipbuilding, HVAC, hydraulics & pneumatics, mechanical manufacturing & automation, as well as food & beverage and paper. 
Micro Sensor boasts a global workforce of over 800 employees and operates four industrial parks in three locations in China (Baoji, Xi'an, and Shanghai), with the additional establishment of Micro Sensor GmbH in Essen, Germany. The company's technical R&D is based on the "IPD R&D management system," with over 100 core R&D experts and 223 authorized patents and software copyrights, including 20 invention patents, as well as over 240 domestic and international certificates. It serves customers in over 100 countries and regions, accumulating to over 20,000 satisfied clients.

Name: Anton Paar UK
Description:
Anton Paar Limited, a subsidiary of Anton Paar GmbH, provides sales, application support and service to users across the UK.

The company is SafeContractor approved for the installation of measuring instruments to measure the density and viscosity of liquids. 

Anton Paar develops, produces, distributes and provides support for analytical instruments used in research, development and quality control worldwide.  

Established in 1922, Anton Paar GmbH today is owned by the charitable Santner Foundation. With headquarters in Graz, Austria, the company currently has over 4,500 employees and is active in over 110 countries worldwide. 

The core competence of the company – high-precision production – and close contact to the scientific community form the basis for the quality of Anton Paar’s instruments. Continuous training and investements in R&D ensure that its products live up to their excellent reputation. 

Customers of Anton Paar include the largest international soft drink producers and breweries, petroleum and food companies, the chemical and pharmaceutical industries and many prestigious universities.

For more on Anton Paar UK,  follow us on LinkedIn and Facebook or contact us directly at:  https://www.anton-paar.com/contact/

Name: KARL DEUTSCH Prüf- und Messgerätebau | Made in Germany | family-owned | since 1949
Description:
Welcome to KARL DEUTSCH
The privately owned company KARL DEUTSCH was founded in 1949 and develops and produces instruments for non-destructive material testing. Portable instruments, stationary testing systems, sensors and crack detection liquids are produces by 130 motivated employees in two works in Wuppertal. Additional 20 employees in international offices and a worldwide network of dealers support the export business which accounts for more than 50% of the turnover. Our customers are metal producing and processing industries, e.g. steel works, automotive companies and bearing manufacturers. Typical test tasks are ultrasonic weld testing, detection of shrink holes in castings, crack detection in forgings with magnetic particles and dye penetrants, safety components for railway and aerospace as well as the wall and coating thickness measurement.

The company was initiatiated in year 2000, as the first and only "Scientific Measurement Systems" manufacturer of Turkey, researching & developing products under the TESTBOX  brand. Since 2000, TDG has been the local market leaders in designing technologies, products, and solutions for structural & earthquake engineering.

Name: Institute for Photonics and Advanced Sensing (IPAS)

1988 yılında kimyasal analiz cihazlarına teknik servis desteğini merkezine koyarak kurulan firmamız, farklı sekterlere analitik ölçüm cihazları satış ve teknik servis desteği hizmeti vermektedir. Metalurji ve döküm sektöründe yaygın olarak kullanılan Almanya merkezli Hitachi High-Tech optik emisyon spektrometreleriyle birlikte, başta hurda metal geri dönüşüm, giriş kalite ve malzeme doğrulama, madencilik, kıymetli metal analizlerinde kullanılan taşınabilir XRF analiz cihazlarında dünya lideri ABD firması Thermo Scientific’in Türkiye satış ve teknik servis sorumlusudur.

İlk temsilciliğini yaptığımız firma, İngiltere merkezli HILGER ANALYTICAL olmuştur. Bu dönemde 50 den fazla spektrometrenin satışını yapan firmamız, 2000 yılında HILGER ANALYTICAL’ın kapanmasının ardından 2001 yılından itibaren de Almanya’da kurulu WAS AG’nin Türkiye distribütörü olmuştur. 2007 yılında Alman WAS AG ile  İngiltere kökenli OXFORD INSTRUMENTS  birleşmiş, ardından 2017 yılı sonunda Japon devi HITACHI markası altında yine ALMANYA ‘da üretilen optik emisyon spektrometrelerin satış ve teknik destek hizmetlerine devam etmiştir. Bugüne dek de 850'den fazla spektrometrenin satışı ve kurulumu gerçekleşmiş olup, bu alandaki  lider firmalardan biri olmuştur.

Taşınabilir XRF analiz cihazlarındaki gelişimimiz ise 2002 yılında ABD kökenli  NITON LLC ile başlamıştır. Dünyada ilk defa NITON tarafından üretilen taşınabilir XRF analiz cihazları ile piyasaya  giren firmamız, ülkemizde pek bilinmeyen bu analiz tekniğini yaygınlaştırarak  hızlı bir çıkış yakalamıştır. 2007 yılında yine ABD  merkezli  THERMO SCIENTIFIC  ile  NITON LLC’i birleşti  ve firmamız THERMO SCIENTIFIC’in taşınabilir XRF analiz cihazlarında Türkiye resmi satış ve teknik servis merkezi haline gelmiştir. Bugüne kadar başta metal geridönüşüm, PMI, kıymetli metal,  madencilik ve elektronik RoHS testi gibi alanlarda kullanılan 850'den fazla NITON XRF analiz cihazının satışı yapılmış ve teknik servis destek hizmetine devam edilmektedir.

Name: Sensmet Ltd
Description:
Don't wait for laboratory analysis - get the battery metal concentration results now!
 
Sensmet has simplified optical emission spectroscopy and brings the ICP-OES performance next to the process - online and 100% automated. Today, Sensmet's µDOES is the only existing low maintenance analytical technology capable of real-time multi-metal concentration measurements in industrial liquid processes.

µDOES (Micro-discharge Optical Emission Spectroscopy) is a superior online measurement technology to quantify lithium and other key battery metals in hydrometallurgical processes! Typical measurements include Li, Mn, Co, Ni, K, Mg, Na, Ca, Zn, Al, Fe.

The µDOES is based on optical emission spectroscopy; a spark (=micro-plasma) is generated directly inside the aqueous sample. During a millisecond-long plasma discharge (= spark), the sample solution gets flash-heated to a high 10,000°C temperature: molecular species in the water get dissociated into atoms, followed by excitation of the atoms to their higher electronic states. Atoms release their excess energy by emitting optical light upon returning to their ground state. Analysis of the atomic emission spectrum enables qualitative and quantitative analysis of metals." 

If you are interested and want to realise the benefits of the unique µDOES analyser technology in your industrial process, please contact us.

Name: Photothermal Spectroscopy Corp
Description:
Photothermal Spectroscopy Corp (PSC) is a Santa Barbara, CA, based scientific equipment company that pioneered sub-micron IR microscopy and spectroscopy. PSC’s vision is to enable the power of sub-micron IR spectroscopy to be applied to high value problems in both industry and academia via the adoption of O-PTIR and co-located multi-modal techniques.

With the introduction of the mIRage product, we pioneered a breakthrough sub-micron-Infrared spectroscopy and microscopy technique called Optical Photothermal Infrared (O-PTIR). O-PTIR eliminates key limitations of traditional IR spectroscopy providing sub-micron IR spatial resolution with transmission-like FTIR quality spectra in non-contact reflection mode with no Mie scattering effects. 

The subsequent release of the mIRage-R product combined O-PTIR with Raman introducing the world’s first simultaneous Infrared and Raman microscope and spectroscopy system, providing simultaneous IR and Raman data from the exact same spot, at the same time, with the same sub-micron spatial resolution enabling complementary and confirmatory data from both techniques.

The launch of the mIRage-LS extended platform capabilities by combining O-PTIR with co-located fluorescence microscopy and further improved IR spatial resolution to sub-500nm. The mIRage-LS allows O-PTIR technology to address high value life science research problems not able to be addressed by conventional IR microscopy.

O-PTIR is one of the highest growth techniques in microscopy addressing areas in life science, microplastics, bioplastics, semiconductor, failure analysis and chemical and polymeric materials.

Oferecemos uma solução completa para diversas indústrias, incluindo aparelhos de medição eletrônica, dispositivos de controle GD&T, dispositivos de processo, entre outros. Nosso compromisso com a excelência e precisão é refletido em cada solução que entregamos.

Acesse nosso site e descubra como a Audax Soluções Industriais pode elevar a precisão e qualidade de seus projetos e operações!

Name: FTI Flow Technology, LLC
Description:
FTI Flow Technology, recognized in the U.S. and worldwide for manufacturing specialized, high accuracy flow metering solutions, offers an unmatched flow measurement resource, including 50+ years experience solving the most difficult applications.
FTI is able to provide flow solutions for a variety of applications from our robust offering of flow meters, in addition to having the engineering capabilities to customize a meter to fit your needs.
Our accredited factory calibration lab is able to quickly calibrate a variety of different flow meters to keep downtime to a minimum.

Name: TPI Sp. z o.o.
Description:
TPI is the well established supplier of measurement solutions for surveying, construction, industry, precise agriculture. The company has its own network named TPI Netpro, consisting of 136 items adopted for geodetic. Company is supplier of Topcon, Faro, Geoslam, SenseFly  Sokkia, Nivel System solutions for 3D scanning, documentation, construction and geodesy. 
The consequence of many years of development was the launch of own branches in Wroclaw, Poznan, Krakow and Gdansk. Currently, we have also branches in the Ukraine, Lithuania, Czech Republic, Slovakia and Romania. 
Systematic growth, weight attached to the training and development of sales network meant that today we are the market leading supplier of measuring equipment.

Name: LIQUIDLOOP
Description:
We accelerate research and innovation in green energy storage and conversion.

LIQUIDLOOP GmbH is at the forefront of sustainable technology and process analytics, with a vision to become the industry leader in the processes of liquid-to-gas separation. We support your research with a Multi Functional Differential Electrochemical Mass Spectrometry - DEMS.

Name: PYRO ELECTRIC INSTRUMENTS GOA PVT LTD
Description:
Pyro Electric Instruments Goa Pvt Ltd is a leading manufacturer of primary process control instruments in the field of temperature, heating, pressure and flow measurement. Founded in 1991, the Company has a strong customer base in the sectors of Oil & Gas, onshore and offshore, Gas and oil refining, downstream petrochemical plants, Power, Iron and Steel, Pharmaceuticals and, Solar power plants.

Pyro Electric specializes in customized solutions, and has a wide experience in critical temperature measurement applications such as high temperature Furnaces, Cracker coil outlet tubes, Reactor catalyst temperature, reformers, regenerators, boiler beds, heater tubes etc.

Pyro Electric has its manufacturing base in India, and overseas partner locations in the UK & Japan. Besides this, it operates in Malaysia, Oman, UAE, South Korea through its offices and partner agents.

Name: Guilcor Instruments
Description:
Guilcor Instruments est la marque B2B de Guilcor Group, spécialisée dans les thermomètres et instruments de mesure pour les professionnels : cuisine, agroalimentaire, santé, laboratoires, BTP…

Notre site propose plus de 400 références testées et approuvées, prêtes à l’emploi.

 Produits fiables, service client réactif, pas d’abonnement caché
 Livraison rapide en France et en Europe

 Pour mieux mesurer, c’est par ici : https://www.thermometre.fr/

Name: Omniflex - Remote Monitoring Specialists
Description:
Omniflex is a global, industry-leading designer and manufacturer of electronic instrumentation for the oil & gas, petro-chemical, nuclear, mining, infrastructure, utilities and pharmaceutical sectors, with over 55 years in the business.

We specialise in remote monitoring in harsh industrial environments. This includes web based remote monitoring solutions including IIoT,  industrial networking, remote I/O systems, utilities monitoring, radiological surveillance systems, cathodic protection systems, signal conditioning, and alarm and event management.

Our teams of engineers have a passion for problem solving and can work with you to select the most suitable product from our wide range and  develop cost-effective solutions that reliably deliver results.

The company was founded in 1965 and was originally named CONLOG, developing an enviable reputation in systems integration and product development for the process control and instrumentation market.

Omniflex now has offices in South Africa, United Kingdom and Australia, and the company’s products are sold on 5 continents through a range of carefully selected solutions partners. Products include such well known brands as Data2Desktop web based remote monitoring, Omnergy Utilities management solutions, Omni16 alarm annunciators, Maxiflex process automation, Teleterm remote I/O and RTU systems, and Omniterm signal conditioning and remote I/O systems.

Name: ZENNER Brasil
Description: HIDRÔMETROS, MEDIDORES DE ENERGIA TÉRMICA, MEDIDORES DE GÁS, TECNOLOGIA DE SISTEMAS

Name: Anton Paar Australia & New Zealand
Description:
Anton Paar develops, produces, distributes and provides support for analytical instruments used in research, development and quality control worldwide.  

Founded in 1922 in Austria, the company is the market leader in measuring density, viscosity, and carbon dioxide. Furthermore, Anton Paar offers accurate devices for the examination of surfaces, particles, or diluted gases like oxygen and develops tailor-made analytical solutions that can be integrated into existing or new processes according to specific customer requests. Industries producing food and beverages, cosmetics, petrol based products, pharmaceuticals, and many others rely on products from the Austrian high tech corporation.Anton Paar GmbH today is owned by the charitable Santner Foundation. With headquarters in Graz, Austria, the company currently has 4,500 employees and is active in over 110 countries worldwide. 

On 1st January 2018, Anton Paar launched new subsidiaries in Sydney, Australia, and Auckland, New Zealand, to meet the growing demands for high quality instrumentation and an ever expanding network of customers. Both offices feature laboratories and collaborative spaces to demonstrate new applications and host educational workshops to improve the end-user experience.

With our brand-new direct subsidiaries in Australia and New Zealand, we at Anton Paar have moved closer to our customers. Our dedicated national network of experienced Territory Managers and factory trained Service Technicians bring together almost 60+ years of combined experience in Anton Paar products and service.

For more information on Anton Paar Australia and Anton Paar New Zealand, contact us directly at: https://www.anton-paar.com/contact

Name: SIKORA International Corporation
Description: For over fifty years, SIKORA has set international standards with exceptional measuring, control, and testing devices for the wire, cable, hose, tube, pipe, sheet, and plastics industries. Certified according to ISO 9001:2015, we've been committed to developing groundbreaking measuring technology and providing innovative product solutions that are not only reliable, but safe. Your SIKORA team is here to help you meet your company’s goals, whether they involve improving product quality, reducing startup scrap, or minimizing environmental impact.

Name: Leyro Instruments
Description:
Leyro Instruments is a specialized company in the manufacture, distribution and maintenance of calibration and measurement equipment.

We provide solutions in relation with various sectors of the industry. We aim to provide the best solutions with the most accurate and intuitive technology in a key market for the production and service sectors. Nowadays each factory, research laboratory, university, office, hospital or facility new construction is a potential customer of our products.

Our business philosophy is focused on total customer commitment . We know that our products must be supported by an excellent advice service, training, repair and maintenance.
Location: San Sebastián de los Reyes, Madrid

Name: Satron Instruments Inc.
Description:
We at Satron develop, design and manufacture top-notch process instruments and smart measuring devices. We offer you tools to measure pressure, differential pressure, turbidity, consistency, solids content, density and liquid level. We also offer the best installation solutions for various applications.

We are known to form a strong bond with our customers, and that means we have expert consultation readily available. Our products serve the needs of customers in over 90 countries. Satron is proud of top-notch quality, customer service & fast lead times ensuring long term customer satisfaction. Our amazing team is adding value to our clients and maintaining Satron Instruments products as customer’s first choice. 

We at Satron value the expertise of our customers. And we take pride in offering the best tools to make exact calculations, to stabilize and optimize production processes in various industries.

When your business, be it in pulp & paper, process or food & beverage industry, calls for instruments that leave no room for error, look no further. We design them to fit your process perfectly.

Name: Japsin Instrumentation Private Limited
Description:
Welcome to "Ji" Japsin Instrumentation, a leading force in the realm of process control instrumentation.

Established with a passion for precision and a commitment to excellence, we have been instrumental in transforming industries through our innovative solutions.

"Ji" gauges Pressure and temperature Instruments are CE Compliance.

Name: Testo Saveris Global

We offer our customers the testo Saveris Solutions, combining innovative measuring technology with intuitively operated software and tailored services. Founded in 2022 and rapidly growing, Testo Solutions is building on over 60 years of experience in developing measurement technology and solutions together with our customers in the most demanding target groups. Be ready for tomorrows challenges with Testo’s data-driven, smarter food and pharma safety management systems.

Name: GREENCITYZEN
Description:
GreenCityZen is an eco- startup that designs and sells technology solutions for the environmental measurement, addressed to its environmental industrial customers and the smart and sustainable cities.
Green CityZen develops the Humm solution , " IoT for the environment " , an innovative solution for the management and control of environmental sensors fleets, cost effective, scalable , and natively interoperable. The Humm box collects data continuously toward the cloud, analyzing and combining them with external data sources to effectively measure impacts and improve environmental performance.
GreenCityZen designs and sells innovative, cost effective and scalable IoT (internet of things) solutions for the management and monitoring of environmental sensors fleets. These solutions continuously capture data, store them in the cloud, analyzing and eventually combining them with external data sources to measure environmental impacts and improving environmental performance for its customer’s efficiency and productivity.

Name: Swan Analytical UK
Description:
Swan Analytical Instruments is a pioneering technology provider of online water quality measuring analytical systems. Our instruments are distinguished by their reliability, quality and user-friendliness. Swan's comprehensive instrumentation portfolio is entirely dedicated to water analysis providing reliable and cost efficient as well as low-maintenance instrument solutions. 

We understand that every water cycle is unique and the combination of superior software design with proven measuring procedures and methods, enables our instruments to be highly flexible in their utility. Our on-line monitoring instruments help to improve the efficiency and productivity of your processes while assuring the water quality. 

Swan cherishes the Swiss tradition of high precision manufacturing with its only production facility in Switzerland that includes a rigorous quality control to guarantee performance. We develop and produce all measuring and control systems ourselves and more than 30 years of experience has led to innovative product solutions for effortlessly integration into your water processes. Ensuring high quality and reliability of our instruments is of utmost importance to us.

Swan covers the following applications:
 Potable & Municipal Waste Water
 Power & Industrial
 Pharmaceutical Water
 Pool & Sanitary
 Semiconductor
 Food & Beverage

And the following parameters:
 Ammonium
 Chlorine / Ozone / CIO2
 Conductivity & Resistivity 
 Dissolved Oxygen
 Fluoride
 Hydrazine / Carbohydrazide
 Nitrate
 Organics (UV254)
 pH & Redox (ORP)
 Phosphate
 Silica
 Sodium
 Total Organic Carbon
 Turbidity

We make water safe.

Name: iba-Gulf

Due to the modular design and the simple configuration, the iba system can be adapted comfortably to the various tasks and is scalable in size at any time.

Name: Grupo Vika Controls
Description:
A Vika Controls, empresa fundada no ano de 2000, nasce com a proposta de atuar no mercado de Instrumentação e controle de processos industriais através do fornecimento de equipamentos e soluções de alta qualidade e de avançada tecnologia, combinadas através de uma linha extensa de produtos e parceria com empresas mundialmente conceituadas.

Em 2009, com o surgimento da SPB Comércio, forma-se o Grupo Vika Controls, permitindo-se, desta forma, a criação de uma maior infraestrutura e expansão na área de atuação em nível nacional, que já vinha se solidificando nos últimos anos.

Mais uma conquista realizada no final de 2013, com a mudança para nossa nova sede situada no bairro de perdizes, zona oeste de São Paulo, em um espaço físico de aproximadamente 350m², faz nosso Grupo acreditar e confiar cada vez mais em um futuro promissor e sustentável.

MISSÃO
Desenvolver e comercializar soluções para o controle de processos industriais e analíticos, que atendam as expectativas dos Clientes na busca dos seus objetivos e maximização dos resultados.

VISÃO
Ser reconhecida como uma empresa comprometida com o desenvolvimento do mercado em nível nacional, com atuação eficiente e colaborativa entre Clientes, Parceiros e Funcionários.

VALORES:
• Pessoas
Tratar todos os colaboradores e suas ideias com respeito e dignidade, dando-lhes autonomia e reconhecendo a iniciativa e a realização.

• Clientes
A satisfação e realização de nossos clientes são a nossa razão de ser, primamos por um atendimento eficiente e eficaz, com informações corretas e precisas.

• Tradição
A Vika carrega uma história com mais de uma década de sucesso e qualidade reconhecida no mercado.

• Ética e Respeito
Essas são as premissas que norteiam o crescimento da Vika e seus relacionamentos com o mercado, permeados sempre por transparência, simplicidade e clareza.

Name: PENTHEA | Optimización de Recursos
Description:
Nuestro objetivo principal es ahorrarte tiempo, dinero y problemas haciendo que tu proceso productivo sea más eficiente.

Llevamos más de 30 años ofreciendo soluciones de optimización adaptadas a una gran variedad de sectores industriales.

Para ello, hacemos un análisis de tus procesos productivos y monitorizamos los resultados para descubrir las áreas de mejora y aumentar su rendimiento.

¿Cómo? Adaptamos, programamos e instalamos dispositivos de automatización en tus sistemas de producción para conseguir:
Incrementar la productividad.
Disminuir los costes energéticos.
Reducir la complejidad operativa.

Nuestros servicios ofrecen una gran variedad de soluciones, desde planes de ahorro energético o prevención de sobretensiones hasta automatización de sistemas complejos de producción o instalación de fuentes de energía renovables.

Queremos 𝗶𝗺𝗽𝘂𝗹𝘀𝗮𝗿 tu productividad en un camino conjunto. 𝗘𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝗲𝗺𝗼𝘀 𝗮 𝘁𝘂 𝗹𝗮𝗱𝗼 para realizar los ajustes necesarios y asegurar un ahorro energético duradero.

  ¿Quieres saber más? Escríbenos! Estamos deseando trabajar contigo.

Name: Kino Lab
Description:
Chez Kinolab, nous rendons visibles les défauts que les caméras classiques ne peuvent pas voir.

Chaque année, des défauts invisibles coûtent des millions aux industriels, compromettent la qualité, la sécurité et l’image des marques. Grâce à notre caméra hyperspectrale, développée avec GoyaLab, nous apportons une solution de rupture pour l’inspection qualité.

Notre technologie détecte ce que l’œil ne voit pas — microplastiques, contaminants, défauts structurels — dans des environnements aussi variés que l’agroalimentaire, l’automobile ou le traitement des eaux.

Fiable, précise, intégrable sur ligne, notre solution est née au cœur de l’innovation optique, portée par une équipe issue de l’Institut d’Optique et de l’Université Paris-Saclay.

Name: Testsens
Description: Testsens is a Bias Mühendislik company brand. Testsens team is working on development of acoustic related R&D tools since 2008. With intensive knowledge on acoustic measurement technology, Testsens team introduced sound transmission loss and sound absorption measurement system. Porosity measurement system and material characterization software are recent developments on acoustic field. Testsens team is continuously working on new developments and improvements on current products.

Name: Instrumentation Design Lab
Description:
Since the beginning of science, researchers have found their work limited by the inability to make a particular measurement or to control a device or process. These are the problems solved by instrumentation, and when that instrumentation is unavailable, a collaboration with the Instrumentation Design Laboratory (IDL) may lead to a solution.

The IDL works across the range of scientific disciplines to create solutions that lead to new or better observations.

- Photometric instruments to measure light sources for automotive, aircraft and general lighting industries : goniophotometer, colorimeter, luxmeter from LMT.
- Optical profilometer for high resolution, characterization of surface state down to the level of roughness of super smooth mirrors.

Name: Crystal Exports

Name: CERCO
Description: CERCO UV lenses, initially designed by Sodern back in the years 2000 are still the reference for UV imaging where faint or transient phenomena need to be imaged. The CERCO UV lenses have the highest aperture / transmission ratio of the market and are optimised for transmission in the UV band. The apochromatic design of the lenses makes them usable from the UV to NIR, which is a hard requirement for hyperspectral imaging. Main application covered by the CERCO UV lenses are combustion research, corona effect detection and hyperspectral imaging. CERCO has also the capability of custom lens design. Please do not hesitate to contact us for your specific projects.

Name: Sensables

Name: Ultrontek - 奧創系統科技
Description:
奧創系統科技 (Ultrontek) 是一家專業的訊號應用系統整合服務公司，以成為市場頂尖的訊號模擬與測試工程系統商為目標；公司總部位於台灣新北市，專為技術密集型產業提供從概念到實現的全週期客製化解決方案，協助客戶應對最嚴苛的測試挑戰。

核心業務與價值主張

奧創系統科技的核心業務是提供高附加價值的工程整合服務，服務涵蓋初期諮詢、可行性研究、平台評估、新舊技術整合，乃至最終的系統優化，公司立基於五大合作優勢：豐富的專案實績、整合新技術的卓越能力、協助客戶規避投資風險與節省時間的寶貴經驗、採用業界標準並客製非標方案的彈性，以及賦能客戶自主維護的完整技術轉移。

主要應用領域

奧創系統科技的專業技術服務橫跨多個尖端領域，展現其深厚的技術底蘊與市場洞察力：

* 航太國防應用： 提供無人載具、訓練模擬器、衛星干擾防禦等關鍵系統。
* 半導體量測設備： 涵蓋探針平台、高溫壽命測試 (HTOL) 等方案。
* 運動模擬平台： 包含高精度六軸平台與產業訓練模擬器。
* 射頻 (RF) 測試儀器： 從訊號產生、分析到完整測試系統建置。
* 光電影像模擬： 提供紅外線目標投影器、黑體校正源等專業設備。
* 車用製造與衛星測試： 針對新興的車用雷達與低軌衛星產業提供測試方案。
* 客製化系統： 包含電波/電磁暗房建置與自動化軟體開發。

奧創系統科技不僅是設備供應商，更是能與客戶共同成長、持續創造雙贏的工程夥伴，以卓越的解決方案，驅動產業的創新力量。

Name: BrewSpider
Description:
BrewSpider introduces an advanced solution for precise fermentation control, catering to both homebrewing enthusiasts and microbreweries. Distinguished by its innovation, BrewSpider is not only a temperature management system but also the industry's first to incorporate pressure regulation into its capabilities.

Emphasizing a holistic approach to brewing, BrewSpider's temperature control function allows for meticulous adjustment of fermentation conditions, ensuring consistent and reliable outcomes across multiple batches. What sets BrewSpider apart is its unique integration of pressure regulation, acknowledging the pivotal role that pressure plays in achieving desired carbonation levels. This groundbreaking feature offers a comprehensive solution for crafting a superior brewing environment.

Designed for convenience and adaptability, BrewSpider's user-friendly app empowers users to oversee and manage the fermentation process remotely. The seamless alignment with iSpindel and Brewfather further enhances the brewing experience by providing insightful data for informed decision-making.

BrewSpider represents a harmonious blend of traditional brewing practices and modern technological innovation. By providing the means to regulate temperature and pressure, it transforms the brewing process into a science-driven art, ensuring optimal conditions for yeast activity and flavor development. Join us on a journey that elevates fermentation control to new heights, setting a benchmark for excellence in the realm of brewing.

Name: BarionX
Description:
We deliver intelligent material detection products and services that ensure safety, optimize product quality, and enable critical material recovery across three operational modes.
Travelling Mode – Integrated inspection systems for industrial applications. We provide non-destructive testing for inline quality inspection of critical components including EV batteries, turbines, and defense system components such as air- and spacecraft fuel cells. Our demilitarization services enable safe inspection of ordnance (shells, explosives, and munitions) throughout production, reuse, and reclamation phases. We offer containerized, field-deployable systems designed for rapid deployment in operational environments including active conflict zones. In recycling and waste optimization, we offer metal grading, battery recovery, and extraction of critical rare earth metals from complex waste streams.
Navigating Mode – Sensor platforms deployed on uncrewed vehicles for wide-area scanning. Applications include demining operations with precise positional detection of landmines, structural screening to identify concrete degradation and reinforcement issues in infrastructure like bridges and tunnels, soil quality assessment for nutrient content and precision agriculture, and threat detection systems that identify explosives and hazards to ensure safe passage through contested areas.
Remote Sensing Mode – Long-range threat assessment capabilities. We provide remote inspection of objects and structures to detect weapons of mass destruction and explosive threats, enabling safe evaluation without direct proximity to potential hazards.

Global Sensing Solutions (GSS) are a Hong Kong-based company that design, build and implement sensor solutions. What it all comes down to is our customers want readings when they need them and in a usable format, which is reflected in our mission statement “data your want…when you want it.”
GSS gained valuable insight and support from universities, geotechnical engineers, civil engineers, geologists, manufacturers, arborists and government departments tasked to monitor structures and terrain.  In 2016, GSS launched the first and only wireless Tilt & Vibration sensor specifically designed for real-time structural health monitoring.  Our gateway solutions manage sensors and route their data and alerts to our customer's desired locations such as mobile phones, FTP Server, and GIS systems.
GSS have worked with many organizations across a variety of industries in various capacities. We continue to work with our customers to enhance our products, refine our product roadmap, and package beneficial services. We succeed by providing our partners and customers with a competitive advantage.

Name: Vysens
Description:
As a scientist you are seeking precision in antibody and cell characterization. Our technology  provides seamless integration for measuring affinity, avidity and concentration, essential for the development of more effective therapeutic and diagnostic solutions. 

It is our intention to set up a network for the development of applications with the CellVysion. We invite you to send us feedback.

We developed a completely new fluidics/SPR platform that is easy to operate, with antibodies, cells, vesicles, viruses and bacteria. 

One of the main characteristics is the formation of ligand gradients on the sensor surface. The gradient ensures a measurement that is always right, the right conditions for avidity measuring as well as the right conditions for concentration measuring.

Our platform can be used for characterisation of cells and antibodies (CellVysion), for testing the characteristics (affinity, efficacy, concentration) of monoclonal antibodies for biochemical applications (AutoVysion), spatial biology, Point-of-Care applications, therapeutics, diagnostics and research.

Name: Inkatech Measurement Systems Ltd.
Description:
İnkatechmarket olarak, ölçüm teknolojileri ve endüstriyel test cihazları alanında güvenilir, hassas ve yenilikçi çözümler sunan bir teknoloji markasıyız. Ürün portföyümüz; dijital termometrelerden multimetrelere, hava istasyonlarından mikrometrelere, kablo test cihazlarından datalogger sistemlerine kadar geniş bir skalaya sahiptir. Amacımız, hem bireysel kullanıcıların hem de profesyonel işletmelerin ihtiyaç duyduğu tüm ölçüm süreçlerinde yüksek doğruluk, dayanıklılık ve kesintisiz performans sağlamaktır.

HVAC, elektronik, gıda üretimi, otomotiv, sağlık, laboratuvar, sanayi, enerji ve tarım gibi çok sayıda sektöre yönelik cihazlar sunuyoruz. Her bir ürün grubumuz, süreç güvenliğini artırmak, arıza tespitini hızlandırmak ve operasyonel verimliliği yükseltmek için özel olarak seçilmektedir. Özellikle endüstriyel ortamlarda doğru ölçümün kritik önem taşıdığını biliyoruz ve bu nedenle yalnızca uluslararası standartlara uygun, test edilmiş ve kalitesi kanıtlanmış ürünler sunuyoruz.

İnkatechmarket’i farklı kılan en önemli noktalardan biri, sadece ürün satışı değil, kullanıcıya doğru cihazı seçme aşamasından itibaren rehberlik eden bir çözüm ortağı olmamızdır. Gereksinim analizi, ürün karşılaştırması, teknik bilgilendirme ve satış sonrası destek gibi süreçleri titizlikle yürütüyor; her aşamada müşterilerimizin yanında oluyoruz. Teknolojiyi yakından takip eden yaklaşımımızla ürün gamımızı sürekli geliştirmeye, yeni nesil ölçüm cihazlarını müşterilerimizle buluşturmaya devam ediyoruz.

Doğru ölçümün; kalite yönetimi, iş güvenliği, enerji verimliliği ve sistem doğrulaması açısından ne kadar kritik olduğunu biliyor, bu bilinçle çözümlerimizi her geçen gün daha ileri taşıyoruz. İnkatechmarket olarak, hassas ölçümün güven veren adresi olmaya devam ediyoruz.
#inkatechmarket #ölçümcihazları #endüstriyelteknoloji #mühendislik #multimetre #termometre #mikrometre #datalogger #havaistasyonu #teknoloji #sanayi #hvac #elektronik #enerjiverimliliği

Name: RITEC AUTOMATION LIMITED
Description:
Ritec Automation is a UKAS-accredited calibration laboratory, proudly serving clients across the UK from our base in the Midlands. Established in 1988, we have over three decades of experience delivering reliable, high-quality calibration services tailored to the needs of our customers.

We provide both on-site and in-laboratory calibration services, ensuring flexibility and convenience for a wide range of industries, including aerospace, automotive, and food production.

Our expert team offers services such as:
	•	On-site calibration
	•	Breakdown support
	•	Calibration program management

We specialize in UKAS-accredited electrical and temperature calibration using advanced electrical simulation methods. Our capabilities also include the calibration of:
	•	Data controllers and loggers
	•	Pressure and vacuum equipment
	•	Torque tools
	•	Weighing systems
	•	And more

With a strong reputation for precision, reliability, and customer service, Ritec Automation remains a trusted partner for businesses requiring accurate and accredited calibration solutions.

Les enregistreurs d’Evidencia, nos solutions Bluetooth ou USB, nos puces fraîcheurs, sont de véritables informateurs miniatures, suivant vos produits délicats tout au long de leur vie et de leur transit. Tout en maintenant des données précises sur les conditions externes affectant la valeur de vos produits, nos enregistreurs fournissent aussi les informations essentielles pour les exigences de qualité, sanitaires, et de contrôle.

Nous offrons des solutions à des coûts réduits pour une vaste gamme d’industries et d’applications. Notre équipe de vente est à votre disposition pour vous aider à choisir le bon enregistreur répondant à vos besoins spécifiques de traçabilité.

Diese Wahl kann nur von Personal getroffen werden, das über technisches Wissen und Ausrüstung verfügt.

Name: Cosmodity
Description:
Cosmodity is an innovative deep-tech startup bringing technology from nuclear-physics research to the Structural Health Monitoring market for a safer and more resilient society.

Our muLINER solution uses highly-penetrating Cosmic Rays for real-time monitoring of deformations in large structures with a unique combination of precision, long-term accuracy and zero maintenance. With just a few devices it can detect mm-level displacements over tens of metres with multiple floors of concrete or rock in between, even without a structural digital twin.

Name: Reefmaster
Description:
Reefmaster's mission is to protect and preserve reef organisms' gene pool. By developing an AI-based tool for aquariums, the first step is to enable even inexperienced aquarists to operate reef aquariums due to our tool. Therefore, missing knowledge can be compensated for and what already exists can be preserved. In addition, Reefmaster collects data with each system that can be used for habitat research.
This approach is a new kind of citizen science, as the level of automation can eliminate inaccuracy and the great susceptibility to errors of non-scientific personnel, which allows the broad mass of data to gain validity. The unique combination of automated water analysis, supplementation of natural food, adaptation of various technical devices and visual monitoring of general vitality in reef aquacultures helps people around the world to better understand and improve their operations. The stable, near-natural, chemical-physical water parameters significantly reduce mortality events and decrease the need for wild-caught animals, directly benefiting conservation of endangered species. Additionally, it enables the permanent cultivation of animals that were previously difficult or impossible to handle (e.g. filter-feeders, such as azooxanthellate corals), protecting their survival.

Description:

With a team of some of the world’s best engineers, a creative work environment and an uncompromising vision to always deliver the best we can to our customers, we  provide the sector with new solutions that keep up with the technological development, giving our customers the stability and competitiveness needed on the market.

We are currently actively involved with the task of bringing the aquaculture industry to the next level of development – the industry 4.0 (digitalization). If the aquaculture industry is to expand, it can only do so in the context of competitiveness on the global food market where agriculture today holds the biggest market share. OxyGuard take the lead and apply the technology and expertise needed for our customers to gain ground on the food production market of tomorrow. 

At our facilities in Denmark, we have gathered all parts of the production under one roof.  The individual steps from idea to finished product happen at the same place. We try to make a creative working environment with a minimum of hierarchy and a large degree of collaboration. Having everything under one roof creates a special set of working conditions that act in a synergistic way. The cross-disciplinary collaboration between our departments allows us to think creatively and to invent and produce equipment that has been well thought through from the smallest technical detail to the implications the equipment will have for the individual fish farmer, who will eventually use the instrument. Our scientific, communication and sales teams feed the engineers and developers with information about the market, trends in the industry as well as the customers’ specific needs.

We provide a large degree of freedom to all employees and encourage them to take on the responsibility that suits them in their current personal life situation.

We have more than 90 employees spread all over the world.

KGaA has a presence on all continents, with 37 subsidiaries and more than 80 trade partners. An average annual growth of over 10% since the foundation of the company in 1957 and a current turnover of 400 million euros clearly. Roughly 3,500 Testorians worldwide research, develop, produce and market for the company with passion and expertise. 

The above-average investments in the future of the company are part of the recipe for success. Testo invests about a tenth of its annual global turnover in Research & Development. Name: EASY Photonics GmbH
Description:
Labor vor Ort. Daten in Minuten.
EASY Photonics bringt die Wasseranalytik dorthin, wo Entscheidungen fallen. Unser multisensorisches Messsystem erfasst Mikroschadstoffe in Echtzeit – mobil und stationär. Einstellungsfrei, ohne bewegliche Teile und Probenpräperation. Die Auswertung übernimmt ein SaaS-Dienst, der Ergebnisse automatisch dokumentiert und für Prozess & Reporting bereitstellt.

Warum das jetzt zählt
PFAS, Mikroplastik und Medikamentenrückstände im Wasser steigen – gleichzeitig verschärft die EU-Abwasserrichtlinie (KARL) die Anforderungen. Statt teurer, langsamer Stichproben liefert EASY Photonics kontinuierliche Datenströme: Reaktionen < 1 Stunde bei Regen- und Lastereignissen, bessere Steuerung statt Überbehandlung.

Für wen
Kommunale & industrielle Kläranlagen, Behörden/Wasserverbände, Industrie mit eigenem Abwassermanagement (z. B. Chemie, Pharma, Lebensmittel) sowie Forschungsteams.

Ihr Nutzen
• Prozessführung in Echtzeit (Dosierung, Medienwechsel, Ereigniserkennung)
• Kosten runter: kontinuierliche Messungen statt €€€ für Labore
• Compliance & Nachweis: automatische, lückenlose Dokumentation
• Zukunftssicher: unspezifische Analyse – neue Parameter via Software abbildbar

Let’s talk
Pilot, OEM-Integration oder Forschungspartnerschaft? Schreib uns – wir bringen das Labor an den Ort des Geschehens.

Name: CCI vk GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
KONTAMINATION VERMEIDEN, ÜBERWACHEN UND REDUZIEREN
Mit einem breiten Portfolio an Geräten und Dienstleistungen für die Reinraumtechnik sowie Reinraumbekleidung und Verbrauchsgütern ist CCI vK GmbH & Co. KG Partner nationaler und internationaler Unternehmen aus der Pharma- und Halbleiterindustrie, Mikroelektronik, Medizintechnik sowie auch von Reinraumwäschereien, Krankenhäusern und weiteren reinraumkritischen Branchen.
Unsere Stärke: Entwicklung und Fertigung von Systemen zur Strömungs- und Partikelvisualisierung – in der Luft wie auf Oberflächen.
Funktionale Sonderlösungen maßgeschneiderter Geräte, wie Prüf- und Messsysteme für Reinraumbekleidung, Prüfstände für Lüftungs- und Strömungstechnik oder komplexe Systeme zur Aerosol- und Hydrosolmessung.
Neben eigenen Entwicklungen vertreiben wir ausgewählte Produkte namhafter Hersteller.

Planung, Realisierung und Qualifizierung – alles aus einer Hand
In Zusammenarbeit mit Partnerfirmen realisiert CCI komplette Lösungen: Reinstlagerschränke, Reinraumarbeitsplätze, Kabinen, Minienvironments, Maschineneinhausungen, wie auch Projekte im Bereich Verdunkelung und für die Inspektion von Bauteilen.

Wir übernehmen die Qualifizierung raumlufttechnischer Anlagen in Reinräumen – normkonform und branchenübergreifend. Dazu zählen DQ, IQ, OQ und PQ – vom Konzept bis zur Übergabe.
Strömungen müssen sichtbar sein. CCI führt professionelle Visualisierungsstudien durch – mit Nebel, Kamera und technischem Know-how. Wir machen Luftbewegungen nachvollziehbar, dokumentieren Schwachstellen und sichern Prozesse für alle Branchen vor Ort.
 
Verbrauchsmaterialien
Mehr als nur Standard: silikon- und fingerabdruckfreie Einmalhandschuhe, hochwertige Dünnfilmhandschuhe, Spezialtücher sowie weitere spezielle Verbrauchsprodukte für den Reinraum.
Reinraumbekleidung
Gemeinsam mit dem Hersteller alsico bieten wir branchenspezifische Reinraumbekleidung – auch als OEM-Lösung für individuelle Anforderungen – in höchster Qualität und mit kurzen Lieferzeiten.

Name: TECPRIME
Description:
TECPRIME is a new brand with a clear mission: to understand, protect, and improve the marine environment through world-leading measurement and analysis of particles, suspensions, and fluid dynamics.

Launched by Aquatec Group Limited, a company with over three decades of innovation in ocean technology, TECPRIME combines proven expertise with fresh thinking to deliver advanced solutions for marine and freshwater projects worldwide.

Our unique Observe · Collect · Analyse approach sets us apart:

• Observe: Precision instruments for monitoring turbidity, sediment concentration, particle size, and suspended load.
• Collect: Integration with specialist third-party systems to capture physical samples from the environment.
• Analyse: Proprietary software to interpret particle and sediment characteristics with unmatched accuracy.

We collaborate with research institutions, survey companies, and industry partners across rivers, coasts, and oceans, providing insights that inform better decisions, promote sustainable practices, and foster environmental stewardship.

Name: Thomsen Messtechnik GmbH
Description:
Die Thomsen Messtechnik GmbH mit Sitz in Greifenstein-Arborn ist seit über 40 Jahren Ihr verlässlicher Partner für präzise und leistungsfähige Messtechnik. Unter dem Leitmotiv „Einfach immer ein Stück besser …“ bedienen wir vier Schlüsselbereiche: Flow (Durchfluss), Pressure (Druck), Gas (Gasanalyse/Sauerstoffmessung) und Moisture (Feuchtemesstechnik). ￼

Wir bieten ein breites Spektrum an Mess- und Analysesystemen: Von Ultraschall-Clamp-On-Geräten zur berührungslosen Durchflussmessung von Gasen und Dampf über hochpräzise Druck- und Kalibriersysteme bis hin zu anspruchsvoller Gasanalytik (z. B. Sauerstoff, binäre Gasgemische) und robusten Feuchte-Transmitterlösungen für industrielle Umgebungen. ￼

Ob in der Prozessindustrie, im Anlagenbau oder in Forschungs- und Spezialanwendungen – unsere Lösungen ermöglichen zuverlässige Messungen in herausfordernden Umgebungen. Dazu zählt z. B. die Überwachung von Gas- und Flüssigströmen, die Kontrolle von Sauerstoff- und Feuchtegehalten sowie die Kalibrierung und Validierung von Messsystemen – sowohl im Labor als auch direkt vor Ort. ￼

Neben qualitativ hochwertigen Produkten legen wir großen Wert auf Service und maßgeschneiderte Betreuung: Unsere erfahrenen Service-Ingenieure sind bei Bedarf vor Ort, führen Referenzmessungen durch und unterstützen bei Installation, Inbetriebnahme oder Validierung – ganz nach Ihrem Bedarf. ￼

Mit über vier Jahrzehnten Erfahrung und einem klaren Fokus auf Qualität, Innovation und kundenspezifische Lösungen stehen wir für technische Exzellenz und langfristige Partnerschaft. Entscheiden Sie sich für Thomsen Messtechnik – und profitieren Sie von smarter Messtechnik, kompetentem Service und spürbarem Mehrwert.
