Un étalonnage peut être réalisé à plusieurs points de l’étendue de mesure de l’équipement à étalonner. On obtient ainsi une courbe d’étalonnage. 

Deschamps Métrologie vous annonce l'ouverture de son Laboratoire de mesures dimensionnelles. Son service d'étalonnage qui est en destination des techniciens, responsables qualité et opérateurs machines:
- Étalonnage de l'ensemble des comparateurs (à leviers, à mécanique à cadrans, à affichage numérique)

Vos instruments de mesures nécessitent pour l'excellence de votre travail d'être justes et précis, faites appel à nos services professionnels pour garantir la fiabilité de vos instruments.
Notre savoir faire historique  dans le contrôle  de nos machines nous a amené à l'ouverture d'un laboratoire.

Name: SpektraVision
Description:
Kdo jsme:
SpektraVision s.r.o. je obchodní a servisní společnost zaměřující se na prodej měřící a diagnostické techniky. Vznikla na základě mnohaleté úspěšné spolupráce s renomovanými výrobci a staví na dlouholetých zkušenostech z nasazení nabízené techniky v mnoha oblastech průmyslu, výzkumu a v neposlední řadě také záchranných a bezpečnostních složek po celém světě.

Naše cíle:
Cílem společnosti SpektraVision je nabízet nejen kvalitní a profesionální techniku, ale také služby s ní spojené. Samozřejmostí je poradenství před vlastním výběrem přístroje s ohledem na požadované parametry a typ aplikace, spolupráce na řešení a v neposlední řadě zaškolení. Ke každému zákazníkovi máme profesionální a individuální přístup, abychom zajistili maximální požadovaný efekt z pořízené investice a spokojenost zákazníka. Name: Datum Tools Ltd (Flipstop)
Description:
Flipstop is a unique measuring stop system which can be used on most types of machine tools to provide accurate, repeatable machining operations easily and quickly.

It is cost-effective to install, simple to use and saves the time and effort of measuring, marking and clamping blocks of wood to a machine fence.
Flipstop consists of a metal track with measuring scale which is fitted to a fence. Pivoting stops are moved along the track to the required position. When not in use, the stop is simply flipped up and out of the way.
A number of stops can be fitted onto the track, which makes it possible to keep multiple settings on a single unit and simply to ‘flip’ between settings with no further adjustments. In this way, Flipstop can reduce set up time by as much as 80% and often reduce handling by 50%. This time saving can result in substantial cost reductions. Whether machining one piece to size or working through a lengthy cutting list, Flipstop will speed production by removing the measuring and marking process.

With decades of industry experience, CTE provides a comprehensive portfolio of cement testing solutions, including ultrasonic cement analyzers, consistometers, curing chambers, fluid loss testers, gas migration systems, mixers, and accessory equipment. Every instrument is built with a focus on reliability, compliance, and long-term serviceability.

Based in Tulsa, Oklahoma, CTE supports customers worldwide with responsive technical support, calibration services, spare parts, and customized solutions. Our team understands the operational and regulatory demands of cement testing and works closely with customers to ensure confidence in every test and decision.

CTE is committed to precision, innovation, and global support; delivering cement testing solutions you can trust.

Currently, Iran Madar in Shiraz factory has the largest calibration rig of all types of meters and flowmeters in the West Asia and the Middle East. This advanced and modern laboratory with the ISO 17025 standard from the National Accreditation Center of Iran (NACI), is practically the largest calibration line for meters and flowmeters in the countryrig

We are committed to maintaining high standards of quality and reliability and manufacture to UKAS ISO 9001: 2015 systems to ensure our products meet rigorous performance criteria.

These products are instrumental in the detection and identification of unknown powders, particulates, and aerosols, addressing real-world challenges in air quality and pollution control.

Our commitment extends beyond mere product creation. We actively engage in multidisciplinary research, ensuring that our solutions are grounded in scientific rigor and practical utility. This research-driven approach has led to breakthroughs in particulate sampling, combustion pollution control, and air quality monitoring.

SpecTree's services encompass a broad spectrum, from air quality evaluation to occupational health surveillance. We recognize the critical importance of identifying airborne hazards and contaminants, and our technologies are tailored to provide accurate, actionable insights. By merging engineering expertise with scientific research, we aim to deliver products and services that stand up to scrutiny and truly make a difference in the field.

Name: Synlock
Description:
Our mission is simple yet ambitious: to make high-performance laboratory automation accessible to every chemist — regardless of their experience with robotics or software.
Research and development in chemistry, drug discovery, process optimization, and biotechnology are often limited by manual workflows and complex instruments. We believe automation should empower scientists, not slow them down.
That’s why we created Cheminizer — a fully autonomous and self-cleaning system designed to perform a wide range of chemical reactions with unmatched reliability, precision, and simplicity.
With Cheminizer, chemical recipes can be designed within minutes and executed with complete control over every reaction parameter. Its integrated thin-film technology and intelligent self-cleaning process remove many of the limitations of existing automated devices.
At Synlock, we’re building the next generation of automated systems — versatile, intuitive, and truly autonomous — to accelerate discovery and innovation across the chemical and biosciences industries.

The KES technology correlates with sensory evaluation by seasoned experts and converts measured data into objective numerical values. This remarkable technology has gained global recognition.

Name: SPU OPTICS INC
Description:
SpectroChip is a breakthrough technology that integrates all the functions of a spectrometer on a chip. It is designed and fabricated using X-ray lithography and MOEMS (micro-Opto-electro-mechanical systems) technology. The size of chip is about half the size of a SD card, which includes slit, micro concave grating and mirror. Our current modular spectrometer using this technology has a spectral range from 300 to 1000 nm. SpectroChip technology has the advantage of high performance with high sensitivity and accuracy while reaching chip-size miniaturization. This technology is being applied to the development of ultra-compact optical sensors and/or devices that can deliver real-time spectral big data and analysis results. Examples include novel optical sensor modules and ultra-compact, high-performance spectrophotometers capable of UV/VIS and fluorescence analysis for research lab and educational purposes. 

Our team consists of seasoned professionals with decades of academic and industrial experience in various fields including applied physics, photonics, semiconductor technologies, pharmaceutical and public health sectors. Besides this expertise, our team has the commitment to the company’s vision and mission, open communications, collaborative spirit, and effective execution. 

For a long time, the applied physics and OPI industry has dreamed of a chip-based spectrometer. While some companies and researchers have published prototypes and concepts, there are still significant gaps between these ideas and mass production and industrial adaptation. SpectroChip technology represents a fundamental breakthrough that provides a complete solution from concept to mass production. Our chip-based technology can enhance the performance of portable devices currently available on the market and enable new applications in the future. Additionally, our SpectroChip arrays and sensor hubs will open new horizons of possibilities.

Name: Nanotip
Description:
Introducing Nanotip – Revolutionizing Thermal Nanoscale Characterization! 

At Nanotip, we are pushing the boundaries of Scanning Thermal Microscopy (SThM) to deliver unmatched precision in nanoscale thermal analysis. 
With the increasing complexity of semiconductor devices and advanced materials, understanding temperature distribution at the nanoscale is now more critical than ever.

 What We Do
Nanotip develops characterization solutions for thermal studies.  
Our core technology : high-performance SThM probes and cutting-edge electronic modules designed to integrate seamlessly with Atomic Force Microscopes (AFM). 

Our solutions provide:
 Sub-10 nm thermal resolution for ultra-precise characterization
 Innovative patented NbN-based thermometer probes for enhanced sensitivity
 Automated calibration & data interpretation tools to simplify analysis

 Why It Matters
Traditional methods fail to capture thermal properties at the required scale, limiting insights into semiconductor hot spots, phase transitions, and energy dissipation. 

Our technology enables:
 Better failure analysis for semiconductor R&D
 Optimized thermal management in microelectronics
 Enhanced metrology for next-gen materials & devices

 Join the Nanoscale Revolution
We are looking for partners, AFM manufacturers, and semiconductor leaders to collaborate on cutting-edge projects. 
Whether you're in academic research, industrial R&D, or advanced metrology, Nanotip is ready to elevate your thermal characterization capabilities.

 Let’s talk!    sthm.nanotip@gmail.com

#Nanotip #SThM #AFM #ThermalMetrology #Semiconductors #Nanocharacterization #ScanningThermalMicroscopy

Name: ATX-DYNO LTD.
Description:
ATX-DYNO LTD is a Czech engineering and manufacturing company specializing in the development and production of high-precision dynamometers and testing technologies. Since 2015, we have delivered innovative solutions for measuring and evaluating the performance of agricultural machinery, passenger vehicles, LCVs, motorcycles, and industrial equipment. Our expertise lies in designing tailor-made systems that ensure operational reliability, performance optimization, and long-term durability of mechanical systems.

We began with the development of AGRO dynamometers to meet the growing demand for reliable testing of tractors, mowers, and harvesters. Our first prototype was launched in 2015, and its success quickly led to further deployments across Central and Eastern Europe. As our capabilities expanded, we introduced advanced models such as the T1 Incar field-testing unit for the U.S. market, the CARdyno 4WD chassis dynamometer, and the world’s first DynoLAB for CASE IH Quadtrac crawler tractors.

Driven by precision engineering and a commitment to continuous innovation, we launched the R-Series DYNO project and expanded our portfolio with the W-Series for the automotive sector. All development and production take place in our own modern facilities in Jihlava, Czech Republic, including our new site in the Hruškové dvory industrial zone.

At ATX-DYNO, we are equally committed to sustainability. We aim to achieve carbon-neutral production by 2035, having already reduced our CO₂ emissions by 50% through the use of renewable energy and local material sourcing.

Our dedication to quality, technical excellence, and environmental responsibility makes us a trusted partner for clients across Europe and North America. Whether it’s agricultural diagnostics, automotive testing, or custom industrial measurement, we deliver precision, reliability, and innovation in every project.

Name: Safdy Systems
Description:
Solid-state design airflow sensor, which measures airflow using the VORTEX method. The vortex airflow method is a proven way to measure the airflow very accurately. The equipment has no mechanical pieces (no moving parts) which prolonged the lifespan up to 10 years. 

The airflow speed up to 40m/s (144km/h), has a linear output proportional to airspeed, highly accurate reading, due to insensitivity to small particles, dust or water droplets in the airstream. 

Frits Ypenburg studied BSc. Electrical Engineering in Amsterdam,  Holland.
They made several useful improvements during this time to this complicated but highly stable method of flow-sensing and the result is the efficient and reliable SAFDY airflow meter.

Name: Anemos Technology
Description:
Multi-axis Absolute Position Sensors (MAPS)

MAPS simultaneously measures one to a full six position dimensions, 6DoF, at one point in space with phenomenal accuracy using a single, tiny sensor-head. Drastically reducing Abbe and other errors, MAPS will revolutionise mechatronics. The patented system includes a patterned scale (a metrological reference or map) which is key to its sensitivity and practically unlimited resolution down to picometre, nanoradians levels. All this without cumbersome lasers. System combinations are available at value points covering diverse applications including metrology, machine tools, microscopy, nanotech, robotics, and more. This extraordinary new technology is performance proven and traceable to world-renowned metrology labs.
Features
- Measure all 6 axes simultaneously
- Unrivalled subatomic resolution
- Unparalleled scalable accuracy
- Amazingly compact and easy to use
- Laser-less – unaffected by air conditions
- Totally different first dimension to 6DoF

Applications
- Deep error analysis, qualification, and calibration
- Cosine, Abbe, scaling, play, runout, out-of-plane…
- CNC/CMM: sophisticated all-axis accuracy testing
- Microscope stages: QA and mapping, super-resolution
- Nanotech nonlinear off-axis measurement/mitigation
- Semiconductor: pico-scale resolution and repeatability

Name: Gleason Gauge LLC
Description: The Gleason Gauge indicates the temperature - shown in a green zone - within +/- 50 degrees of saturated temp for that pressure.  There is little, if any, system knowledge required.  (If it's not reading in the green zone, attention is required.)  The green zone allows for system pressure fluctuations, changing ambient conditions, etc.  Gleason Gauges are very effective if used by themselves and exceptionally effective when bunched with others (such as on a condensate-return tree) as this allows comparison.

Description:

历时十多年自主研发、技术创新,在张力控制测量领域取得了重大突破,其个别技术已领先于世界同行水平, 公司业已成长为国家高新技术企业, 同时被列为江苏省张力控制测量系统工程技术研究中心。
目前拥有员工百余名，其中本科以上专业技术工程师近二十名，公司凭借雄厚的技术力量，专业的加工设备，在超硬合金、宝石晶体、精密陶瓷深度加工制造上积累了丰富的经验，工艺技术日臻完善，尤其是过线部位的精密研磨工艺超过了国际同行水平。线嘴年产规模达到六十万支。
在张力控制测量系统方面研发投产了机械、磁力、电子、伺服四大门类数十个系列的张力器，在张力设定、实时测量、反馈控制、闭合管理上取得了长足发 经过多年的发展。张力器年产规模超过五万台。
公司质量管理体系由英国国家质量保证有限公司(NQA)核审认证通过，获得UKAS认可标志。成为业内首家也是目前国内唯一一家通过ISO9001认证的企业。各类产品以及包装材料中对环境有影响的化学物质的使用及成分含量完全达到欧盟RoHS规定要求和顾客绿色采购标准要求。

Microspin Technologies sp. z o.o. offers measurement solutions for prototype micro- and nano-devices in a wide range of magnetic fields and frequencies. The company was established in 2025 on the initiative of members of the Spin Electronics team at the AGH University in Krakow. The developed technologies enable automation of the measurement process necessary for the extraction of key magnetic (magnetization, anisotropy energy, magnetic damping) and electrical parameters (magnetoresistance, spin Hall effect) of new material systems. 
Thanks to the many years of experience of its creators, the company provides complete and proven solutions containing the necessary mechanical systems, measurement equipment and software dedicated to modern electronic devices. Examples of products offered R&D departments include systems for measuring the ferromagnetic resonance of thin-film systems, adapters for magnetotransport measurements in magnetooptic systems or complete measurement stations enabling the characterization of prototypes in a magnetic field in a wide frequency band.

Name: Wisono Technology Co., Ltd.
Description:

Name: Hydromess s.r.o.
Description:
Indukční průtokoměry:
Vyrábíme a dodáváme průtokoměry AcquaMAG - průmyslové víceúčelové elektronické vodoměry - založené na principu Faradayova zákona o elektromagnetické indukci.

Indukční průtokoměr AcquaMAG F401 je certifikován v souladu s evropskou směrnicí 2014/32/EU (MID) a lze jej používat jako fakturační měřidlo.

Indukční průtokoměr AcquaMAG F4022 je vhodný pro nefakturační měření a řízení technologií ve vodárenských i ostatních průmyslových aplikacích.

Indukční průtokoměry, které nabízíme v našem e-shopu, máme skladem ve formě polotovarů. Kompletaci na kompaktní nebo oddělenou verzi provádíme na základě objednávky zákazníka. Velký objem skladových dílů nám umožňuje krátké dodací lhůty v termínech 1 – 2 týdny.

Vodoměry
Námi nabízené portfolio mechanických vodoměrů obsahuje domovní, průmyslové a závlahové vodoměry, klasické i s impulzním vysílačem, určené jak pro měření spotřeby vody, tak i pro řízení technologií.

Nabídku průběžně rozšiřujeme. Aktuálně nabízíme i vodoměry pro speciální aplikace, jako je například měření demineralizované vody DHM 1400 a DHW 1400.

Běžné typy a dimenze závitových i přírubových vodoměrů od DN 15 do DN 100 držíme v dostatečném objemu skladem. Standardní objednávky co do množství a provedení jsme tak schopni vyřídit do 24 hodin.

Name: Ramcare Ltd
Description:
Ramcare Ltd has been providing UKAS-aligned calibration and process control services since 1995. What began as a one-person operation has grown into a trusted provider of expertise in temperature, humidity, and process instrumentation.

Our engineers are highly trained and experienced, with deep knowledge of controllers, recorders, and power switches, built on our long-standing history with industry leaders such as Eurotherm, Hanwell, and Unitemp. Ramcare is an approved partner for these brands and also supplies equipment from Rotronic AG.

We offer a full range of calibration services, both in-house and on-site, adhering to rigorous ISO 17025 standards. Where our scope does not cover specific parameters, we collaborate with other UKAS-accredited labs to ensure a complete, compliant service for our clients.

Our integrated management system and internal procedures exceed the requirements of our accreditations and are regularly assessed by UKAS, BSI, and our customers. Every engineer undergoes stringent internal and external audits, ensuring high-quality, reliable, and audit-ready work.

We are always keen to develop new partnerships and support QA, Validation, and Engineering teams in achieving accurate measurements, reliable process control, and compliance with regulatory standards.

Name: EVEL
Description:
Hablar de Evel es hablar de familia, esfuerzo compartido y orgullo celeste y blanco.
Nuestra historia comenzó hace más de 70 años, cuando don Oscar Alfredo Esquivel y doña Velia Donati llegaron desde Casilda, Santa Fe, con un sueño y muchas ganas de trabajar.
En 1952, Oscar dio sus primeros pasos en la fabricación de cintas métricas, y en 1955 nacía la marca EVEL, con productos hechos artesanalmente y con pasión familiar.
Sus hijos, René y Omar, crecieron entre herramientas, aprendiendo desde muy jóvenes el valor del trabajo y la innovación.
A los 16 años, Omar diseñó y puso en marcha la primera impresora rotativa, marcando el inicio de una historia de evolución constante.
Hoy, EVEL es una empresa argentina automatizada y en expansión, que produce cintas métricas, metros plegables, niveles y otros instrumentos de medición con calidad garantizada.
Llevamos nuestros productos a todo el país y competimos con los mejores estándares internacionales, manteniendo intacto aquello que nos distingue desde el primer día: la calidad, la innovación y el compromiso con el trabajo argentino.

Name: BioMultiSystem LLC
Description:
Компания BioMS нацелена на разработку инженерных решений для нужд медицины, а именно приборов и оборудования для медицинской лабораторной и внелабораторной диагностики (point of care diagnosis).
В частности, в данный момент Компания разрабатывает новую, для рынка генетической и молекулярной диагностики, технологию – Портативный автоматический анализатор нуклеиновых кислот. Данное инновационное решение будет являться новым направлением в области портативных приборов для лабораторной диагностики – Мини-лабораторией, сопоставимой по функционалу с обычной диагностической лабораторией с точки зрения возможностей проведения генетических тестов и иммуноферментных исследований, работающей на базе единого Анализатора с использованием различных / под исследовательские задачи тест-систем в виде одноразовых картриджей с заранее внесенными при производстве реактивами.
Преимущества разрабатываемой технологии, по сравнению с обще принятой лабораторно-диагностикой современной практикой:
1. Полная автоматизация процесса от внесения биоматериала до получения результата.
2. Не требуется обеспечения стерильных и / или лабораторных условий – возможность проведения исследования непосредственно «у постели больного» (point of care diagnosis).
3. Быстрое проведение исследований до 30 минут (включая и автоматическую пробоподготову образца).
4. Портативность (малые масса-габаритные размеры) и возможность автономной работы от аккумулятора.
5. Не требует специальной подготовки пользователя – нет необходимости участия высококвалифицированного врача-лаборанта.
6. Мини-лаборатория, сопоставимая по функционалу с обычной диагностической лабораторией.

Компания BioMS открыта для Инвесторов и потенциальных Партнеров, заинтересованных в ее деятельности и дальнейшем развитии!

Name: PeakTech Prüf- und Messtechnik GmbH
Description:
PeakTech Prüf- und Messtechnik GmbH ist seit über 60 Jahren internationaler Partner für Distributoren, Industrie und Handwerk im Bereich der Prüf- und Messtechnik.

Mit einer breiten Palette von über 400 Produkten für Elektro- und Umweltmesstechnik, sowie Stromversorgung und Generatoren, bieten wir hochwertige, präzise und zuverlässige Lösungen für jeden Anwender.

Um sicherzustellen, dass unsere Geräte weltweit verfügbar sind, arbeiten wir eng mit internationalen Vertriebspartnern zusammen. Dabei stellen diese eine entscheidende Rolle als Schnittstelle zwischen PeakTech und den Anwendern dar.

Die Messgeräte von PeakTech werden weltweit in sämtlichen Anwendungsbereichen der Messtechnik, sowie als Lehrmittel in Bildungseinrichtungen oder als Ausrüstung in Laboren und in der Qualitätssicherung eingesetzt.

Bei PeakTech stehen Qualität, Kundenzufriedenheit und ein faires Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis an erster Stelle. Unser Ziel ist es, dass unsere Kunden den maximalen Erfolg mit unseren Produkten erreichen. Zusätzlich sind unseren engagierten Mitarbeiter stets bereit, Anwender zu beraten und zu unterstützen. 

Entdecken Sie die Spitzenleistung von PeakTech Prüf- und Messtechnik GmbH und erleben Sie die Qualität und Zuverlässigkeit unserer Mitarbeiter und Produkte. Vertrauen Sie unserer langjährigen Erfahrung, umfassenden Expertise und unseren starken Partnerschaften im Bereich der Prüf- und Messtechnik.

Name: Thermal Developments International Ltd
Description:
About Us
Thermal Developments International Ltd (TDI) is a UK-based manufacturer of hand-made platinum resistance temperature detectors (RTDs), trusted by metrology labs, OEMs, and industry leaders worldwide. With over 40 years of expertise, we specialise in producing high-precision temperature sensors designed to meet the most demanding applications.

Our detectors are built to exceed IEC 60751 tolerances, offering exceptional accuracy, stability, and reliability. Whether used in calibration, aerospace, energy, manufacturing, research, or medical applications, TDI elements are engineered for performance where precision matters most.

From one sensor to thousands, we support everything from small-batch prototyping to global production. Backed by a global network of distributors, we offer local expertise and responsive delivery worldwide.

Name: EcoMeter
Description:
About EcoMeter

Innovation from the Field, Not the Boardroom

EcoMeter is the professional tool line from Wesley Scott Innovations, LLC, an Illinois-based company founded by a working HVAC technician. Our goal is simple — to make complex HVAC diagnostics, economizer testing, and ventilation verification faster, more accurate, and more intuitive.

Every EcoMeter instrument is developed through real job-site experience and designed with the technician’s perspective in mind. From rugged construction to intuitive digital interfaces, every detail serves one purpose — to make field testing, airflow measurement, and system balancing easier, more consistent, and more reliable.

We believe innovation should come from hands-on experience, not from theory. That’s why EcoMeter products are engineered, tested, and refined by certified HVAC Technicians, TABB Technicians, and energy auditing professionals who understand what the field demands.

Our growing product line — including the OAP-46 and CO₂-KIT expansion system — provides real-time data logging, Bluetooth connectivity, and mobile app integration for modern technicians who expect precision and performance.

Driven by American ingenuity and built with professional integrity, EcoMeter delivers the tools that today’s HVAC industry needs: accurate, durable, and field-ready.

Our mission is to put practical, precise, and purpose-built instruments into the hands of HVAC technicians around the world — tools designed in the field, for the field.

Keywords: HVAC Diagnostics • Airflow Measurement • Test & Balance • Building Performance • Economizer Verification • Energy Efficiency • Ventilation Data • HVAC Tools • Field Instrumentation • Technician-Centered Design

Name: Lumalytix
Description:
Lumalytix develops high-sensitivity optical measurement devices tailored to your needs. Our optical detection units set new standards in precision, sensitivity, and integrability,  from point-of-care diagnostics to industrial process monitoring.  As a sub-brand of Dermagnostix, we combine decades of expertise in molecular diagnostics with cutting-edge engineering to deliver compact, plug & play, and OEM-ready solutions.  


Our mission: To make fluorescence and reflective measurement accessible, reliable, and scalable, empowering researchers, engineers, and companies worldwide. 

 
By making fluorescence & reflective measurement simpler, more compact, and easier to integrate, Lumalytix empowers innovation everywhere (from the handheld device in a clinician’s office to automated systems in high-throughput labs). Our detectors help shorten time-to-market, reduce risks, and enable the kind of technology that brings science closer to people.

We are engineers, scientists, and visionaries who share a deep conviction:
that light can transform how we understand life. Each detector we build carries decades of expertise and the ambition to make fluorescence measurement accessible, reliable, and future-proof.
 
At Lumalytix, we bring clarity to science, confidence to research, and speed to innovation.

Name: Integrotech sp. z o.o.
Description:
Integrotech został założony w październiku 2001 roku i od momentu powstania konsekwentnie rozwija się w obszarze opomiarowania, regulacji, analizy i technologii mediów gazowych i ciekłych. Skumulowana wiedza biznesowa i doświadczenie inżynierskie firmy sięgają do przełomu lat 80 i 90 XX w.

Siedziba i nasze główne biuro mieszczą się w Łodzi. Poprzez naszych partnerów regionalnych i międzynarodowych jesteśmy jednak obecni w całej Polsce oraz na rynkach zagranicznych.

Zespół inżynierski składa się ze specjalistów w głównych, klasycznych, dziedzinach inżynierskich oraz inżynierów informatyków i programistów.

Nasze podstawowe kompetencje to:
mechanika, mechanika płynów, analityka płynów, metrologia
elektronika, rozwój oprogramowania
automatyka przemysłowa i robotyka
biotechnologia

Wiedza i doświadczenie naszej kadry, w połączeniu ze ścisłą współpracą zarówno ze światem akademickim z jednej strony, jak i wiodącymi firmami w branży gazowej, naftowej oraz OZE, z drugiej, pozwalają nam na konsekwentny i spójny rozwój firmy.

Niezależnie od zaangażowania w realizacje kontraktów na dostawy urządzeń oraz umów na budowę obiektów technologicznych w systemie „pod klucz”, utrzymujemy stałą aktywność w naszym dziale badawczo-rozwojowym, dbając o zgodność oferowanych urządzeń i usług z nadchodzącymi wymaganiami rynkowymi i administracyjnymi.

Name: TACTINNOV
Description:
At TACTINNOV, we are reinventing tactile palpation by transforming it into a scientific and objective measurement tool. Born from cutting-edge research at the LTDS (CNRS / École Centrale de Lyon), our patented technology introduces a new sensory language for cosmetic brands.
With our innovative instruments – TOUCHYFINGER and ADHELASKIN – the human perception of skin qualities such as softness, firmness, elasticity, and adhesion finally becomes measurable. This unique approach allows brands to validate product efficacy, support claims with tangible proof, and create unprecedented experiences around beauty and sensoriality.
By combining science and emotion, TACTINNOV turns tactile palpation into a science serving cosmetic innovation, giving brands a decisive edge to inspire, convince, and connect with consumers.

Name: CorVera
Description: CorVera LLC, founded in 2018, specializes in improving the accuracy of Coriolis meters operating on bubbly liquids. Their CORXTM technology corrects errors in mass flow and density measurements by leveraging 30+ years of experience in multiphase flow measurement technology development. The technology utilizes a measured process fluid sound speed measurement and an empirically-informed model to address errors in Coriolis meters operating on liquids with entrained gas. CORXTM can be implemented using hazardous-area-rated sensors on a minimally-intrusive basis.

Name: Navas Instruments
Description:
Navas Instruments designs and manufactures advanced glass bead fusion machines and thermogravimetric analyzers (TGA) for laboratories in the cement, mining, and materials analysis industries. Both instrument lines combine precision engineering and automation to deliver high analytical accuracy, repeatability, and productivity across the entire XRF sample preparation and thermal analysis workflow.

Our patented FTA-2000 Fusion Thermogravimetric Analyzer uniquely integrates multi-sample glass-bead fusion with simultaneous LOI/LOF measurement, replacing separate fusion machines and TGAs in one compact, automated unit. It fuses 4–16 samples in about 20 minutes, providing precise and consistent results with minimal operator handling and low energy consumption.

Our multi-sample thermogravimetric analyzers (TGA) perform sequential or multi-step weight-loss measurements for moisture, volatile matter, ash, and LOI, handling multiple samples efficiently while maintaining full traceability. Both systems are engineered for demanding industrial laboratories that require robust performance, automation, and dependable results.

What sets Navas Instruments apart is our focus on innovation, data integrity, and operational efficiency. Each instrument is built for long-term reliability, seamless data export, and integration into modern laboratory workflows.

With headquarters in the United States and operations in Spain, Navas Instruments serves customers worldwide, providing advanced analytical solutions that simplify operations, improve accuracy, and reduce costs.

Our mission is to help laboratories achieve faster, more reliable, and more consistent results through intelligent design and engineering excellence.

Learn more at www.navasinstruments.com

Name: SonicTC
Description:
SonicTC is a modular, scalable platform for the integration of measurement and test benches in R&D, development, production, and laboratory environments. It sets a new standard in automation, process control, and quality assurance for modern manufacturing. 

Developed by RTE Akustik + Prüftechnik, SonicTC delivers unmatched flexibility for functional, endurance, and end-of-line testing without proprietary hardware limitations. The platform seamlessly supports prototype validation and production testing, helping manufacturers standardize processes across sites and product lines. 

Backed by over 25 years of expertise, SonicTC integrates effortlessly with networked production, MES, and ERP systems while enabling full compliance and future-ready operations. 

Our value lies in: 
- No-code, drag-and-drop workflows that reduce setup time to as little as 15 minutes.
- DIN, ISO, and FDA-compliant traceability with SQL-backed data logging.
- High-resolution data acquisition (≥1 MS/s) and real-time analytics.
- Universal protocol support including CAN, LIN, OPC UA, Profinet, and more.
- Modular, hardware-agnostic architecture adaptable to existing and future systems.

Name: Art Fiber Systems
Description:
Art Fiber Systems (AFS) is an independent system integrator dedicated to revolutionizing process control through customized fiber optic solutions.

In today's fragmented market of photonic components, end-users often struggle to navigate a complex landscape of Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) to find the right tools for their specific needs. This leads to costly, time-consuming, and often sub-optimal solutions.

AFS bridges this critical gap. As your dedicated, vendor-neutral partner, we design, test, and integrate MultiSpectral Fiber Systems (MSFS) and Spectral Fiber Sensors (SFS) tailored precisely to your application. We meticulously select the most suitable components from a global network of OEMs, ensuring you receive a system with the best possible performance-to-cost ratio—as simple as possible, but only as complex as necessary.

Our mission is to accelerate the industry's transition from traditional, slow, sample-based analysis to real-time, in-situ, and in-line spectroscopy. We help you replace outdated "spectral pathology" with "live spectroscopy," enabling you to monitor chemical and biological processes as they happen. The result is smarter, faster, and more precise molecular analysis, leading to enhanced production yields and superior product quality.

We specialize in serving demanding industries, including:

-Pharma & Biotech
-Food & Beverage
-Chemicals & Polymers
-Cosmetics
-Medical Diagnostics
Looking ahead, we are pioneering the next generation of fiber-based sensing. Through collaboration with R&D centers and academic institutions, we are integrating advanced AI and cloud-based chemometrics to develop customized, low-cost spectral sensors that function like an IoT device for your process, enabling seamless automation and data transfer.

Partner with us to unlock the full potential of your process control. Let's build the future of live molecular analysis, together.

Poprzez naszą sieć dystrybutorów w ponad 40 krajach na całym świecie zapewniamy wszystkim sektorom produkcji sprzedaż i serwis posprzedażowy na światowym poziomie.
Wybrane przez duże i małe firmy na całym świecie, nasze kompleksowe portfolio CMM i optycznych systemów pomiarowych jest powszechne w wymagających sektorach rynku, takich jak: przemysł lotniczy, motoryzacyjny/sportowy, elektroniczny, naftowy i medyczny - obszary krytyczne dla bezpieczeństwa, w których precyzja jest warunkiem wstępnym. Oprócz reputacji, jaką cieszymy się na naszym rynku krajowym, nasza rosnąca pozycja globalna oznacza, że obecnie eksportujemy aż 81% naszej produkcji. Ponieważ nasze produkty są obecnie sprzedawane praktycznie w każdym kraju w całym uprzemysłowionym świecie, zapewniamy, że nasza rozległa sieć agentów zagranicznych jest w stanie zapewnić poziom usług i szkoleń odpowiadający wysokiej jakości naszych produktów.

Legalizacja oraz serwis

Od lat specjalizujmy się również w sprzedaży wag z legalizacją oraz wzorcowaniem. Wszelkie czynności w tym zakresie świadczymy we własnym punkcie legalizacji urządzeń pomiarowych. W ramach naszych usług mieści się ponadto serwisowanie wag elektronicznych wszystkich producentów. Na czas trwania prac naprawczych naszych Klientów nie pozostawiamy bez niezbędnego w ich zawodzie sprzętu, w każdym przypadku zapewniając im wagę zastępczą.

Profesjonalna obsługa i szybka realizacja zamówień

Długi okres działalności w branży oraz zdobyte w tym czasie doświadczenie przekładają się także na sposób, w jaki dbamy o naszych Klientów. Zawsze staramy się sprostać ich oczekiwaniom: pomagamy w doborze odpowiedniego sprzętu, służymy również swoją wiedzą oraz wsparciem technicznym. Chcemy, aby każdy miał stu procentową pewność, że wchodzi w posiadanie najlepszych z możliwych do swojego przedsiębiorstwa wag. Zdecydowana większość modeli jest ponadto dostępna od ręki, dzięki czemu gwarantujemy szybką i terminową realizację zamówień.

Name: Helm Scientific Laboratory
Description:
Helm Scientific (E-mail: Device.lab@helmscientific.com) offers low-cost, high-performance Raman spectrometers for education and R&D. Our products are specifically designed to measure Raman and photoluminescence spectra of silicon wafers, thin films and coatings, dilute aqueous and organic solutions of various solutes, other liquids or solid samples under 532 nm laser excitation. Samples on glass slides can also be tested for chemical, biological and surface-enhanced Raman scattering (SERS) analyses. Main applications include 1) silicon and III-V semiconductors and transition metal chalcogenide 2D materials, 2) chemical, biochemical, and pharmaceutical analysis, and 3) chemical reaction kinetics and mechanisms. We provide the analytical services of emission, absorption, fluorescence and Raman spectroscopy. 

Helm Scientific specializes in the advanced wafer-level probing of electronic and photonic devices, and provides consulting services to improve semiconductor wafer manufacture that involves photo lithography, ion implant, rapid thermal process, diffusion, dielectric & metal film growth, dry & wet etch, and 3-D wafer-level integration etc. 

* Electrically and optically characterizing micro/nano semiconductor (Si, Ge, III-V) devices and materials via proven methods based on device physics 

* Systematically analyzing electrical parameters to debug device physical structures and identify process, integration and design issues 

* Correlating device parametric data to wafer process parameters and metrology data for statistical process control (SPC) and yield improvement 

* Failure analysis (FA) to segment the process-related root causes, and propose design, process & integration fixes 

* Advanced e-test code development for device parametric analyzers, waveform/pulse generators, switch matrix and automatic probe stations 

* Consulting on wafer analysis using advanced surface diagnostic techniques (TEM, FIB-SEM, SIMS, TXRF, EDX, XPS, XRD, AES, FTIR, Raman)

Name: monosIQ
Description:
Reliable assembly and thus maximum safety and availability of your bolted and flanged joints.

monosIQ supports your bolting and flange management with a guided assembly process compliant with standards in all areas of high-quality bolted connections.

Incorrectly tightened bolts can lead to overloaded assemblies or leaks in flange joints and cause significant costs. To ensure that a bolted joint in, for example, chemical plants, wind turbines, industrial plants, etc. achieves or maintains the required bolt force, there is for the first time an easy-to-use and economically viable solution that differs only slightly from a normal washer. Instead of guessing, the knowledge of the bolt force reduces the cost of unnecessary checks, retightening processes, and maintenance. The sensor washer and the intelligent evaluation and documentation of the bolting process give you unprecedented protection against the failure of a bolted joint. Additional data enables complete documentation and innovative insights into error prevention.

We are working with printed sensors that are simply mounted with the bolt and provide us with data about the bolt force. After assembly, the sensors remain in the connection and can provide further data on operating behavior in the future.

For more than 53 years AMA Instruments has been developing and manufacturing online GC's for trace level analysis of air toxics. Our innovative systems and technologies are certified for air quality and industrial site monitoring applications and installed in monitoring stations and mobile labs all over the world.
By supplying advanced analytical instruments for air quality monitoring, we serve scientists in getting a better understanding of the effects of organic pollutants in the air we breathe and we support environmental protection authorities worldwide in observing and controlling emissions of organic air toxics. In such ways we take on responsibility and have a share in protecting people and our nature.
Complementary to our gas chromatographs for air quality and industrial site monitoring, we also provide technical expertise and application support along with a reliable spare parts service.
